name: Voter Action Project
subject: Ramping up their attacks on voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Whether it's these 27 different state bills, folks, or the SAVE Act in Congress, it's abundantly clear that opponents of voting rights are only ramping up their attacks on our fundamental rights . We have to put pressure on them to stop at both the state and federal level.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stand with us and fight to defend our right to vote wherever it's under attack >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=073125_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=073125_3&amount=25]
Team,
We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=073125_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_3&amount=35]
The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to resist $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=073125_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=073125_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=073125_3&amount=20]

**CNN: White House eyeing five-seat GOP pickup in Texas in midterms as part of redistricting push**
_In a call with the House GOP’s Texas delegation, Trump told members the White House believes they can flip as many as five US House seats as part of a Republican redistricting effort in the state, according to a source familiar with the call..._
_The White House has been aggressively pushing the redistricting plan behind the scenes, describing it as a key part of their midterm plan._
**AP: How redistricting in Texas and other states could change the game for US House elections**
_Redistricting usually happens after the once-a-decade population count by the U.S. Census Bureau or in response to a court ruling. Now, Texas Republicans want to break that tradition — and other states could follow suit._
_President Trump has asked the Texas Legislature to create districts, in time for next year’s midterm elections, that will send five more Republicans to Washington and make it harder for Democrats to regain the majority and blunt his agenda._
**Dallas Morning News: Texas redistricting will spark brutal fight that could spread across nation**
_“The full monty option is to just reconfigure almost every single seat, at least somewhat, with the goal of maximizing a new Republican seat in Houston, two new Republican seats in South Texas, and one or two new Republican seats in the Metroplex or Central Texas,” said [Mark] Jones, the Rice political scientist._
**As you read this, All On The Line and our affiliates are working to stop this attack on fair representation in Texas and make sure it doesn’t spread to more states.**
Our democracy depends on the fact that every vote counts the same — and right now, we’re facing some of the most flagrant attacks on those basic rights we’ve seen in decades.
[**Donate now to make sure we have every resource needed to keep fighting — and winning — for fair maps in Texas and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112525201/560773198/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TXRoundup_email_20250731-AOTL-Tier1-TXRoundup_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250731-AOTL-Tier1-TXRoundup_&utm_campaign=TXRoundup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkY2FkMzczLTZhNmUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=200v2mmvi5lrBqXE6Vs6zb6ImAbuSJ6wALz80dN8A20=)
Stay tuned for more updates,
Claire Low
Director of Political and Campaigns
All On The Line

AP: How redistricting in Texas and other states could change the game for US House elections Redistricting usually happens after the once-a-decade population count by the U.S. Census Bureau or in response to a court ruling. Now, Texas Republicans want to break that tradition — and other states could follow suit. President Trump has asked the Texas Legislature to create districts, in time for next year’s midterm elections, that will send five more Republicans to Washington and make it harder for Democrats to regain the majority and blunt his agenda. Dallas Morning News: Texas redistricting will spark brutal fight that could spread across nation “The full monty option is to just reconfigure almost every single seat, at least somewhat, with the goal of maximizing a new Republican seat in Houston, two new Republican seats in South Texas, and one or two new Republican seats in the Metroplex or Central Texas,” said [Mark] Jones, the Rice political scientist. As you read this, All On The Line and our affiliates are working to stop this attack on fair representation in Texas and make sure it doesn’t spread to more states. Our democracy depends on the fact that every vote counts the same — and right now, we’re facing some of the most flagrant attacks on those basic rights we’ve seen in decades. = Stay tuned for more updates, Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter, I am so overwhelmed with the support this team has given me this month.

It's because of folks like you that we're able to get so much done as we strive to keep Washington’s 8th District blue.

Without a reliable network of grassroots supporters to count on, there would be no campaign, and no Team Schrier. You truly are the backbone of the work we do, _and I am so grateful to have you fighting by my side every step of the way._

But Peter, right now—with less than 24 hours left to go until we finalize fundraising numbers for July—we're still falling a bit short of where we need to be to ensure we start August off on a strong note. We can't meet the fundraising goals we set for this campaign without you, and I'm counting on everyone who can to step up in these final hours to help me close this gap.

name: Abigail
subject: I'm asking one last time:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our first end-of-month deadline of the new fundraising quarter is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_Tonight's deadline is one of the biggest of our campaign so far._
And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our fundraising numbers become public.
If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one last time: Will you contribute your first $25 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight to become one of my Founding Donors?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112525895/560777325/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-31_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUxZTFiMmEtNmI2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gA4YQ9Vm-sgaxBev2A0BXE54kUDJ-fUv0PKHJU5t6TY=)

name: Maxwell's iPhone
subject: really quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Maxwell. I just wanted to reach out with a quick update before the end of the night.

We’re only $1,043 short of our July End of Month goal. I just pulled out my phone and did the math, and that means I only need 149 more supporters to chip in $7.

Peter — I’ll keep this short because we’re down to _hours._

If we miss this goal tonight, MAGA wins the headline tomorrow. They’ll see a weak month for Pennsylvania Democrats, and they’ll smell blood. That cannot happen, not with the Supreme Court and the 2026 midterms all on the line.

We need every single person reading this to step up. No exceptions.

**This is the last ask I’m making before the books close.** [Chip in whatever you can right now and let’s end this month the way we need to, strong and unshakable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112525991/560779221/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250731_FR_EOM_0_3MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWU3ZDZiYi02YjZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHOdvz5_-AfPgkHv6CeLujGwfzaLIU3magvtNL97-0Y=)

name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: Friend, This is How We Win: United, Organized, and All In
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/105516/images/Asset%203azdems_logo_white_Orange.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/105516/images/july-end-of-month.jpg]
This Is The Moment We Show Our Power
Dear Friend,
Let’s be blunt: Republicans are counting on chaos, fear, and division to carry them to victory. They are banking on us giving up, turning on each other, or staying quiet.
But they don’t understand Arizona Democrats.
We organize. We show up. We build real power from the ground up, in every county, every district, every community. And when we come together, we win.
We’re staring down the final hours of the month, and what we raise right now will determine how hard we can fight back. We’re asking you to step up with a $10 monthly donation because this fight doesn’t end tomorrow. It builds month after month until we take our state back.
Make it Monthly. Give $10 Now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-q3-2025?refcode=email-eom-jul25&amount=10&recurring=1]
Republicans want to take us back to a time when only a few voices mattered. We’re not going back. Not now. Not ever.
We are defending reproductive rights, voting rights, public education, and basic human decency. And it takes all of us.
This is the moment to rise above their chaos. To organize, not agonize. To invest in the kind of campaign they hope we never build.
Let’s show them that Arizona Democrats don’t flinch. We fight. Together.
Give $10 Monthly Right Now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-q3-2025?refcode=email-eom-jul25&amount=10&recurring=1]
We’re not powered by billionaires. We’re powered by people like you.
Together,
Arizona Democratic Party
P.S. The GOP is flooding Arizona with dark money, trying to drown us out. But we have something stronger: you. We're building people power, and every $10 monthly donation fuels our organizers, powers our outreach, and helps us fight for every voter in every corner of this state. Don’t wait.
Stand With Us Now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-q3-2025?refcode=email-eom-jul25&amount=10&recurring=1]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/105516/images/Asset%203azdems_logo_white_Orange.png]

Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Holding the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, I wanted to reach out to you one last time before tonight’s deadline. Over the past few months, Republicans have made it clear where they stand. They chose billionaires over working families by cutting _their_ taxes and taking away _your_ benefits — not to mention cutting $9 billion in bipartisan spending Congress had already approved, firing thousands of government workers, and slashing spending for critical government services. I’m fighting every day to hold the line against Trump’s extreme agenda and to elect more Democrats to the Senate who will hold this administration accountable. And goals like the one we’re facing tonight play a huge role in supporting this work. While Republicans rely on billionaires and large corporations to fund their work, I’m counting on ordinary people like you who want a government that fights for our families and our future. **[Peter, I know that we can get there as long as we continue to fight together. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today. Can you please chip in to my campaign before tonight’s deadline to help us fight back against the GOP agenda that puts the wealthiest few above working people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526098/560781890/124025968?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250731_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUzMzA0My02YzZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugQGf3BqWK62kZLcQJUCZDgVPnFf-QRPDCFSP93lYDE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526099/560781891/1126229899?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250731_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUzMzA0My02YzZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugQGf3BqWK62kZLcQJUCZDgVPnFf-QRPDCFSP93lYDE=)

clean_body: | Aloha Peter, I wanted to reach out to you one last time before tonight’s deadline. Over the past few months, Republicans have made it clear where they stand. They chose billionaires over working families by cutting their taxes and taking away your benefits — not to mention cutting $9 billion in bipartisan spending Congress had already approved, firing thousands of government workers, and slashing spending for critical government services. I’m fighting every day to hold the line against Trump’s extreme agenda and to elect more Democrats to the Senate who will hold this administration accountable. And goals like the one we’re facing tonight play a huge role in supporting this work. While Republicans rely on billionaires and large corporations to fund their work, I’m counting on ordinary people like you who want a government that fights for our families and our future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I can’t thank you enough for all your support, Peter. Let’s continue standing up for what we know is right. Mahalo, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

body:
This is our chance to flip Maine’s Senate seat and restore our Democratic majority... and we’re counting on your help to do it, Peter.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93123?refcode=em20250731-9209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9209%2E614464%2ELGgcGA)
Here’s the deal, Peter: _We MUST flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat if we want to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year —**and this new polling proves that momentum is on our side.**_
According to Morning Consult, the approval rating of Maine’s incumbent GOP U.S. Senator Susan Collins is at a RECORD LOW.
**_Only 38% of Maine voters currently approve of her performance._**
Our path to flipping the Senate does not exist without defeating Susan Collins. And now, we know that we have a real chance to do it.
**But we need your help to reach voters across Maine with the truth about Senator Collins’ record every day between now and November of next year.** Online, on TV, on the radio — we need to get our message out early + often.
**[So Peter, will you help us take advantage of this MAJOR opportunity for Democrats in Maine by rushing a donation of $5 or whatever you can right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93123?refcode=em20250731-9209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9209%2E614464%2ELGgcGA)**

Hi Peter, One of the reasons I ran for Congress was because I could relate to the plight of being under-served and unheard. I’ve lived in this district my whole life, and there has been no shortage of problems needing solutions. >From our education hubs to our rural communities, each issue is complex and nuanced. But with so many problems to solve, issues affecting marginalized folks are often pushed to the back burner. For so long, I wanted someone running for Congress who could relate to the experiences of the diverse community in NC-04 and prioritize progress. **Until one day I realized, I could be that person.** I’m not in this for fame or ego. I’m in Congress to ensure every need is met for every single person who calls this district home. In our nation’s political climate, it can sometimes feel like chaos is a constant — with solutions and progress put on the back burner. But what keeps me going in this work is a commitment to building a better future for our children and a better life for our communities. If you send me back to Congress, that’s what I’ll continue to do. Our end-of-month deadline is just a few hours away, and we still need to raise $2,693 to help close the gap. Will you pitch in $10 or more before midnight? Here’s the best link to use: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-vf-em-fr-july25?refcode=JulyEOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526309/560784962/1371072993?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_073125_EOM06_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk1MWIyMC02ZDZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRK2oL-ncriU5-Pvh35ybd-SDI1LO50qq5sE6-tP444=)** Thank you, Valerie
* * *

clean_body: Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tonight... If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, One of the reasons I ran for Congress was because I could relate to the plight of being under-served and unheard. I’ve lived in this district my whole life, and there has been no shortage of problems needing solutions. >From our education hubs to our rural communities, each issue is complex and nuanced. But with so many problems to solve, issues affecting marginalized folks are often pushed to the back burner. For so long, I wanted someone running for Congress who could relate to the experiences of the diverse community in NC-04 and prioritize progress. Until one day I realized, I could be that person. I’m not in this for fame or ego. I’m in Congress to ensure every need is met for every single person who calls this district home. In our nation’s political climate, it can sometimes feel like chaos is a constant — with solutions and progress put on the back burner. But what keeps me going in this work is a commitment to building a better future for our children and a better life for our communities. If you send me back to Congress, that’s what I’ll continue to do. Our end-of-month deadline is just a few hours away, and we still need to raise $2,693 to help close the gap. Will you pitch in $10 or more before midnight? Here’s the best link to use: = Thank you, Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: laura friedman (personal)
subject: Believe it or not
body:
I’m glad I caught you, friend.
We’re facing the end of our July fundraising push at midnight tonight. Will you chip in $3 to help us push past our individual supporter goal? CA-30 and our friends in races around us are must-holds for a Democratic House majority, and we can’t leave anything to chance.
Here’s a link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526336/560785425/-1623651544?refcode=em-7.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM4YzNiM2YtNmQ2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s2a_94RSUdI7QspdqtMc3NWOAx8m-1vl3MX-u4oHQQ8=)
A significant chunk of our donations come from digital outreach like this. In fact, our campaign relies on the generous support of our grassroots network – and I’m incredibly grateful for it.
We need a progressive majority in Washington, and I’m determined to do everything in my control to get us there. But in moments like this, I’ll need your support to get us over the finish line.
So friend, if you’d like to be part of this true grassroots effort, here’s that link again: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526337/560785426/-1623651544?refcode=em-7.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM4YzNiM2YtNmQ2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s2a_94RSUdI7QspdqtMc3NWOAx8m-1vl3MX-u4oHQQ8=)
Thank you for everything,
Laura

Laura Friedman for Congress
PO Box 27296
Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m fed up, and I know I’m not alone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526577/560790866/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjJjYmNhOC02ZTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhZRUUGszk2zRw62SLTMIfEb4n3KuLZ7lHnE3KmIybU=)
I know you’ve heard a lot from me and my team in the past few days – thank you for sticking with me in this fight.

Before tonight’s end-of-month deadline expires, I need to pull back the curtain on what we’re facing in this race.

**I’m fed up with the MAGA chaos, and I know I’m not alone.**

I’ve traveled across Central and Southern Illinois listening to folks who are scared about the impact of the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” on their families. Folks who don’t know how they will afford health care or put food on the table after billions were gutted from Medicaid and SNAP.

**This is not the American Dream. This is not how Illinoisans should be forced to live because Republicans prioritized the MAGA agenda and gave their billionaire donors a tax break.**

I’m pushing back hard from my position in Congress – and we’re making progress. But there is only so much we can do without the House majority.

It’s what makes keeping IL-13 blue essential, and we need to prepare for the attacks to come. I have two GOP challengers in this race who are itching to flip this seat and secure another two years of Republican control.

**[They’ll have to go through this grassroots team. Will you chip in $3 before tonight’s deadline to stand with me? My finance team tells me we need a surge of donations – 250 strong – to meet our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112526578/560790867/-550958566?refcode=em-7.31.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjJjYmNhOC02ZTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhZRUUGszk2zRw62SLTMIfEb4n3KuLZ7lHnE3KmIybU=)**

clean_body: | = I know you’ve heard a lot from me and my team in the past few days – thank you for sticking with me in this fight. Before tonight’s end-of-month deadline expires, I need to pull back the curtain on what we’re facing in this race. I’m fed up with the MAGA chaos, and I know I’m not alone. I’ve traveled across Central and Southern Illinois listening to folks who are scared about the impact of the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” on their families. Folks who don’t know how they will afford health care or put food on the table after billions were gutted from Medicaid and SNAP. This is not the American Dream. This is not how Illinoisans should be forced to live because Republicans prioritized the MAGA agenda and gave their billionaire donors a tax break. I’m pushing back hard from my position in Congress – and we’re making progress. But there is only so much we can do without the House majority. It’s what makes keeping IL-13 blue essential, and we need to prepare for the attacks to come. I have two GOP challengers in this race who are itching to flip this seat and secure another two years of Republican control. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Team Kelly Morrison
subject: It is the last day of July - can you take 1 minute to read this email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Team Kelly here. We know that July is busy and your inbox may be swamped so we will keep this brief. ( This email is about a 1 minute read.)
We are just hours away from our July end of month deadline. Kelly has been working hard in Washington, but was sent back to Minnesota early so the Republicans could avoid taking a vote to release the Epstein files. While we have her here, we are working hard to fill her calendar with in-district events and meetings to hear directly from her constituents impacted by this administration.
Peter, while times are undoubtedly tough, we could not be more proud of the work that Kelly is doing. She has been a strong voice in communicating the horrors of Trump’s so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill,” she continues to work towards bipartisanship when she can, and as always, continues to fight for our democracy.
Kelly is the proven champion we need in Washington, and we are doing all that we can to ensure she can continue to do this work for years to come. To do that, we must hit our monthly fundraising goals.
Peter, July is historically a challenging time for fundraising, and we know that. We planned for that. We are just hours away from our July end of month deadline. Kelly has been working hard in Washington, but was sent back to Minnesota early so the Republicans could avoid taking a vote to release the Epstein files. While we have her here, we are working hard to fill her calendar with in-district events and meetings to hear directly from her constituents impacted by this administration. name: Team Keith
subject: Reproductive rights are on the line
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump and his allies are once again attacking our reproductive freedoms and access to health care—this time by trying to defund Planned Parenthood.

Let’s be clear: thousands of Minnesotans depend on Planned Parenthood for cancer screenings, family planning, STI testing, abortion care, and more. For many, it’s their only option.

If Trump succeeds, over 1.1 million people could lose access to essential health services. Women, LGBTQ+ folks, and low-income communities will be hit the hardest.

But Keith Ellison is fighting back. He’s joined 22 states and Washington, D.C. to sue the Trump administration, and he’ll continue doing everything in his power to protect our rights and our health.

Keith is leading the charge, but he needs us by his side. With just hours left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we’re reaching out to ask if you’ll step up and help us hit our goal.

Our records show that you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and get a full refund from the Minnesota Department of Revenue.

Will you make a fully refundable $75 donation to support Keith as he fights for Minnesotans’ reproductive rights and access to health care?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250731_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250731_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

name: Jared Hudson, Candidate for U.S. Senate
subject: Evil doesn’t sleep and neither can we
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

Patriot,

I’ve spent my career standing between innocent people and
unspeakable evil.

As a Navy SEAL, I was sent into some of the darkest corners of the
world to fight our enemies.

And when the uniform came off, I didn’t stop.

I put on a badge and continued the fight as a law enforcement officer
and started a nonprofit that frees women and children from the horrors
of human trafficking.

I’M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE EVIL DOESN’T STOP -_ AND
NEITHER CAN I_. BUT THIS ISN’T JUST A CAMPAIGN. IT’S THE NEXT
CHAPTER IN MY LIFE OF SERVICE.

But before I can take this fight to Washington, I must prove to the
media, the political class, and most importantly, the people of
Alabama, that we can build a campaign that can win.

WITHOUT YOUR HELP TODAY, I FEAR WE’LL COME UP SHORT WHEN FAILURE
ISN’T AN OPTION. WILL YOU PITCH IN RIGHT NOW TO SEND A MESSAGE?
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

DONATE $10

DONATE $5
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=5]

The Left is well-funded, well-connected, and dead set on crushing
anyone who stands in their way. But I’ve faced worse, _and I’ve
never backed down._

WE’RE ASKING EVERY PATRIOT WHO IS RECEIVING THIS MESSAGE TO RUSH IN
$16 BEFORE MIDNIGHT
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]
TO SHOW THE SWAMP AND THE LEFT THAT WE’RE SERIOUS ABOUT DEFENDING
THE VALUES WE HOLD DEAR.

DONATE NOW >>
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

Let's take this fight all the way to the U.S. Senate.

Thank you,

[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

JARED HUDSON

A MESSAGE FROM JARED HUDSON:

[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

It’s Jared Hudson.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Alabama, and I wanted to take a
moment to introduce myself.

I HOPE THAT BY THE TIME YOU FINISH READING THIS MESSAGE, YOU’LL
CONSIDER STANDING WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT BY MAKING A DONATION OF ANY
AMOUNT.
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

I’m a former Navy SEAL Sniper, law enforcement officer, business
owner, husband, father, and follower of Christ.

I’ve deployed in support of the Global War on Terror, and I’ve led
the charge in combatting human trafficking.

I’ve been to some of the darkest corners of the world, looked evil
in the eye, and seen how faith, courage, and conviction can overcome
anything.

Now, I’m entering a new battlefield: I’M RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE
TO STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND TO BE THE TIP OF THE SPEAR THAT’LL
DEFEND OUR CHRISTIAN VALUES, PROTECT THE PRINCIPLES WE HOLD DEAR, AND
END THE WOKE AGENDA.

If you believe in God, country, the Constitution, and standing with
President Trump, I need your support on this mission.

WILL YOU JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT FOR OUR COUNTRY’S FUTURE BY PITCHING
IN A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT TODAY?
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/prsp-donate-16-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250730_PRSPDonate16_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=16]

I’m not a politician, I’m a warrior. And with your help, I’ll
fight every day in Washington to put America - _and you_ - first.

Thank you,

Jared Hudson

Hudson for Alabama – PO Box 100 Gardendale, AL 35071

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: $1.4 billion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Earlier this year, we learned that Donald Trump was on pace to raise over $500 million from corporations and wealthy donors by summer.
The oligarchy that Trump works for has exceeded expectations:
Unlike Donald Trump, **Alexandria doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or attend fancy cocktail party fundraisers to curry favor with billionaires**.
That’s because this campaign is about creating tangible improvements for everyday, working families across this country.
But Alexandria can’t do that work alone. She has this movement alongside her.
[We’re not approaching oligarchy — we’re fully here. Will you make a $5 contribution toward our fight for a better world for working people, not special interests and billionaires?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250731-2._loPmt&refcode=em20250731-9451-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9451%2E2526796%2Etjuxis)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250731-2._loPmt&refcode=em20250731-9451-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9451%2E2526796%2Etjuxis)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250731-2._loPmt&refcode=em20250731-9451-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9451%2E2526796%2Etjuxis)**
Whether or not you contribute today, thank you for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s “lock him up” rhetoric has become real.
body:
Hi Peter — this is Adam Schiff. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out with this urgent message:
Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.
Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=073125_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=073125_4]
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.
I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.
Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and The Real Texas PAC to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=073125_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_4&amount=5]

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: I’ll keep this brief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Peter, I’ll keep this brief.
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just a few hours away.
I’m counting on grassroots Democrats like you to chip in so we can flip red seats blue in California, take back the House from Republicans, and stop Trump’s MAGA agenda.
Can you click or tap this link to donate $25 or more now? [https://zoelofgren.us/july-eom]
Thank you,
Zoe Lofgren

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: CADEM Organizing
subject: Keep organizing with us across California!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats,
Thank you to everyone who joined us for our Digital Organizing Training this week! We’re building momentum, and it’s just the beginning of our work to flip the House and protect California values.
This training is a part of a statewide organizing program that we’re rolling out to build power across California ahead of 2026. We're training activists across our state to take action, meet voters where they are, and fight back against Republican attacks on our rights.
https://www.cadem.org/CAStrong [https://www.cadem.org/CAStrong]
CLICK HERE TO BEGIN ORGANIZING [http://cadem.org/castrong]
California has the most flippable congressional districts in the country. The path to a Democratic House runs straight through our state, and we need every voice in the fight.
Here is how you can get involved:
✅ Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812769/] for welcome calls to newly registered Democrats on August 14
✅ Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/] for our next training on rural organizing on August 26
✅ Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/817082/] to start knocking on doors in your community
✅ Stay connected with us at cadem.org/CAStrong [https://linktr.ee/cadem] and by following us on social media [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
Together, we can organize to win.
CADEM

| | Hi Friend, Today’s the last day in July, and we’re trying to raise $736 today to hit our monthly fundraising goal. As I reflect on the last seven months in Congress - I understand now what it means to build a movement inside and outside of the Dome. I came to Congress to fight for peace and justice – and the communities that have been left out of the conversation for far too long. This is an all-hands-on-deck movement. We need to make sure we are all working together to fight threats to health care, education, and our most basic democratic rights. If you can, I’m asking you to contribute – and whatever you give makes a huge difference. [**If you believe in this work — fighting for justice, equity, and real progress — can you chip in before midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112527562/560809927/-484676713?refcode=E14380-20250731-EOM3-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVmNDFlNDAtNzM2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SFJVxXizuUYh3TBEo5wPuVrgxnI1zd8rQH4_qJTTPk=) | [**DONATE TODAY →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112527563/560809928/-484676713?refcode=E14380-20250731-EOM3-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVmNDFlNDAtNzM2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SFJVxXizuUYh3TBEo5wPuVrgxnI1zd8rQH4_qJTTPk=)

clean_body: We’re so close. Will you help? | = = | | Hi Friend, Today’s the last day in July, and we’re trying to raise $736 today to hit our monthly fundraising goal. As I reflect on the last seven months in Congress - I understand now what it means to build a movement inside and outside of the Dome. I came to Congress to fight for peace and justice – and the communities that have been left out of the conversation for far too long. This is an all-hands-on-deck movement. We need to make sure we are all working together to fight threats to health care, education, and our most basic democratic rights. If you can, I’m asking you to contribute – and whatever you give makes a huge difference. = | = With love and resolve, Lateefah | * | | ---|---|--- Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com = = Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: The right side of history doesn’t wait for polls
body:
When leaders step up, the world changes

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=b37254c3e6&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=b7d30c8d2b&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| Dear Peter,**On Tuesday, Britain’s Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced that the U.K. will recognize a Palestinian state at the U.N. in September** —unless Israel agrees to a ceasefire in Gaza.**Let’s be clear: this moment comes after months of devastating decisions that have cost innocent lives and eroded the basic dignity every person deserves**. The suffering in Gaza has been compounded by leaders who have looked away, delayed, or chosen politics over humanity.**That’s why this announcement matters. It didn’t happen overnight.** It’s the result of years—decades—of determination by people who refused to let the struggle for life and dignity be erased from the global conversation. It’s the result of courage in the face of violence, and persistence when the odds seemed impossible.**I’m glad to see world leaders step up** —not because it’s easy, or politically convenient, but because justice demands it.**That’s what leadership is: showing up when people are suffering, speaking out when the stakes are high, and taking action even when the path is hard.** I’m running for Congress because we need more leaders who will stand up for justice—not just when it’s popular, but when lives are on the line. Whether that’s protecting working families here at home, or speaking clearly when human rights are under attack anywhere in the world.[**If you share that vision of leadership, I hope you’ll chip in $27, $54, or whatever you can today**.](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=fb9f46df4f&e=5a6ee82cdb)Every contribution helps us keep organizing for a politics rooted in courage and dignity.**Justice doesn’t wait for the easy moment—and neither should we.****In solidarity,****
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=add75abf4d&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja**
**Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---

| Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change.

Republicans are willing to do whatever it takes to turn Georgia from a purple state to a red state — even if it means running a full-blown Ponzi scheme to funnel as much money as possible into their bank accounts. Yes, really. They’re not afraid to play dirty. But we won’t sink to their level. Georgia’s Senate race is the most important election in the country, and we’re going to win it the same way we always have: By out-fundraising, out-organizing, and out-voting our opponents. Come 2026, I believe we’ll have a blue Senate — and a blue Georgia. But none of that works without you. I need to be real with you. Today is our $6,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline we've already fallen behind. Republicans have made it absolutely clear: CA-25 is central to keeping their grip on the House and advancing Donald Trump’s second term agenda — **no matter the cost.** They’re flooding this race with money before they’ve even picked a candidate. **That’s how determined they are to flip this seat.** They'll do whatever it takes to make sure Trump can hold onto power and keep pushing an agenda that hurts the very people we’re supposed to serve. That’s not what leadership looks like and it’s not why I came to Congress. I ran because I believe public service means helping people — expanding opportunity, protecting health care, and standing up for working families. Not tearing them down to score political points. We can’t take on the GOP’s war chest if we’re falling behind. We need to close the gap before midnight. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | I need to be real with you. Today is our $6,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline we've already fallen behind. Republicans have made it absolutely clear: CA-25 is central to keeping their grip on the House and advancing Donald Trump’s second term agenda — no matter the cost. They’re flooding this race with money before they’ve even picked a candidate. That’s how determined they are to flip this seat. They'll do whatever it takes to make sure Trump can hold onto power and keep pushing an agenda that hurts the very people we’re supposed to serve. That’s not what leadership looks like and it’s not why I came to Congress. I ran because I believe public service means helping people — expanding opportunity, protecting health care, and standing up for working families. Not tearing them down to score political points. We can’t take on the GOP’s war chest if we’re falling behind. We need to close the gap before midnight. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

so we just have to ask, Peter
#
Peter — **is there ANYTHING we can say to encourage you to add your first donation before our big end-of-month deadline at midnight TONIGHT?**
What if we told you that we’re building an entirely people-powered movement to combat the corrosive influence of corporate PACs and billionaire insiders on our government?
Or what if we shared more about the kinds of candidates we’re supporting — real working people who are ready to fight for our communities — and their mission to stand up for everyday American families like yours?
Maybe it would help if we told you that we’re STILL tracking short of our monthly fundraising goal, but that your support today could take us over the top?
**Anything you can give today — whether it’s $5, $50, or $500 — will make a big impact on the movement we’re building together and the candidates we’re supporting this cycle, Peter.[So please, if any of these reasons encourage you at all, consider making your first donation to Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93007?refcode=em20250731-9202&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9202%2E614464%2EO_uvVZ)**

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: The Gerrymandering Queen, New Endorsements, & Ava Unleashed 🎯
body:
New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3503e48bef&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We’ve got a [**brand new episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3a4e2ed98e&e=567664f14c) that is a must-watch and must-share! From political hypocrisy on gerrymandering to economic wins for the Trump administration — and yes, Ava drops the mic in a fiery cultural debate — this show is PACKED.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=58e97cc603&e=567664f14c)
| **🔥 Gerrymandering Hypocrisy Exposed
**
Texas Democrats traveled all the way to Santa Fe... why? To get advice from Gov. Lujan Grisham, the Michael Jordan of gerrymandering, on how to fight it back home. Mark calls it out: MLG perfected the playbook on disenfranchising non-Democrat voters in New Mexico.
Meanwhile, Rep. Melanie Stansbury is suddenly outraged about gerrymandering in Missouri — while saying NOTHING about her own party’s shady tactics here. Krysty goes OFF on the hypocrisy, and we break down what an Ivy League site says about New Mexico’s redistricting. (Spoiler: we're one of the worst.)
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2276c30558&e=567664f14c)
---
| **👀 Native American Endorsement Surprise**

A major New Mexico Native American tribe just endorsed a gubernatorial candidate — and it’s NOT Deb Haaland. Is this the first crack in her campaign? We weigh in on the political implications and what it means for Sam Bregman’s chances in the primary.
**📈 Trump’s Economy vs. the Experts**

Trump’s new tariff deal is here — and the economy is growing fast despite the predictions from left-leaning economists. We break down why they keep getting it wrong and what this means heading into 2025.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ce8ccacdcf&e=567664f14c)
---
| **👖 Ava vs. American Eagle: The Debate You Didn’t See Coming**

Ava joins us to debate the Sidney Sweeney–American Eagle controversy, and she takes it to a whole new level. Let’s just say... Mark and Krysty were left in stunned silence. 🔥 Don’t miss Ava unfiltered.
---
|
---

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3f4029385a&e=567664f14c)

Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin.

Talk soon,

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: 3 reasons why I need your help tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
As we reach the first end-of-month deadline since Trump's pro-billionaire budget passed, I need your help.
| | |
---
Peter,

With the deadline to reach my $30,000 monthly fundraising goal at midnight tonight, I'm about to ask you to **[chip in any amount you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112527883/560818488/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk535-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTU0YTgwNi03NzZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwYCAgWBXX0zci7L22ZCGRUpBunJIX3uWh_n_J1TSLE=) **– but first, I want to take a moment to reflect on what a chaotic month it's been:
**1.** From reading out the 940-page text on the floor to setting a record for the most amendment votes over the 26-hour vote-a-rama, Senate Democrats and I did everything in our power to stop Trump's Big, Ugly Betrayal of a Bill. But on July 1, it passed with JD Vance's tiebreaking vote.
**2.** Forcing an estimated 15 million people to lose health insurance to pass trillions in tax cuts for the wealthy just wasn't enough for the president – so then he told Republicans to zero out funding for PBS and NPR and billions more from global aid. And in the dead of night on July 18, they obeyed.
**3.** But that still wasn't enough – because all month long, Trump's been illegally blocking billions for public schools nationwide. So I blocked __ his Education Department nominee's glide path to confirmation, and kept up the public pressure until the administration finally announce they'd release the funding.
**And now, as we reach the first end-of-month deadline since Trump's pro-billionaire Project 2025 budget became law, I need your help.**
If I come up short tonight, the GOP will take our low fundraising numbers as a sign that people _actually support_ their anti-middle-class agenda.

Worse than that, we may not have the resources to stop that agenda by taking back the Senate majority in 2026 – **unless, before 11:59 p.m. tonight, each and every person on this grassroots team steps up to do their part.**
Anything you can give to support this critical work tonight will help us build the coalition we need to hold Trump accountable and stop the GOP from pushing through more of his out-of-touch policies.
**[So please, Peter, will you chip in $5, $25, or anything you can spare toward my $30,000 end-of-month goal before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112527884/560818489/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk535-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTU0YTgwNi03NzZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwYCAgWBXX0zci7L22ZCGRUpBunJIX3uWh_n_J1TSLE=)**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: One final request before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah here.
Hi, Sarah here.
My team requested that I reach out to you because we’re just $2,500 short of our July fundraising goal — and there are just a few hours left to hit it. [**Can I count on you to chip in any amount you can to help us cross the finish line?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250731-2?refcode=em20250731-2233&refcode2=2233_21716_eTnTMN&akid=2233%2E21716%2EeTnTMN)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250731-2?refcode=em20250731-2233&refcode2=2233_21716_eTnTMN&akid=2233%2E21716%2EeTnTMN)**
I know times are difficult for many, and if you can’t afford to contribute tonight, I understand. I’m grateful you are part of our coalition. [**But if you’re able, a donation of $3, $15, or even $50 will go a long way to helping me keep up the fight in Congress for working families.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250731-2?refcode=em20250731-2233&refcode2=2233_21716_eTnTMN&akid=2233%2E21716%2EeTnTMN)
Thank you so much for your continued support!
—Sarah

| | Peter –

While Marie continues to deliver solutions for Southwest Washington families in Congress, we have a big fight looming for our campaign. _**Here’s where we’re at:**_
* The NRCC named Marie as one of their top targets to defeat this cycle, and Roll Call named her as **one of the 5 most vulnerable House Democrats**.
* **Millions of dollars in attack ads** and outside spending are already pouring into our district.
* Now, Marie’s bold vote to protect affordable health care and a responsible budget that helps working families has put **a target on her back.**

It’s never been more urgent that we ensure Marie is prepared for the fights ahead. [Will you pitch in $10 or more before the month is over? clean_body: | | Peter – While Marie continues to deliver solutions for Southwest Washington families in Congress, we have a big fight looming for our campaign. Here’s where we’re at: The NRCC named Marie as one of their top targets to defeat this cycle, and Roll Call named her as one of the 5 most vulnerable House Democrats. Millions of dollars in attack ads and outside spending are already pouring into our district. Now, Marie’s bold vote to protect affordable health care and a responsible budget that helps working families has put a target on her back. It’s never been more urgent that we ensure Marie is prepared for the fights ahead. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. name: Josh (personal)

body:
Hey Peter,
I’m reaching out one more time before the deadline tonight because I really need your help. We’re just $13,472 short of our goal, and there’s only 5 hours left.
We can’t afford to fall short when our opponent just launched his campaign, and National Republicans are spending thousands on attack ads against me.
I really want to be able to launch response ads and pay for a critical poll, but I can’t if we don’t hit our goal.
[_**This is an extremely urgent moment. Can I count on you to chip in right now to help us close the gap and keep this seat blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112528107/560820631/-1149165536?&refcode=E14429-20250731-FinalDeadline-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg5M2U3NzEtN2I2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjRDg0yFUkKNBP_kld8g4xWXwlxDajYR4i9KpcGhJaM=)
Every dollar counts.
— Josh

name: Andrea Hunley
subject: Make & Meet: Event 8/9 in Ft Wayne
body:
Join me in my hometown! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ebf63e50c6b6/make-meet-event-89-in-ft-wayne?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
# Friends Near Fort Wayne:
**I would love to connect! And friends from around the state, if you know of folks near Fort Wayne who would enjoy a morning gathering- spread the word. Tickets are limited and going fast!

A CREATIVE FUNDRAISER WITH SENATOR ANDREA HUNLEY** Join me in my hometown of Fort Wayne for a morning of civic creativity. We will decorate tote bags with patches, pins, stencils and more-- all while enjoying bubbly drinks, sweet treats, and great conversation. **WHEN: **Saturday, August 9 from 9am-11am **WHERE: **Sunbound Books 3215 N. Anthony Blvd, Fort Wayne This is a joyful way to connect, reflect, and raise funds to support my continued work for justice, democracy, and progress in Indiana. \------ Your contributions help support my re-election campaign. **Every dollar raised ensures that we can engage voters, hire strong team members and interns, and purchase important items like stamps, digital and television ads, and voter analytics tools.**
---

name: MGP
subject: Do you have a minute?
body:
| | Peter – I wouldn’t reach out if it wasn’t important. Our re-election campaign is picking up steam and gaining attention by the day.

There’s still a long road ahead, but with attacks from the far-right and outside spending already pouring in, we must be ready to fight back now.

If you can, please pitch in here before our midnight deadline: [https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/july](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112528674/560822153/-618465495?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250731_4_13&refcode2=5732cde2-896e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzMyY2RlMi04OTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rl3AL_4IDFmbXd7iXWH0tOA2ZgqXOwOM3hzAp9Ozo9Q=)

I’ve always aimed to put Southwest Washington’s concerns front and center in Congress, and that will never change. But that’s also made me a constant target for right-wing extremists.

We have to stop them – we’ve done it once before, and I know we can do it again. I’m counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory.

Will you chip in just a few dollars to help us reach our July fundraising goal? We’re just $5,705 short.

name: Goldco
subject: 2025 crisis could financially cripple retirees
body:
If you don't understand how this works, your retirement savings may be at more risk than it needs to be.

| | |
# **Death Spiral 2025**
---
# How This Potential Debt-Crisis Could Financially Cripple Retirees
---
| | |
---
Sean Hannity here, listen up. If you don't understand how this works, your retirement savings may be at more risk than it needs to be. So here’s the big picture:** ** 2008 vaporized $2.4 trillion in retirement savings. We watched good people lose decades of work in weeks. Today the same red lights are flashing - and nobody's paying attention:
---
* 2 million+ jobs on the line...
* Stocks poised for a 25% nose-dive...
* IRAs and 401(k)s vulnerable to 25% losses, or worse.

---
You can’t stop a recession from happening.** ** But you CAN refuse to be its next victim... >>> And millions of Americans have no idea [_**this option is available.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zla2105e0nqe6oeisjo6rqmtep5or110kdf01t80_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1j61o72c9h2bs) If you’re an American citizen, this is available to you now. You don’t have to be rich to use it. And whether you got $50k or $500k in retirement savings, you can elect this option before your next tax filing date. But it may be wise to act sooner. More millionaires are taking steps to avoid a possible 2025 Death Spiral. Billionaires are taking these steps too. In fact, even central banks around the world are taking these very steps to help protect their trillions of dollars from a global crisis. So before the possible Death Spiral**** comes our way, help protect your money any way you can. This may be our best hope.
---

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: I don’t care who comes after me for saying it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please read tonight

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zekrvuqq2id7dr0hf0ilhnl4nl3up1divts19ncg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zluv4t91v61m8c1nb2riai7rqr9lbi4dvu73n620_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)

Friend, it's Anna Paulina Luna.

I don’t care who comes after me for saying it:

**No member of congress should be allowed to trade stocks while writing the laws that _move the market._**

That’s not public service — _**that’s insider trading.**_
I’m here to serve the American people. **_End of story_.**
So why should it be permissible for those in power to influence national policy and **PROFIT** from it?
Because there are those in Congress who are corrupt to the core — in it for the power, the status, and the **MONEY**.
I’ve had enough of it. How about _**YOU**_?
**I've introduced legislation to BAN Members of Congress from trading individual stocks. **
Now I’m demanding leadership to bring it to the floor for a **VOTE**.
If you believe public office is a duty — **not a get-rich-quick scheme** — then I need you with me.
Because I’m not backing down. And I sure as hell won’t be bought.

[END INSIDER TRADING IN CONGRESS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zirc0ge0iqbmdgeenfl1rm08cu2cbeqr05tanur8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)

Let’s force Congress to choose:
**Serve the people — or serve themselves.**

To those who have violated their oath of office, their oath to the American people — _**I’m coming for you.**_
The gloves are off.
Patriot, will you stand with me?

[STAND WITH ME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6iif90huo26k2gksmnh65p4v1pfv38m06grac98_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)

God bless,

**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrsvb628phflur8g484eope9sul9sm3hn1ucloko_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)
_American First. Always. ___

That’s not public service — _**that’s insider trading.**_
I’m here to serve the American people. **_End of story_.**
So why should it be permissible for those in power to influence national policy and **PROFIT** from it?
Because there are those in Congress who are corrupt to the core — in it for the power, the status, and the **MONEY**.
I’ve had enough of it. How about _**YOU**_?
**I've introduced legislation to BAN Members of Congress from trading individual stocks. **
Now I’m demanding leadership to bring it to the floor for a **VOTE**.
If you believe public office is a duty — **not a get-rich-quick scheme** — then I need you with me.
Because I’m not backing down. And I sure as hell won’t be bought.

[END INSIDER TRADING IN CONGRESS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z97lk9dem95igkuuooabkbdl10eu5trfsgdv7jd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)

Let’s force Congress to choose:
**Serve the people — or serve themselves.**

To those who have violated their oath of office, their oath to the American people — _**I’m coming for you.**_
The gloves are off.
Patriot, will you stand with me?

[STAND WITH ME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc44omjf0fikld2dgo9mpt423kfhl82ma5t72tco_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)

God bless,

**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ebane0k15s1eppdupejcjqit7rjckgdh6tthr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gmcpj6clh2bs)
_American First. Always. ___
