name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z84ei07hq883k5li1b65tkvv2pfh6fmv697n914g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfgjskptinbqtagfbfibe71js14s0o1pk0dm0n40_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztvm7m1paebp88mm9ibr9b4uqu0h53ioftf3nqs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr83re6oiv8u2aultt6nkn387g3r2im1msiqgd9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4g8othtunlk2ian20pddr27e81kak96oe0pojpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcqe6um25g4lk6u82prguq82qp30te42d09r5pi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsicjse6l08ek6ld8k362imfbaj9frr1sbqr6658_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjimmf5pg17f2lt26lb6c72p4qbeq6mgbai4be0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrrmik2efrobb495eeggbmrn5ops0dbcn60hpvoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb85ps9rk935ii1en51aiprkfjf3i36o0ar4mu80_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4salmitd9ke1m0vi62cfpj4cl0tckqkrkng3h88_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)

| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znbtosigb9nfbf0ofncmuugs3um6hsf63spv1mkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zphl7sf1bfj8du4bcqfh24f9bpbvup8h83sacpgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6udaqt229ulap009dh5090ej8kflcndah1g2f50_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm6o32clh2bs)

The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

Attorneys general from 16 states wrote a letter urging Congress to take action against abortion shield laws. / Credit: Traci L. Clever/Shutterstock CNA Staff, Jul 31, 2025 / 09:00 am (CNA). name: American Action News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Ten Paradoxes of Our Age
body:
Tech is moving fast. Don't get left behind. Get your early copy of the Stanford Emerging Tech Review now.

# The Stanford Emerging Tech Review 2025
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1avmkog5umom6ntkiio6d39d31pn1qjj9u875o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm9or6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you noticed how our world seems full of contradictions lately?
Prosperity is rising. Yet freedom, in many places, is retreating.

Global diplomacy expands. But so do threats.

Cultural traditions persist. Still, they're strained by mass migration and ideological division.
---
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcsjdpdl40acam02dhvqjcnirl475u1kuosjji6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm9or6cjh2bs)
---
| | These aren't just abstract concepts--they're reshaping the world we live in right now.

And if we don't understand them, we risk misunderstanding the forces at work and misjudging our response.

That's why the Hoover Institution is sharing a **powerful new analysis from Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson:_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_.**

In it, he outlines ten defining paradoxes of our time, including:
* Why economic growth doesn't always bring political freedom
* How diplomacy can coexist with rising global insecurity
* What happens when cultural pressures outpace integration

Whether you're concerned about America's future role in the world or seeking clarity amid global confusion, this piece offers a timely perspective.

These paradoxes are reshaping our world, and understanding them is crucial.

"If we do not understand the paradoxes of our age, we will continue to be confused by the outcomes." -- Victor Davis Hanson

**Download your free copy of '_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_ ' now and gain the insights you need to navigate our complex world.**

Access your free copy today: [https://resources.hoover.org/ten-paradoxes-of-our-age](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0k9s7o4bbl9v4hp2o620n5ugt3p9de7q9m825i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm9or6cjh2bs)Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

[Make a Gift to Hoover](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb2srjm2vuu7q8sqki749jvut8oln0k64m9ioqkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1gm9or6cjh2bs)
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA

name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: IN 1 HOUR: Reps. Khanna and McClellan on next steps
body:
Join us to learn what you can do in August
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3835712/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| _In case you missed it!
_
Today we’re partnering with Sierra Club and LCV to host a [virtual event](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3835713/87SdQ4wZ) with **Representatives Ro Khanna (CA-17) and Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)** to talk about what you can do now that the budget bill is law and Congress is on recess. |
[](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3835714/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **What:** Recess Rally: Your Guide to Advocacy This August
**When:** TODAY, August 1, 11 a.m. EST / 8 a.m. PST
**Where:**[**RSVP for the virtual event here**](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3835715/87SdQ4wZ)
**Who:**
⭐ **Rep. Ro Khanna** – Progressive champion and clean energy leader
⭐ **Rep. Jennifer McClellan** – Climate champion
⭐**Lena Moffitt** – Executive Director, Evergreen Collaborative
⭐ **Emily Gorman** – Chief Field Officer, Sierra Club
⭐ **Leah Donahey** – Senior Federal Advocacy Campaign Director
⭐ **Maisy Deans** – Senior Government Affairs Advocate, Evergreen |
---
[COUNT ME IN](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3835716/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Can’t make it live? You should still register to make sure you get our new advocacy toolkit and a full recording of the event sent straight to your inbox.x

Whether your member of Congress voted for or against this disaster, we’ll show you exactly how to engage them effectively. You’ll leave this webinar ready to make a difference this August.

⏳ **Don’t let this moment pass.**[**RSVP today!**](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3835717/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| See you there, |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Senior Director of Digital Advocacy
Evergreen Collaborative

name: The Flyover
subject: Fitness Test Returns, Potential Cancer Vaccine, and a T-Rex Race
body:
President Trump signed an order Thursday to [revive the Presidential Fitness Test](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3unDAQBfDTmM6rsYFdKCg2HxSRNk2KlMiLx8skxrbs4Y_29pGj3CDdSCM9vd_7-VgehjyF13ez48QuLgHP4pEZ8-KIA5bCWDgjHzmUFBkD06JB9xIGCWqxhvx76Ro7OUSNbYOTuvUddHrU0GyTsbYb1M061Q-mhyt2VwTTwzqoYVT61tBU02AApQCGdrxYM1o3ts6ZDkY3gOgALXHMl1-RAm_o_Dt-YL6scW_8tDGnItq70LPQ83mel72E-hN6xiCPIvRcUULPKXpiWuvJ-diTfGYKryKfZv0teUOZMhaylWi8_MeX1S8pyHQ8Pa2yrFuMvmaYLO939e3r43MQ7RxXsqL98qmOiWf5gTk1ebLpJO-pXG-ig9duyP-tzf-19cek_wQAAP__e_OWKA), once a gym-class staple, as part of a broader push to promote youth athleticism and "a culture of strength and excellence."

This forecast was largely accurate. For anyone who's ever stared blankly at a blackboard, it turns out that a little electricity could've gone a long way. Were you good at math? Or were you more of an English nerd? Countries without deals may face tariffs up to 50%. ## White House Revives Presidential Fitness Test
President Trump signed an order Thursday to [revive the Presidential Fitness Test](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3unDAQBfDTmM6rsYFdKCg2HxSRNk2KlMiLx8skxrbs4Y_29pGj3CDdSCM9vd_7-VgehjyF13ez48QuLgHP4pEZ8-KIA5bCWDgjHzmUFBkD06JB9xIGCWqxhvx76Ro7OUSNbYOTuvUddHrU0GyTsbYb1M061Q-mhyt2VwTTwzqoYVT61tBU02AApQCGdrxYM1o3ts6ZDkY3gOgALXHMl1-RAm_o_Dt-YL6scW_8tDGnItq70LPQ83mel72E-hN6xiCPIvRcUULPKXpiWuvJ-diTfGYKryKfZv0teUOZMhaylWi8_MeX1S8pyHQ8Pa2yrFuMvmaYLO939e3r43MQ7RxXsqL98qmOiWf5gTk1ebLpJO-pXG-ig9duyP-tzf-19cek_wQAAP__e_OWKA), once a gym-class staple, as part of a broader push to promote youth athleticism and “a culture of strength and excellence.” The test, phased out under the Obama administration, will return alongside a reestablished President’s Council on Sports, Fitness, and Nutrition, now led by Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. The test includes a one-mile run, pull-ups, and a sit-and-reach flexibility test.

Critics recall it as a [source of stress for kids](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQBuCngY3obAy2Bw9dsqVrR2TwOVxlMLIvifL2FVXfoNudTjr93_91m26eEu33T7-h45inHV81ITOWKRLvWCtj5YL8KHs9MuPONEmQQwemAzEFT-k9qTa4iCixb9EJPShQ0kpoVzeM2Juo7NDH2VgY5qBB4az1IgUYa1ty5zcwIASA6e0leBui7WP0Cmw00CjAQJzL5TvTzivG9M5PLJclb21yK_NRm_6jkddGXv1xAs7TuRSmJWEjr1we29EdBSuFU-BT96frTl5XlzXntKyUQsG9EwjzOOoQ1aijPgexBNEbg17aKJa2uHC8KCWqo24U3DdP6TcP_6vEp5M_AQAA__9ux4dk), but supporters say it’s a throwback to national standards of strength and discipline first set by President Eisenhower in 1956.
## Universal Cancer Vaccine Shows Early Promise
Researchers at the University of Florida have developed an [mRNA-based "off-the-shelf" cancer vaccine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO3DAQRE8jZRyQ1D9g4ETZOnUo9JLdozYockC2JOztjR3DJ3BUQKHwUHi_PrYP4Mjp-RMOdEJ5S3jXiCJYNmJJWKtglYJyllRfWTAJb1bbQelZabMF4Pi19W1whGixa9GZaeh1bxer293BNA20II2fdjIB-0CGxsFPOI7GdINp2X3T9KyN0XrulkeAJdDSEUGvF5p102sMLLk8fmdOsiPFr3xhefh8tNHtIq_adD8auzZ2ve_7EfnC6hmTx-9NY9cdIcre2NVD8lgau56JLywVovpbqQu854RqRwicnkqy2s8DkpLCEKvy-YxBfaI6K9IZFeWiIL7zqCqT-ofuLgbKZ4G2uPC6OUau49T0-nkAx_dp-S_Tl7N_AgAA___TYpeY) that could one day work across many tumor types without the long wait for a personalized treatment. In mice, the vaccine [supercharged the body's innate immune system](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI6GMQQoXGxD97bdEjn2OMzKsSN7Hih_v2J_4fVX995z_nxtX44T5-dv9yIrsWyZzpZIhOoWWTK1JtSkknzX3N5FKAtvCDhqmDX0W3CcPtvQBRuJkExHtp_GAQZcELrdRvOA-xzCgyiEafDTPfg4GsQRlrkfTcf2aoMZ-h5gNsstuCXExcToBljiDGoACiyl3v4WzrJTTJ9yUL358uqS3UXeTZlfCleF63meNyyeXG4HP-jKKFyvBYUrTApX0ytcm-cLpEnTrpJu7sP5qU8nfteyc9Pt7TzpWKp2-jvzQbW5pL3Lnqo-nPecSeHaVRveJ6fE7T6pAZ4vx-n_MfmRzcPivwAAAP__IcqKsw) by boosting type-I interferons, key molecules that help detect and destroy cancer cells. It also enhanced the effects of immune checkpoint inhibitors, slowing or stopping tumor growth in aggressive cancers like melanoma, glioma, and osteosarcoma. Now, in early human trials, scientists hope the vaccine could offer a faster, more flexible tool in the fight against cancer, especially for hard-to-treat "cold" tumors that often evade current therapies.

clean_body: President Trump signed an order Thursday to , once a gym-class staple, as part of a broader push to promote youth athleticism and "a culture of strength and excellence." | | | | | | Friday, August 1, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1861, British naval officer Robert FitzRoy published the in The Times , predicting 62 degrees and clear skies in London. This forecast was largely accurate. As we report today in Science , a gentle zap to the brain's prefrontal cortex might help adults . For anyone who's ever stared blankly at a blackboard, it turns out that a little electricity could've gone a long way. Were you good at math? Or were you more of an English nerd? Reply to this email to let us know. Today's sponsor is , the prebiotic you take before drinking alcohol to help keep you feeling great. | U.S. Tariffs Kick In as Aug. 1 Deadline Arrives President Trump is on dozens of countries starting at 12:01 a.m. today, Trump's Aug. 1 tariff deadline. , and preliminary trade deals have been announced with partners like the United Kingdom, Japan, and the European Union, which could shield them from higher tariffs. Canada faces a unless a last-minute trade deal is reached, a prospect Trump said was complicated by Prime Minister Mark Carney's support of Palestinian statehood. Countries without deals may face tariffs up to 50%. See a and where they stand on tariff deals. White House Revives Presidential Fitness Test President Trump signed an order Thursday to , once a gym-class staple, as part of a broader push to promote youth athleticism and “a culture of strength and excellence.” The test, phased out under the Obama administration, will return alongside a reestablished President’s Council on Sports, Fitness, and Nutrition, now led by Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. The test includes a one-mile run, pull-ups, and a sit-and-reach flexibility test. Critics recall it as a , but supporters say it’s a throwback to national standards of strength and discipline first set by President Eisenhower in 1956. Universal Cancer Vaccine Shows Early Promise Researchers at the University of Florida have developed an that could one day work across many tumor types without the long wait for a personalized treatment. In mice, the vaccine by boosting type-I interferons, key molecules that help detect and destroy cancer cells. It also enhanced the effects of immune checkpoint inhibitors, slowing or stopping tumor growth in aggressive cancers like melanoma, glioma, and osteosarcoma. Now, in early human trials, scientists hope the vaccine could offer a faster, more flexible tool in the fight against cancer, especially for hard-to-treat "cold" tumors that often evade current therapies. | | | I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see {FIRSTNAME}:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Codename: DarkForce](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1890602/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsTWxyU0dZcQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmFmZl9zdWI9V2Fycm9vbSZhZmZfc3ViMj1NRyZmaWxlX2lkPTEzNw/gaIyWNw/sev22168662)**

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1890602/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsTWxyU0dZcQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmFmZl9zdWI9V2Fycm9vbSZhZmZfc3ViMj1NRyZmaWxlX2lkPTEzNw/gaIyWNw/sev22168662)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 90% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your DarkForce Binoculars before I run out](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1890602/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsTWxyU0dZcQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmFmZl9zdWI9V2Fycm9vbSZhZmZfc3ViMj1NRyZmaWxlX2lkPTEzNw/gaIyWNw/sev22168662)

P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

body:
Please read tonight

| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MtuXrMJRmDXvipwfiUJ7bw~~/AARclBA~/705ZckUI6jVIIFyfBLGcHSFvS94u1oNaWzSQfR-hPIojKzs6aN7ZSOYNUJ62_cVC_x3YxXu4PbvSZzTfchVp3MhxjSHDnFZ7VbS6VWx3M3Bx0tSTNVY0qnizfM3ypbd5iTwQV0jtyMBkEbkWm4nzw5d4FHtz-VHE_-HNUzFP5eHCuQJ-fkZipXPz-PElNnyFK3joazaeLVh1OGNU0C2T4En39zVCSI2E2RTqHGf0jp2_ld8ojCJpSw6lA8-2rbVRvRLV64RDuj1clKWcxCo8eqTtXIXIRAtpYwvdwg2hXBNxTnaNsXpGLM-mn8Bt9uOp2ipp616D4FUSS-fT_Ryg4I9DcJT-z7aH4ILbLfqUQiRb2kfUs_yh6yiKYJPvoG5S)
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MtuXrMJRmDXvipwfiUJ7bw~~/AARclBA~/705ZckUI6jVIIFyfBLGcHSFvS94u1oNaWzSQfR-hPIojKzs6aN7ZSOYNUJ62_cVC_x3YxXu4PbvSZzTfchVp3MhxjSHDnFZ7VbS6VWx3M3Bx0tSTNVY0qnizfM3ypbd5iTwQV0jtyMBkEbkWm4nzw5d4FHtz-VHE_-HNUzFP5eHCuQJ-fkZipXPz-PElNnyFK3joazaeLVh1OGNU0C2T4En39zVCSI2E2RTqHGf0jp2_ld8ojCJpSw6lA8-2rbVRvRLV64RDuj1clKWcxCo8eqTtXIXIRAtpYwvdwg2hXBNxTnaNsXpGLM-mn8Bt9uOp2ipp616D4FUSS-fT_Ryg4I9DcJT-z7aH4ILbLfqUQiRb2kfUs_yh6yiKYJPvoG5S)

Friend, it's Anna Paulina Luna.

I don't care who comes after me for saying it:

**No member of congress should be allowed to trade stocks while writing the laws that _move the market._**

That's not public service -- _**that 's insider trading.**_
I'm here to serve the American people. **_End of story_.**
So why should it be permissible for those in power to influence national policy and **PROFIT** from it?
Because there are those in Congress who are corrupt to the core -- in it for the power, the status, and the **MONEY**.
I've had enough of it. How about _**YOU**_? **I've introduced legislation to BAN Members of Congress from trading individual stocks. ** Now I'm demanding leadership to bring it to the floor for a **VOTE**. If you believe public office is a duty -- **not a get-rich-quick scheme** -- then I need you with me. Because I'm not backing down. And I sure as hell won't be bought.
[END INSIDER TRADING IN CONGRESS](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MtuXrMJRmDXvipwfiUJ7bw~~/AARclBA~/705ZckUI6jVIIFyfBLGcHSFvS94u1oNaWzSQfR-hPIojKzs6aN7ZSOYNUJ62_cVC_x3YxXu4PbvSZzTfchVp3MhxjSHDnFZ7VbS6VWx3M3Bx0tSTNVY0qnizfM3ypbd5iTwQV0jtyMBkEbkWm4nzw5d4FHtz-VHE_-HNUzFP5eHCuQJ-fkZipXPz-PElNnyFK3joazaeLVh1OGNU0C2T4En39zVCSI2E2RTqHGf0jp2_ld8ojCJpSw6lA8-2rbVRvRLV64RDuj1clKWcxCo8eqTtXIXIRAtpYwvdwg2hXBNxTnaNsXpGLM-mn8Bt9uOp2ipp616D4FUSS-fT_Ryg4I9DcJT-z7aH4ILbLfqUQiRb2kfUs_yh6yiKYJPvoG5S)

Let's force Congress to choose: **Serve the people -- or serve themselves.**

To those who have violated their oath of office, their oath to the American people -- _**I 'm coming for you.**_
The gloves are off.
Patriot, will you stand with me?
[STAND WITH ME](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MtuXrMJRmDXvipwfiUJ7bw~~/AARclBA~/705ZckUI6jVIIFyfBLGcHSFvS94u1oNaWzSQfR-hPIojKzs6aN7ZSOYNUJ62_cVC_x3YxXu4PbvSZzTfchVp3MhxjSHDnFZ7VbS6VWx3M3Bx0tSTNVY0qnizfM3ypbd5iTwQV0jtyMBkEbkWm4nzw5d4FHtz-VHE_-HNUzFP5eHCuQJ-fkZipXPz-PElNnyFK3joazaeLVh1OGNU0C2T4En39zVCSI2E2RTqHGf0jp2_ld8ojCJpSw6lA8-2rbVRvRLV64RDuj1clKWcxCo8eqTtXIXIRAtpYwvdwg2hXBNxTnaNsXpGLM-mn8Bt9uOp2ipp616D4FUSS-fT_Ryg4I9DcJT-z7aH4ILbLfqUQiRb2kfUs_yh6yiKYJPvoG5S)

God bless,

**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MtuXrMJRmDXvipwfiUJ7bw~~/AARclBA~/705ZckUI6jVIIFyfBLGcHSFvS94u1oNaWzSQfR-hPIojKzs6aN7ZSOYNUJ62_cVC_x3YxXu4PbvSZzTfchVp3MhxjSHDnFZ7VbS6VWx3M3Bx0tSTNVY0qnizfM3ypbd5iTwQV0jtyMBkEbkWm4nzw5d4FHtz-VHE_-HNUzFP5eHCuQJ-fkZipXPz-PElNnyFK3joazaeLVh1OGNU0C2T4En39zVCSI2E2RTqHGf0jp2_ld8ojCJpSw6lA8-2rbVRvRLV64RDuj1clKWcxCo8eqTtXIXIRAtpYwvdwg2hXBNxTnaNsXpGLM-mn8Bt9uOp2ipp616D4FUSS-fT_Ryg4I9DcJT-z7aH4ILbLfqUQiRb2kfUs_yh6yiKYJPvoG5S)
_American First. Always. _
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MtuXrMJRmDXvipwfiUJ7bw~~/AARclBA~/705ZckUI6jVIIFyfBLGcHSFvS94u1oNaWzSQfR-hPIojKzs6aN7ZSOYNUJ62_cVC_x3YxXu4PbvSZzTfchVp3MhxjSHDnFZ7VbS6VWx3M3Bx0tSTNVY0qnizfM3ypbd5iTwQV0jtyMBkEbkWm4nzw5d4FHtz-VHE_-HNUzFP5eHCuQJ-fkZipXPz-PElNnyFK3joazaeLVh1OGNU0C2T4En39zVCSI2E2RTqHGf0jp2_ld8ojCJpSw6lA8-2rbVRvRLV64RDuj1clKWcxCo8eqTtXIXIRAtpYwvdwg2hXBNxTnaNsXpGLM-mn8Bt9uOp2ipp616D4FUSS-fT_Ryg4I9DcJT-z7aH4ILbLfqUQiRb2kfUs_yh6yiKYJPvoG5S)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: A Tense Hearing, a Fishing Tournament, and Octopus Grabs Boy
body:
Lawmakers visited Kerrville yesterday to hear from local officials and residents about last month’s devastating flash flood that killed at least 108 people along the Guadalupe River. Hundreds of people attended the hearing, which started at 9:30 a.m. and lasted well into the evening.

# Friday, August 1, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1861, John Robert Baylor [declared himself governor](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SgyAUxfGnwU7ngqBJQbGNXbbd0uHjKswQyMDdGN9-J3mFrf7V-RXn57beTEwx79_mjppeW1kzHi0hEdbVEOaGAU2NeTdbbCHmncpvXQUI1cOlB756E9O5ys5rC_7KO9R8VhLkxLnqgp6VldaPavbOOusQuEU0zotp9E7Ntov6jcEFOOfAFQwA83WaNnDOTdt4kUwC-kilDhSQ8GXals7yxDq4cu-SDkSPxsYvJhYmluM4BmrBlJxixqHUnYnls-q9OXt7vsPEgpnqu0Lyrmr_OGJKsU0zk7DfTUwfnP53yVOLvwAAAP__niN2nw) of the Confederate Territory of Arizona in what is now Mesilla, New Mexico. Days earlier, he had secured the surrender of federal troops garrisoned at Fort Fillmore as commander of the Second Texas Mounted Rifles. A recent U-Haul report shows that most new residents of the state's largest metro areas are from one state. Check out today's _Roundup_ section for the [details](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU9jOqKxAQOFi23osu2WyGuPYSSDI3tIwu1X5ArbP72v_37u891SpH35thsafoc07_gqEZkxz5ZxL7iizbQvNlBZaV84HXlWoLoahhrk7C3Fc24rb37Bj7JCI_uuhVZL2VWrCaMLzYhKeXABVBvGEZxDr32jcQiqInPJYAApJcgObgD9qHUA55wOzdCKFtATp3zjFRnftoR4pifmm0tbFc3K_Cii-RJqEmrazmO1Ryyc8nkBQk2XX6gJeqEmqYWajvpC6s-JjfyJNtcbLdkypb3mjLsvQk1VNv7xohip6F60sGyW4meU_5fqadRfAAAA__9Sm3yE). ## Kerr County Hearing Gets Tense
Lawmakers visited Kerrville yesterday to [hear from local officials and residents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupCAYRp8GO8wPAmpBsY3dbLulYfFHySIYYMbx7TfOvW9w-y8n5zt_HvPD-ODj-tvsqOvbpTniWQLWink2FWPBDU32cTXOl83HtaZnnjlwSWGgwObF-HDNoln0X1hG1qBmvRQgFGOy2fQ4ArPOCcOUUXKwRrluFNyOEuUy9l3j9Q2DARhjwCS0AP2olANrrXLdIIgAXHxNua0bVnyb4sKVXphbm_Ym6K3Wo5DuF-ET4dN5nu1-FRNNrCn6dI8In-5XhE-bD4Ha9Iw1X4RPJldvAxI-fbjUhZSWQv9hzl-ri2YsR4oF6XcGym89GGR7bEeT9XKcPgRfVE8ErLvx4aNVfxbzpfn_AAAA___--or5) about last month’s devastating flash flood that killed at least 108 people along the Guadalupe River. Hundreds attended the hearing, which lasted well into the evening. Kerr County Sheriff Larry Leitha [acknowledged he was asleep](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L0OnDAQBOCngc5obcxf4SIN3aVNiQxeYHOLfbJ9cLx9dGnyAKlH-jQzvx7TwxKT337aA03-rGHyeCXGnDFONqNPuKON5De7UtrJbzm846RANQJ6AXJylviedOnMDG6QJRrZNRp0K2VT7qZRdS-HplFyXmQHbV9DJ3FGN6-z0_NQkvli0IOUEmQDFUA3tO0Ky7K0a93rQgM6yiFWeceMH5tWvsOJsVrCUbLZc36lov5RqLFQ43Vd1fNj_Tcs1Eje4Qu9Q7-gcPYWK4fgUqFGphPFzGETbK_DPjEm8Z0qMqZMR_C3IC-eGONJzCiCFw6t41v8fvMt9D-pjMa9LmKm1HaFhu2wxH_L5f-79DTqTwAAAP__a_KN3g) before he learned a disaster was unfolding the morning of Friday, July 4. William “Dub” Thomas, Kerr County's emergency management coordinator, testified he was also asleep. The day before, he had missed two calls with the Texas Division of Emergency Management because he was out sick. Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly was out of town at Lake Travis. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick expressed his frustration about their initial absence. "_Everyone was here that day working their ass off, and you were nowhere to be found_ ," [he said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMuuozAQRL_G7Dpqm0eSBYtsGGmkO9tZIuNuwPcaO_IjhL8fkV-YXUklHdWpv1_jl7bO-uWP3rjP7zmMnvfkOGeOo87sE6-so_WLnm1arV9yKHFUqFrAG6AcSVt3jE1F_YR0lxX38to22HRSttXad4hYX8kQ3euWarzVtWzru5qnCWnWVNn-hOENpZQoW7wgXu9dN6MxppvrWyMaZLI5xEteOfNbp9kd4cXxYsJWuX7N-ZlE_RBqEGrY9_2yJX92Qg3soSShhlNKqOGTSXt46hyt-YHk9Jbgh2MEE4rPB3wXWhhOPOgpsTcMVE5_-C7ugAZmFwIlOEKBtIbiCFb9YpiYPawcWahBR3g85O9f3dtUsafnbp2zqbuKBpdNW_cZnv_v7lev_gUAAP__rGqWiA). In other testimony, first responders shared they could not effectively communicate with each other because they [use different radio systems](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTSW1I_1ChVp2L20KYU1uZSIrESDXFvW7QPlCq8eYGa-78_3_I2J0778xo0m-cQ873RUJhEqMwrtlVbCkvYFY6pr2hfJrzJbsL2GUYOZAyY-564J0wPCl2loMve-g24wpm_WyVLE-EA_wGjHFjvj0YxD2yO05E3fNWm6ymAEYwyYHm4A969hiOC9H2I7dqoDCklyuclKQh-skc_8pnLzeWt4WkWeVbW_lHXKuuM4bn8ryhUq6y4aZR1nj6ysu6aUdXBX1rVGWbcmZu3za5dy6sg5h6rp88yVgi4YUtb1rEKbjpj4VahqpiVVRsml6oqnRl0zvyTlXW946j2LfpDGGHMJ-GBS1jVlCs8jMac63FUHy4aJ_7-Xnzl_T_ZfAAAA___4tpfs). Several officials and residents discussed the urgency of installing flood warning sirens.
## Abbott Agenda Items Pass Senate
On Wednesday, senators gave initial approval to measures to prohibit local governments from hiring lobbyists ([Senate Bill 12](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3O4yAUheHV4C7WBQzYBcVEkTVFMk2KKS2Mr-2rIcYC8rf7UbKFr390jvT-vQwXR4G25Y-7oS2vOQ4bPnPAUjANruCWcUWXaFvcTHmlbSnxngYBQh2gPQAfJkfhPTTVZEeYOl6h5UY10GjOVbVaHDunxCgbbzga6dWIajZemEkL00lXkf2MQQucc-AKagDTaT2D917Psm1YAzhRiakuKxZ8uTyHd3xgqn28VcGupeyZyV9M9Ez03u1UYqi_sF7ig4n-SCGcY_x335nof1MuMb1rl_cXk_0ZlyvmzOSp7TgT-mOZPF2PXFTJTvuTQqCsDWtguTkK39Pys1QPK_4HAAD__4ZTfLY)), authorize the attorney general to prosecute election crimes ([Senate Bill 11](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvOozAQxfGnMV3QjDG3wsVGEdoi2SbFlsiYMYzWwch2bm-_Sl7h6386R_r_vYwXw5635Y-5kc4vF8aNnslTzhRHk2lLtJKJvC3GcVp5W3K4x1GCrA_QHQDH2bB_j6qY9QRzjwVpbGsFqkGsi1WbFidsocfOSqUmtBU61dleTVTZBlzB-jMGHSAiYA0lQNs3jQNrbeOqTgkFNHMOscwrZXqZ5Pw7PCiWNtwKr9ec9ySqX0IOQg7W7JyDL7-wXMJDyOHI3p9D-HffhRx-c8ohvkuT9peohjMtV0pJVKeuRyGbjxXV6XpELKKe9yd7z6lphYLlZth_T_PPUj20_B8AAP__CPx8RA)), and ban THC-infused hemp products ([Senate Bill 5](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvOozAQxfGnMV3Q-IKBwsVGEdoi2SbFlmiAAUbrYGQ7t7dfJa_w9T-dI_3_XvoLsudt-YM3cvk1h36jZ_KUM8UeM22JVsLI24Izp5W3JYd77BWo6gDNAWQ_Ift3b4rJDTC1siAn68qAsVJWxeqwbTTWxo6D1bNqWzWoQUuEepIGB1kX7D5j0ICUEmQFJUDdWjvDOI521o0RBmjiHGKZV8r0wjT7d3hQLMdwK7xbc96T0L-E6oTqRtw5B19-YbmEh1Ddkb0_h_DvvgvV_eaUQ3yXmPaX0N2ZliulJPSpaaVQ9mOFPl2PVRHdtD_Ze062FgaWG7L_fuaflXo49T8AAP__oth8Fw)). State Sen. Mayes Middleton (R-Galveston) has filed legislation to ban the practice of "taxpayer-funded lobbying" several times in previous sessions, but it's repeatedly [met opposition in the House](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngQ60NouBwsU1dLn2SrSYNVgykLM3IXn7X8kr_P03M9L8u003CjEc61_a2crLn9PBV44swmki4SPzxpTCsZIPeQvHKucjTRp0W0FfgZoWCvE9YbnYGZZBlWxV1yKgUaotN0t6nh2iHvQAM88zDZ0yrW88olcw9GWwnzLoQSkFqoUaoBuM8eCcM77psUDgJciZatlY-EXZx_f55FS7cy-j3UTuuWj-FHos9Hhd18c5PoRT_v-gxB9X6PEbLfRISYKLPLVLszSdN5UhGCrsyVWkNVbKzQYbQqAW6032WCa73K8QY8imKxDWnUL8jsvvLnta_RMAAP__7Y9-iA). Senate Bill 11 aims to restore the attorney general's authority to [prosecute election crimes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGy4yAMQE-DOzKCEBMXFNu4-9tu6SFYGM0SyIAS_9x-x5nZE_xaT3rz9Odr-fKUqWy__R0df8e6FNx7RmZsi2csHRP6RmXzkXqisnF9tkWDvki4SlDL6im_FzOs7gbrpAZ0yl4MmFGpy5DcqrS9TXGczE2PfgoW9dVC1FZhtGEyA7njGFxBKQXqAicAO41jhBDCGM9XIwzgSlzbiRMyfvse87u-sJ1CvQ_ZJeZHF-dfQs9Cz_u-n0Km8Fen-uxcy0EJPR9ZQs-ffaHnwyn0DFbo-az-D2TH4hllLQGl3zwVyY2wS65yoxdKTig9c20F33LDgs1n6Z-caiN-H9ij1Y7hySgxY2CqRYZGdzykQ3PrY6ecqY9WGNjunvKngn_2-5fT_wIAAP__uSCa8w) if a local district attorney declines to do so, a prerogative that was stripped by a state appeals court in 2021. Senate Bill 5 is similar to legislation that Gov. Abbott vetoed in June, when he called for a special session to regulate consumable THC products. "_Regulation is decriminalization, whether you admit it or not_ ," [said the measure's author](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2OnTAUhJ8GOl_ZxhgoKNLQbdqUyD_HcBRfG9kH2H37iC3yAtuNZqRP-jR_PtYPgxHT9tu8YabPkNcEd41ABGU1BKnCDqZg2kzAumPaKJ9llVz2jI-Mi9UbjF-rav1suZ9EC7MYesWVFqJv99kHMw6T9IPolHRed05NcpCT5iqI3o4tzg-Mj1wIwUXPX5wPk9aBO-d06EbVKA4eKZcX7UDwaWqIX_mC8nL53cZ5Jzpq0_1q5NLI5b7v19_rhGds5GIKoYvQyOXxauRy5IiE7onfLBZhwxoNnQX-dxWSIWCYkNBEZo6j5MtEZjFGZk1iLqd6vo2NwGh37CjZn44eqNQT63WvRgua6UkJpmTo2Gi1Zl0HIwRrhZe-LbM_bowRqx4axbe3wfhtRD_74ZrlvwAAAP__e_Kciw), State Sen. Charles Perry (R-Lubbock).
## Floridians Moving to Texas
A lot of Floridians are moving to the largest metro areas in Texas, according to a [recent U-Haul report](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU9jOqKxAQOFi23osu2WyGuPYSSDI3tIwu1X5ArbP72v_37u891SpH35thsafoc07_gqEZkxz5ZxL7iizbQvNlBZaV84HXlWoLoahhrk7C3Fc24rb37Bj7JCI_uuhVZL2VWrCaMLzYhKeXABVBvGEZxDr32jcQiqInPJYAApJcgObgD9qHUA55wOzdCKFtATp3zjFRnftoR4pifmm0tbFc3K_Cii-RJqEmrazmO1Ryyc8nkBQk2XX6gJeqEmqYWajvpC6s-JjfyJNtcbLdkypb3mjLsvQk1VNv7xohip6F60sGyW4meU_5fqadRfAAAA__9Sm3yE) showing the origins of customers who get one-way rentals for travel to the country's 35 largest metro areas. Florida is the [most common origin state](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOqOxYwwpXGyT7m27JRpgDCMZG9nzwsvfrxLtH2x3i6tzr86fr-kLOXLafuNBXn5CnhJdNZIIlQmFUqWdsHDaMHDdOW2Sv8tkwPQKRgV6WpHja7Lt6mdY77olr4fegnVa9-3unZvvNoyAwSzjqu06z9qhDaN1N63JtuzfMBhBaw26hw5guDsXYFkWF26jbSzQypJLJzsJ_WAN8ZWfVLolH230u8hZm9uvxjwa87iuqzteFRMmyYnzu9SYRyGMVAWFGvPAIrzEd1owcsglMaaqjvzktCnJCr-rcFIVk_qHUZ9hZWC46_42dOd-tsWv58UxcnVDY2E7kOPnk_yfyac3fwMAAP__pcWKMw) for people moving to San Antonio, and it's the second-most common origin state for new Dallas, Houston, and Austin residents. Hundreds attended the hearing, which lasted well into the evening. Kerr County Sheriff Larry Leitha before he learned a disaster was unfolding the morning of Friday, July 4. William “Dub” Thomas, Kerr County's emergency management coordinator, testified he was also asleep. The day before, he had missed two calls with the Texas Division of Emergency Management because he was out sick. Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly was out of town at Lake Travis. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick expressed his frustration about their initial absence. "Everyone was here that day working their ass off, and you were nowhere to be found ," . In other testimony, first responders shared they could not effectively communicate with each other because they . Several officials and residents discussed the urgency of installing flood warning sirens. Abbott Agenda Items Pass Senate On Wednesday, senators gave initial approval to measures to prohibit local governments from hiring lobbyists (), authorize the attorney general to prosecute election crimes (), and ban THC-infused hemp products (). State Sen. Mayes Middleton (R-Galveston) has filed legislation to ban the practice of "taxpayer-funded lobbying" several times in previous sessions, but it's repeatedly . Senate Bill 11 aims to restore the attorney general's authority to if a local district attorney declines to do so, a prerogative that was stripped by a state appeals court in 2021. Senate Bill 5 is similar to legislation that Gov. Abbott vetoed in June, when he called for a special session to regulate consumable THC products. "Regulation is decriminalization, whether you admit it or not ," , State Sen. Charles Perry (R-Lubbock). Floridians Moving to Texas A lot of Floridians are moving to the largest metro areas in Texas, according to a showing the origins of customers who get one-way rentals for travel to the country's 35 largest metro areas. body:
We are making massive gains

| | | | |
---
Dear fellow patriot,
It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map.
Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there.
**_But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes._**
Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. To keep registering new Republicans for New Jersey’s 2025 gubernatorial race and Pennsylvania’s 2026 elections,**_[we need your help to fund our staff](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aUJV/?__vbtrk=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**Can you sponsor a voter registration staffer today?**
Just $15 covers an hour of their work - knocking doors, signing up truckers, veterans, and hunters to secure a red wave. Every new voter we register is a step toward flipping these states for good.

[SPONSOR A VOTER REGISTRATION STAFFER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aUJV/?__vbtrk=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We’re not just talking about change - we’re making it happen.
In Pennsylvania, we flipped Bucks County from a 15,000-voter Democratic lead to a 2,000-voter Republican edge.
In New Jersey, we’ve added 145,611 new GOP voters since 2021.
Friend, your support keeps this momentum alive.
Let’s make Pennsylvania the next Ohio and turn New Jersey purple in 2025. **_[If we have enough staffers, and sponsors, we can change the electorate for a generation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aUJV/?__vbtrk=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

I’d be honored to have your support,

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aUJV/?__vbtrk=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA3ODgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te40fb200-99be-435d-9e54-2aea78122032/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: We need our leaders to fight back in any way they can — and that’s what JB Pritzker is doing in Illinois. | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | Peter, our right to affordable healthcare is under MAJOR THREAT from the Trump Administration — especially now that our MAGA Congress has GUTTED Medicaid! Millions of people are at risk of losing their ability to afford lifesaving medical treatments. We need our leaders to fight back in any way they can — and that’s what JB Pritzker is doing in Illinois. Gov. Pritzker signed bills that will improve healthcare access and lower the price of prescription drugs for Illinoisans!! This is a huge benefit for so many people who can now get the care they need without worrying about how they’ll pay for it. [We want to thank Gov. Pritzker for fighting back against attacks on our healthcare and for standing up to the Trump Administration! Will you be one of the [3,000] people we need to add their names to our thank you card by 11:59 PM?]() | | | Thank you, Blue Amp Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Rep. Haley Stevens
subject: Reminder: Join Us in Grand Rapids for a Meet and Greet on August 2nd!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
You are Invited!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/1437?t=2&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)
---
| | null,

I’m excited to invite you to a Meet and Greet in**Grand Rapids on Saturday, August 2nd at 11:00 AM** , hosted by my dear friends Sheryl Wragg & Cliff Hodge and Mary & Chuck Luttenton. As I campaign for the U.S. Senate, I’m focused on delivering what matters most to Michigan families—good-paying jobs, protecting Medicare and Medicaid, and standing up for working people across our state. This race will be one of the most competitive in the country, and I’m counting on supporters like you to help us win it. This event will be a chance to connect, talk about the road ahead, and build the momentum we need to keep this critical Senate seat.
---
---
I’d be honored to have you with us. Your support is powerful—and it means the world to me. To RSVP please click the button below, or email edy@haleyformi.com. In order to receive the address you must RSVP. While donations are not required to attend, they are greatly appreciated. To donate, please click the donation button below. With appreciation,
Haley
---
[ CLICK HERE TO RSVP ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4061?t=3&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)
---
[ CLICK HERE TO DONATE ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3790?t=5&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)
---
| | |
---
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. **[If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/1437?t=7&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)**
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/1437?t=8&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign. Thank you,Haley This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=423%2E49239%2EC0c1C4)
---
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Pat
subject: Time's running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
every dollar donated helps.

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d7a7a3291aee43cb8743b002b7e11dd3&_e=9WQHDpkwhOGWOipTSeheUL7kFW5EDJx6g3gw9RNrgf4U12kDKsIZgU2bchOC5cvSNslRJSxPr_nlwqWnrrp_oiV3WO_DEQ96_-sHYkRykGv4tB5sr4RBzylEqFsFS1Y0bOXwVWS0N0UezIuK8ZU2UQxj-voPv2dJBmeNUPGCwOKL2j9xoA8oFJDep1KgFeqY20jPpdVIzOjWIGFQci6L38Gv2nAAGQJCxyZnYN5pa8OYgAcuqnM-z1DbTBO43Bl6Iz8LGbaKIW-mqA566fx7NcQPAIuOqdWWWq80EggXGoRT4EsUS-4-tQ6IEBElwmzs6mt3t6p40u5xsJFE9wMRyrBdASbbNUFYhLnv-ueEdgSOSJA3VEgnCHfhTmlcNKHYRQXNKPnx_zxhM3pw5WUvJIz2h3L4BcBi1cHDS1tvIa_guJPOwoTW6Vi4yIrsGOtcXbKdFdvvsFcl1iD200GfBgJc1x7lBO0AlHDR3SgRbQUpSodAkALz1asitd8jbfy6DQiBJHlVU6kB6myz27LHghuijM_AToo15t6Ty9Lz9FyrHhWOIbSGDTyvbRLY1bYs)
---
Friend,

**I hate this part.**

I've told you about my career in public service, raising two young daughters with my wife, and running a small business near our home in North Carolina.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d7a7a3291aee43cb8743b002b7e11dd3&_e=9WQHDpkwhOGWOipTSeheUL7kFW5EDJx6g3gw9RNrgf4U12kDKsIZgU2bchOC5cvSNslRJSxPr_nlwqWnrrp_oiV3WO_DEQ96_-sHYkRykGv4tB5sr4RBzylEqFsFS1Y0bOXwVWS0N0UezIuK8ZU2UUxI_uD6o21l0GaRGM7n6rGe2kOI_y4BLRq1dIElq5DHHhfVY3SvxUiz8lFmoTxFhF5y0EkjVgVRxk9f9FdZQB1d0TD2qRkWBIDwF8RUqhakZoSNeXIF-IVe2yKEzOh60rjRFR6oSxcaZOtOSAnFA8v-6rkmnTBk7tINAH3IeAzZqdmMUB4lcoHJh8-P90rvRYQSazdBFGS4y_UL9xGhL2WUbgQKPgZqq1d4RlLq8CrYQw35VSJr83xNqgqrIcpe78c-II5PknkGGmCjt7HDbFj_0xc8YlYNo5e9JAqoaQNsx39TGV_wVkWIJeseOrdqLrnnQI16Gd6HqnjCXewzuBbffC7RClwwikbbzR4vGPLD6gT3AGlmOZqofSnBul6C7Y6Hv92EmKIf7yW92a_S7dY%3D)
I could talk to you all day about faith, family, and freedom, and even firearms, but I HATE talking to you about finances.

**There, I said it -_campaign finances_ , to be exact. **

Running for Congress to serve you, protect families like mine, and make our nation great again is truly such an honor. After serving in Afghanistan I could tell you a million times over how precious our freedom is, but the hard truth is that without a solid foundation of campaign finances, authentic candidates who want to Save America get nowhere.

Our campaign, and I can't tell you how much I HATE to say this, **missed our End-of-Month deadline.** Deep-pocketed liberals are working hard to target every single conservative candidate in the country and we NEED to push back. We can't afford to lose a single seat. **So I 'm coming to you with one honest ask.**

**[I need your help. Can I count on you to chip in a few bucks?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d7a7a3291aee43cb8743b002b7e11dd3&_e=9WQHDpkwhOGWOipTSeheUL7kFW5EDJx6g3gw9RNrgf4U12kDKsIZgU2bchOC5cvSNslRJSxPr_nlwqWnrrp_oiV3WO_DEQ96_-sHYkRykGv4tB5sr4RBzylEqFsFS1Y0bOXwVWS0N0UezIuK8ZU2UQxj-voPv2dJBmeNUPGCwOKL2j9xoA8oFJDep1KgFeqYkVKjdnE0j91ThxdDSw7YJiEQQiaAvhxa45-M3uig_WiD34bMkr23W5sDXTLnn4OUSi3tlLIHRaqah2l4DRkFmD6kjxgDIC0PLWZAqu5dKf-IR2LbTuBz-TF1Qx9of7JeJzEiki4xf7e6wEUDRJJon9yrOYqkJ3JoYg2yC8i-YyHOpjbxph8Ri3U2f7KYfxNnD0T9ok6M-DZqzv4hdi8XD72a78au2hL7ACZwAINTGuUYSd4umt2YZxMC3YIw-dxdaq--MNxGjI3OoYcZnfRs1LTgtGQ4i1ZDYtkJGGVYTvB5GtGuXIsMJFh2VG8OZ2m--f9ZpEsRzEDW-_QZZvC6i--zXjVJCBDN33TRnBf7VyrCxeLso115Mf_pmaJccy0w)**

It really would make a huge difference to the future of this campaign. We were able to secure a two-hour extension, so this is our one shot to make up lost ground and hit our goal.

**[Please consider supporting our campaign today!](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d7a7a3291aee43cb8743b002b7e11dd3&_e=9WQHDpkwhOGWOipTSeheUL7kFW5EDJx6g3gw9RNrgf4U12kDKsIZgU2bchOC5cvSNslRJSxPr_nlwqWnrrp_oiV3WO_DEQ96_-sHYkRykGv4tB5sr4RBzylEqFsFS1Y0bOXwVWS0N0UezIuK8ZU2USqFAWV3Cf4WszyuMAjw8-1UCsJqH7ubZdhCYJUj677nvYU8P1fJ-MzUoBSJwACHZJsbfW7iPR8ghCaduIwHfjI543x_LlcyJk0SK9-xl1qPNHMbpu6hIjoJCwl9TBzcERZPBCCJTxVkCxJZhqQlISgC5jDdQjyVcM2iwTYO5zA-hVdfGOoCl6ZfCkUTEIqYD_xT9eqnwJTHyRxRdWzk88Cxzix-0ApuSGVPUpnRX0gzA5y1no1qbvjHwotNeNLLSQUatLty7b9CKZKjVUeNmL0AQhSqQQROCHCcI-sNIv_2uvrgiw__37Kn-LO07kmSfUlGyitLxQ28Vb-T3PK-3EAG-zKYL5GH9Lrs1LAXxB15habxaepU5X6p_SRw3tv58Rgrdp9vFBW9QSfFbtzkqjajT6NJS_2_hFCbrwWQ2EoD)**

_Pat Harrigan_

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC) | [**WOAH!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65255?t=3&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC)

Senators Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer are trying to pass an AMAZING Constitutional Amendment...

[**It would END the influence of Dark Money and prevent Billionaires like Elon Musk from rigging elections for Republicans!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65255?t=4&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC)

_This is so awesome!!_

[**_We need EVERY committed Democrat reading this to endorse Klobuchar and Schumer 's bill to hit 25,OOO signatures before 10:00 AM tomorrow >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65256?t=5&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC) | []()
---|---
| [SIGN YOUR NAME ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65255?t=6&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC)
---
Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer's plan is vitally important.

Here's what it would do:

**FIRST:** It would overturn _Citizens United_ - which has ERODED our democracy for fifteen years.

**SECOND:** It would prevent Super PACs and Dark Money donors from flooding undisclosed funds into our elections.

**FINALLY:** It would stop Billionaires from EVER attempting to buy our elections again!!

This would be groundbreaking.

And it would give Democrats a HUGE opportunity to win the Midterms and take back our Majority in 2026 - fair and square!

[**_If you 're on board with Klobuchar and Schumer's Constitutional Amendment, please join 24,999 other good Democrats in signing our petition to give them the momentum they need!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65255?t=7&akid=23255%2E4449941%2Eb2MoMC)

body:
Back to school, ballots, and building a Greater Georgia!
| | | | | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UvASouw6inSCRGZ_VNiSldujbxbU8krpAmnfLVqZeWDoJF6f4g4Ej_6n-siAIBokQ0_miwXwLLSFDS2PaP9JHb-kw56pmyvOdexkpl1mvFlpbn9P46fVNT3egD-mYufvuBUbFCtNn-YNKAdThN1tEkcifpj40MjO764G3tvSaVQ=&c=HOKiGRSK-iGUYGbsjJwYqfiu1F3ZQojAtYCwT4nJNvDoDqD_yBgGfw==&ch=l-gB8BrpBou2sSxB9J7ykIogu3ioiGGfw8gU_N7d8CvIgALYyl3YrQ==)
---
| |
---
| Greater Georgia Newsletter August 1, 2025
---
| As summer winds down and families across Georgia prepare for a new school year, Greater Georgia is laser-focused on our mission: to protect our elections, promote conservative values, and invest in the next generation of Georgians.
Here's what you need to know heading into August.
---
| |
---
|
## Back to School
Strong, Safe, and Distraction-Free Schools
---
Georgia conservatives recently advanced several key measures to help students return to a safer, more stable classroom environment this fall:
✏️ The Legislature fully funded public education and several priorities, including:
$13.6+ billion invested in public education $162 million invested in school safety grants $22+ million in new literacy coaches and other literacy tools
✏️ The Distraction Free Education Act (HB 340), which takes effect in 2026, bans cellphone use during the school day, so kids can focus on learning. ✏️ The Riley Gaines Act (SB 1 ) defends fairness in girls' sports by ensuring teams are based on biological sex. ✏️ Ricky & Alyssa's Law (SB 17) requires mobile panic-alert buttons and digital campus maps in every K-12 school to improve emergency response and keep students safe.
---
|
---
## Upcoming Election Dates - Spread the Word!
---
State Senate District 21 & Cherokee County Commission Post 1:
---
| | Early Voting | Weekdays August 4 - August 22
---|---
Election Day | August 26
| Voters can cast their ballots during early voting weekdays through August 22, with extended hours available August 18-22. Voting will take place at the Elections & Voter Registration Office and the LB "The Buzz" Ahrens Recreation Center.
Public Service Commission, County Referendums & Municipal Elections:
---
| | Early Voting | October 15 - November 1
---|---
Election Day | November 4
| Voters can contact their local Board of Elections for more details on their local ballot.
Remember, people across the state didn't know there was a statewide primary on the ballot in 2025 and that was reflected in the shockingly low turnout for the PSC Primary -- fewer than 2.9% of voters cast a ballot.
So let's use this as motivation to show Georgia the strength of our voice. This is exactly why we do the work we do every day to educate, engage, and mobilize voters -- and we know those efforts will pay off in November.
Take a look at this tool below to see how your county compared in turnout, and let it fuel your outreach to friends and neighbors in advance of these elections.
---
| | [PSC PRIMARY ANALYSIS](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UvASouw6inSCRGZ_VNiSldujbxbU8krpAmnfLVqZeWDoJF6f4g4Ej8Tyy47zy8jBBJIW1r97CR8w2omts5kWc3HO0arymkvSz-VkNR-HCHzpj9dP2ERHtZcYG1DcFYg_hkARnL83b5H-dbS7BqWywt7HiK2cS5H5QMGiOqXhuCaksLE34kexKx1RDxYiTt2ioEsInFW_r3psdO8kscoJWBt34YeCVOmnDxV1GiVYSalJSKewM7IplE_gZy6Exg_xGaE4nZQarU17dLX-ZJV6Kw==&c=HOKiGRSK-iGUYGbsjJwYqfiu1F3ZQojAtYCwT4nJNvDoDqD_yBgGfw==&ch=l-gB8BrpBou2sSxB9J7ykIogu3ioiGGfw8gU_N7d8CvIgALYyl3YrQ==)
---
| |
---
|
## ICYMI: Standing Up for Secure Elections
---
| We're continuing to push back against attacks on Georgia's common sense voting laws and advocating for smart reforms that make it easy to vote and hard to cheat.
One major step forward: the launch of the Georgia House Blue Ribbon Study Committee on Elections, a group of trusted leaders and election experts working to review Georgia's election systems and recommend improvements that strengthen integrity and boost voter confidence.
We'll keep leading the charge to protect Georgia's elections because every legal vote should count, and every illegal vote should be stopped.
---
| [Read the Full Press Release](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UvASouw6inSCRGZ_VNiSldujbxbU8krpAmnfLVqZeWDoJF6f4g4EjwMa74LlSrZZ95AL_nbBHgN8GR9VTMoA6gIBZegffLAk0CboE2YyeM8qCWt3DCf-ZK4dKhq83X8UUZPF7PWm3JVR2cW38cK0fGGZi3XPJ31dgQXPe_NBhVZc3R61fv8MlKISJ5WQJIAubvYs17OD18B3P0IXs_1x9-q_121Db1LMcCn4ftNpxV1qXD-H4t6RN_2MBX24s0h_DktcYmCjJKiCZjUogs9ANA==&c=HOKiGRSK-iGUYGbsjJwYqfiu1F3ZQojAtYCwT4nJNvDoDqD_yBgGfw==&ch=l-gB8BrpBou2sSxB9J7ykIogu3ioiGGfw8gU_N7d8CvIgALYyl3YrQ==)
---
| |
---
|
## 📍 From the Field
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Our team had a great time meeting voters, celebrating the Roswell community, and sharing how Greater Georgia is working to empower voters across the Peach State. Thank you to our partners in Fulton for hosting us at Alive in Roswell!
---
| |
---
| FALL VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES
---
| |
---
| Looking to make a difference in 2025? With a statewide election and municipal races on the ballot this November and 2026 right around the corner, we're gearing up for a major voter registration and mobilization effort.
Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities, or contact Dylan Blitz at dylan@greatergeorgia.com.
---
| | [Join The Team Today!](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UvASouw6inSCRGZ_VNiSldujbxbU8krpAmnfLVqZeWDoJF6f4g4Ej_6n-siAIBokQ0_miwXwLLSFDS2PaP9JHb-kw56pmyvOdexkpl1mvFlpbn9P46fVNT3egD-mYufvuBUbFCtNn-YNKAdThN1tEv060A4a6mVLmDG5MbH-TJU=&c=HOKiGRSK-iGUYGbsjJwYqfiu1F3ZQojAtYCwT4nJNvDoDqD_yBgGfw==&ch=l-gB8BrpBou2sSxB9J7ykIogu3ioiGGfw8gU_N7d8CvIgALYyl3YrQ==)

clean_body: Back to school, ballots, and building a Greater Georgia! | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter August 1, 2025 | As summer winds down and families across Georgia prepare for a new school year, Greater Georgia is laser-focused on our mission: to protect our elections, promote conservative values, and invest in the next generation of Georgians. Here's what you need to know heading into August. | | | Back to School Strong, Safe, and Distraction-Free Schools Georgia conservatives recently advanced several key measures to help students return to a safer, more stable classroom environment this fall: ✏️ The Legislature fully funded public education and several priorities, including: $13.6+ billion invested in public education $162 million invested in school safety grants $22+ million in new literacy coaches and other literacy tools ✏️ The Distraction Free Education Act (HB 340), which takes effect in 2026, bans cellphone use during the school day, so kids can focus on learning. ✏️ The Riley Gaines Act (SB 1 ) defends fairness in girls' sports by ensuring teams are based on biological sex. ✏️ Ricky & Alyssa's Law (SB 17) requires mobile panic-alert buttons and digital campus maps in every K-12 school to improve emergency response and keep students safe. | Upcoming Election Dates - Spread the Word! State Senate District 21 & Cherokee County Commission Post 1: | | Early Voting | Weekdays August 4 - August 22 ---|--- Election Day | August 26 | Voters can cast their ballots during early voting weekdays through August 22, with extended hours available August 18-22. Voting will take place at the Elections & Voter Registration Office and the LB "The Buzz" Ahrens Recreation Center. Public Service Commission, County Referendums & Municipal Elections: | | Early Voting | October 15 - November 1 ---|--- Election Day | November 4 | Voters can contact their local Board of Elections for more details on their local ballot. Remember, people across the state didn't know there was a statewide primary on the ballot in 2025 and that was reflected in the shockingly low turnout for the PSC Primary -- fewer than 2.9% of voters cast a ballot. So let's use this as motivation to show Georgia the strength of our voice. This is exactly why we do the work we do every day to educate, engage, and mobilize voters -- and we know those efforts will pay off in November. Take a look at this tool below to see how your county compared in turnout, and let it fuel your outreach to friends and neighbors in advance of these elections. | | == | | | ICYMI: Standing Up for Secure Elections | We're continuing to push back against attacks on Georgia's common sense voting laws and advocating for smart reforms that make it easy to vote and hard to cheat. One major step forward: the launch of the Georgia House Blue Ribbon Study Committee on Elections, a group of trusted leaders and election experts working to review Georgia's election systems and recommend improvements that strengthen integrity and boost voter confidence. We'll keep leading the charge to protect Georgia's elections because every legal vote should count, and every illegal vote should be stopped. | == | | | 📍 From the Field | | | | | Our team had a great time meeting voters, celebrating the Roswell community, and sharing how Greater Georgia is working to empower voters across the Peach State. Thank you to our partners in Fulton for hosting us at Alive in Roswell! | | | FALL VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES | | | Looking to make a difference in 2025? With a statewide election and municipal races on the ballot this November and 2026 right around the corner, we're gearing up for a major voter registration and mobilization effort. Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities, or contact Dylan Blitz at dylan@greatergeorgia.com. | | == | | | In the News | == Georgia lawmakers launch Blue Ribbon Study Committee to review and recommend updates to Georgia's election system ahead of the 2026 election cycle. == Students are now eligible to receive funding for their education through Georgia Promise Scholarships. == Sen. Ossoff called out for his lies on hurricane relief for Georgia's farmers. House Study Committee to continue strengthening Georgia's elections. ==: Judge Benjamin Land appointed to Georgia Supreme Court. | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988 | Atlanta, GA 30355 US | |

subject: Can you connect the dots?
body:
Our most recent deposition was with Kyle Seraphin, a former FBI agent who infiltrated Project Veritas as a "source" and ultimately released my personal text messages on the Internet.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvc2prWHdBR21CMg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP2hpZHM9bmNsNEdGZExhdDZRQXZscw/gaIzAAg/s4g02956986)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb) Dear Patriot,

Over two years ago, the organization I founded sued me after ousting me from my own company.

Project Veritas was all I knew. I poured my heart and soul into the work, building a powerhouse news organization that became **the biggest threat to the lies, corruption, and plots infesting our nation and the most powerful people and organizations in America**.

With Project Veritas' reporting protected by our internal ethics, resulting in rock-solid reporting, no one could stop us**. . . unless from within**.

My ouster from PV was a massive blow, and I’m sure many of the people behind my ouster were shocked when I rapidly got back to work and resumed my duties as an undercover journalist . . . **and again, I became a massive risk to power.**

But then, Project Veritas filed a federal lawsuit against me**. They wanted to ban me from my work, while cutting off access to donors like you who make it all possible**.

Are you connecting the dots here?

**It wasn’t Project Veritas that had to be stopped**. **It was ME** \-- an Eagle Scout from New Jersey with a burning desire to expose the truth.

Project Veritas’ lawsuit continues, [**as does my need for your support to finish this case**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb).

As my legal team uncovers more and more about the plot to remove me from PV and the players behind it, it has stoked my passion to unveil the truth about what happened and report it to you . . . unbiased and unafraid to tell all.

But [**I can’t do that without you**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb). We're on the tail end of this legal battle, and the costs continue to build. [**Will you support me today with a donation of any amount?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb)

Just earlier, we deposed a key player in this case, and the truth became more apparent, along with the enormous hate, jealousy, and **a desire to destroy me and anyone around me, including innocent bystanders connected to me**.

Our most recent deposition was with Kyle Seraphin, a former FBI agent who infiltrated Project Veritas as a "source" and ultimately released my personal text messages on the Internet.

But this plot goes beyond simple pettiness. Why was a former FBI agent putting in so much effort to plant himself within Project Veritas under my leadership?

Why was he cozying up to staff, board members, and major donors with nothing to gain?

Many, many questions remain, and I’m determined to see how far this rabbit hole goes.

[**And you’re the key to all of this**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb). Each deposition is costing $14k or more, and key players remain.

[**Please donate as much as you can today**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb) to help us uncover the truth about who was behind the attempted destruction of Project Veritas and identify those still involved in the plot to stop me.

When I was first removed from Project Veritas, **Steve Bannon** went live to talk about it. Known for his catchphrase, “**There are NO conspiracies, but there are NO coincidences** ,” Bannon went on to say that “**James O’Keefe IS Veritas**.”

I don’t think I even realized it at the time, but that soon became a reality. Firing me from Project Veritas wasn’t enough. **To stop the truth, they have to stop me.**

Don’t let them win. [**Please, donate today**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb).

In truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. Our next deposition is with the most crucial figure behind the plot to stop me. It will also be our most expensive one to date. So please, [**donate all that you can today to help me get to the truth and keep fighting.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12727507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWRvdHMtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsMURvaGFaaw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctZG90cyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTJfd3Ix/gaIzAAg/s1lfc4ffecb)

clean_body: Our most recent deposition was with Kyle Seraphin, a former FBI agent who infiltrated Project Veritas as a "source" and ultimately released my personal text messages on the Internet. | | | | Dear Patriot, Over two years ago, the organization I founded sued me after ousting me from my own company. Project Veritas was all I knew. I poured my heart and soul into the work, building a powerhouse news organization that became the biggest threat to the lies, corruption, and plots infesting our nation and the most powerful people and organizations in America. With Project Veritas' reporting protected by our internal ethics, resulting in rock-solid reporting, no one could stop us. . . unless from within. My ouster from PV was a massive blow, and I’m sure many of the people behind my ouster were shocked when I rapidly got back to work and resumed my duties as an undercover journalist . . . and again, I became a massive risk to power. But then, Project Veritas filed a federal lawsuit against me. They wanted to ban me from my work, while cutting off access to donors like you who make it all possible. Are you connecting the dots here? It wasn’t Project Veritas that had to be stopped. It was ME \-- an Eagle Scout from New Jersey with a burning desire to expose the truth. Project Veritas’ lawsuit continues, . As my legal team uncovers more and more about the plot to remove me from PV and the players behind it, it has stoked my passion to unveil the truth about what happened and report it to you . . . unbiased and unafraid to tell all. But . We're on the tail end of this legal battle, and the costs continue to build. Just earlier, we deposed a key player in this case, and the truth became more apparent, along with the enormous hate, jealousy, and a desire to destroy me and anyone around me, including innocent bystanders connected to me. Our most recent deposition was with Kyle Seraphin, a former FBI agent who infiltrated Project Veritas as a "source" and ultimately released my personal text messages on the Internet. But this plot goes beyond simple pettiness. Why was a former FBI agent putting in so much effort to plant himself within Project Veritas under my leadership? Why was he cozying up to staff, board members, and major donors with nothing to gain? Many, many questions remain, and I’m determined to see how far this rabbit hole goes. . Each deposition is costing $14k or more, and key players remain. to help us uncover the truth about who was behind the attempted destruction of Project Veritas and identify those still involved in the plot to stop me. When I was first removed from Project Veritas, Steve Bannon went live to talk about it. Known for his catchphrase, “There are NO conspiracies, but there are NO coincidences ,” Bannon went on to say that “James O’Keefe IS Veritas.” I don’t think I even realized it at the time, but that soon became a reality. Firing me from Project Veritas wasn’t enough. To stop the truth, they have to stop me. Don’t let them win. . In truth, James O’Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. Our next deposition is with the most crucial figure behind the plot to stop me. It will also be our most expensive one to date. So please,
