subject: None of this would be possible without your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR4NRPRGWxHgg-2BCgUXw89AsFENqkeQEb7BS6m8CMkEX-2BMKDTJRrjcRPlrlDkEsowyw9TvPfIj6-2FRAGheNz8X74xs-3DFy7S_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYsr6GDO3L-2FeinEkTI1et31zuwMnD-2FvHJ29h2l-2F-2Fd5CHmfV4UttUfLvBVPmU1iIt8BGdBezdLbVsrzRP7LBK-2FGzmU-2BqNbLWVer6KdGcWNX5cfD3NZiNx-2BoxVxyzAccuRgIyg29v7yNpg1a0zX06743GcQzjLrUDlvDC-2FiGN0Sp7hOY4xns1XQhNhG2hXr1igqW)
---
Fellow activist,

We wanted to reach out to thank you for your incredible support. We are less than 100 days away from Election Day, and Team NPP is working hard to prepare for the important judicial elections, including the non-partisan retention election for three PA Supreme Court justices. We wouldn’t be able to do this without you – that’s why we wanted to share a few updates on what we have been up to over the past few weeks.

First, our founding CEO, **Kadida Kenner, joined former U.S. Attorney General Eric Holder and Sophia Lin Lakin, Director of the ACLU Voting Rights Project, to discuss state courts and the fight for a fair democracy.** Rachel Rossi, President of Alliance for Justice Action Campaign, moderated the panel's discussion as they looked ahead to the 2030 census and redistricting. [**You can watch the panel discussion here:**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr-2BMBiks98UdJ06QEPSsw3oledXMRYBfm6hJSSW0GvVLxVqyAJaErDiosaSh1sP8fw-3D-3DC-4K_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYsr6GDO3L-2FeinEkTI1et31zuwMnD-2FvHJ29h2l-2F-2Fd5CHkNnvwbufVCgzDIgWw-2FBWEplMYWSSpgVoJmqMiV83POMZPS90ADjSY6K05nuQQbvkKVbf3oaOMoCzXZyITOqAvnL7KshVb3BjHLbadBnubAn4HleUzHcdhqMrCVOUid8ikb-2Bb5HMQPNlgS9T1B6gkpO)
---
[](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr-2BMBiks98UdJ06QEPSsw3oledXMRYBfm6hJSSW0GvVLDRO5Z1ZR7vVxqzIf2NdPv-2BQy094SPK2iBYW7PE6ofq8h-2Ff7Gy2bwjxtFs-2FYrk8HVa2Ar_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYsr6GDO3L-2FeinEkTI1et31zuwMnD-2FvHJ29h2l-2F-2Fd5CHnZenJuxLmQhWamjfw7hMnUumVb1dmKMZ1RWCISrtPCnuE-2FlQEKTupd9FhW20ar7obmzADisD6P1-2FBjItYAZHu-2FWmjPrE6Bhem4BxkRsHeJx5idELYJPuvZrDl0cmBTZyvQIeVEzZvbPp4H6GjwDEk9)
---
Additionally, Omar Sabir, Chair of the Philadelphia City Commissioners, hosted a **Voter Turnout Roundtable** , and NPP was proud to be a partner in the roundtable discussion. This event brought together elected officials, community partners, and civic leaders to identify strategies for increasing voter participation, strengthening collaboration, and ensuring equitable access to the ballot for all Philadelphians. NPP supports this commitment to building stronger civic engagement across neighborhoods and preparing for upcoming elections in 2025 and beyond.
---
[](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR4NRPRGWxHgg-2BCgUXw89AsFENqkeQEb7BS6m8CMkEX-2BMyvPHkIO0TzXn8YKvPo0ODhcr8mBSGi-2BCuLQ-2F3OmWe0o-3D9Tky_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYsr6GDO3L-2FeinEkTI1et31zuwMnD-2FvHJ29h2l-2F-2Fd5CHl4ScP5yLUWmTOmjPCjYVN-2FepMyZpSXJmOo88a2rsHzeyeslYGZklV90AMPmiDH0o-2Bq-2BETsxHfpJKI-2BVKvceJ-2F-2FfAmpW0BA8xyRNCoKSY9Og4tHsKNOuPlD2e0kTdB88uWNmUxXw-2FeRKBUFM93lVjSx)
---
That’s not all: NPP was at the**Good Trouble Rally in Philadelphia** , where Kadida and other leaders gathered for a day of action at City Hall in Philadelphia on Thursday, July 17th. Kadida was one of many inspirational speakers at the rally. Additionally, NPP was at the **Good Trouble Training Day in Pittsburgh** , hosted by Indivisible Pittsburgh, on Saturday, July 19th, where Kadida Kenner was also a keynote speaker. At this event, we discussed the courts and what's at stake regarding our rights and freedoms – and what you can do about it.

Finally, we wanted to remind you that NPP has launched**“Slingshot The Podcast!”** In this podcast, Kadida brings her background as a civil rights advocate and former TV producer into each episode, offering fresh perspectives on civic engagement, justice, and power. Slingshot is where bold conversations meet culture, politics, sports, and real-world issues. We amplify the voices too often overlooked or misrepresented – voices that move the culture forward. Whether we’re talking policy or pop culture, this is unfiltered truth from the ground up. [**You can listen to the podcast here!**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YrmJZvFrK7i7pfDB-2B6Ium-2F17ERHEPmvf408q9aK04IpYimYia0XnPfN3l6AdmKJ0TQ-3D-3Do2w1_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYsr6GDO3L-2FeinEkTI1et31zuwMnD-2FvHJ29h2l-2F-2Fd5CHkm1rrDmegIxTfkeeQCxtY4wif8OnKwPAuNr4R-2BO1q2x-2Blkt-2Ffho-2FGomVcHdN7W7uD86VOy6BRjlIaFtPelhJomB-2FpU3p7V-2F8-2FfAJ869tpz2nrdWatpLuQ-2FYwFUr1eq2CvS5VVcGQMr2bscsNm-2FK4ce)

**We are proud of all the work we have accomplished and are grateful for your support, which helps make this possible. But we are just getting started: **

NPP is preparing to launch an independent expenditure Get-Out-The-Vote door-knocking program to turn out eligible voters in the 2025 November General Election. Everything we do — from attending rallies and releasing podcasts to knocking on doors — is geared toward allowing us to continue expanding Pennsylvania's electorate. There is so much at stake in the upcoming judicial and municipal elections, and we will be on the ground working to reach our centered communities and ensure that they understand the power of their vote.

Thank you for your ongoing support,

Team NPP
---
_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

**Will you support us with a monthly contribution today?** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR4NRPRGWxHgg-2BCgUXw89AsFENqkeQEb7BS6m8CMkEX-2BM8cC5kansXWfydoGL-2FrjItEDCU4RtbAxuzs7rvaiIojNkPbRIWJLpvEnuR2yVSAbz88we_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYsr6GDO3L-2FeinEkTI1et31zuwMnD-2FvHJ29h2l-2F-2Fd5CHmYppmRhl0ml-2B-2FLU9xoAtktCOOAbQGlFMLkHIUC8FjUyz4X7OZ9ELyfyIjoE7l3z1NHE-2BmIZMqIzGFkOIoCzJO1SQ2t1mhrLbPTVaWiZNxPNRgTjh9LDTJimAqUyLm-2BFVx0H14isYG4zUU6ahtgDQ8d)

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, We wanted to reach out to thank you for your incredible support. We are less than 100 days away from Election Day, and Team NPP is working hard to prepare for the important judicial elections, including the non-partisan retention election for three PA Supreme Court justices. We wouldn’t be able to do this without you – that’s why we wanted to share a few updates on what we have been up to over the past few weeks. First, our founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, joined former U.S. Attorney General Eric Holder and Sophia Lin Lakin, Director of the ACLU Voting Rights Project, to discuss state courts and the fight for a fair democracy. Rachel Rossi, President of Alliance for Justice Action Campaign, moderated the panel's discussion as they looked ahead to the 2030 census and redistricting. Additionally, Omar Sabir, Chair of the Philadelphia City Commissioners, hosted a Voter Turnout Roundtable , and NPP was proud to be a partner in the roundtable discussion. This event brought together elected officials, community partners, and civic leaders to identify strategies for increasing voter participation, strengthening collaboration, and ensuring equitable access to the ballot for all Philadelphians. NPP supports this commitment to building stronger civic engagement across neighborhoods and preparing for upcoming elections in 2025 and beyond. That’s not all: NPP was at theGood Trouble Rally in Philadelphia , where Kadida and other leaders gathered for a day of action at City Hall in Philadelphia on Thursday, July 17th. Kadida was one of many inspirational speakers at the rally. Additionally, NPP was at the Good Trouble Training Day in Pittsburgh , hosted by Indivisible Pittsburgh, on Saturday, July 19th, where Kadida Kenner was also a keynote speaker. At this event, we discussed the courts and what's at stake regarding our rights and freedoms – and what you can do about it. Finally, we wanted to remind you that NPP has launched“Slingshot The Podcast!” In this podcast, Kadida brings her background as a civil rights advocate and former TV producer into each episode, offering fresh perspectives on civic engagement, justice, and power. Slingshot is where bold conversations meet culture, politics, sports, and real-world issues. We amplify the voices too often overlooked or misrepresented – voices that move the culture forward. Whether we’re talking policy or pop culture, this is unfiltered truth from the ground up. We are proud of all the work we have accomplished and are grateful for your support, which helps make this possible. But we are just getting started: NPP is preparing to launch an independent expenditure Get-Out-The-Vote door-knocking program to turn out eligible voters in the 2025 November General Election. Everything we do — from attending rallies and releasing podcasts to knocking on doors — is geared toward allowing us to continue expanding Pennsylvania's electorate. There is so much at stake in the upcoming judicial and municipal elections, and we will be on the ground working to reach our centered communities and ensure that they understand the power of their vote. Thank you for your ongoing support, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Ready to lead? Training already started!
body:
Join patriots across America for Only Citizens Vote Month. Let’s pass the SAVE Act and secure our elections.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** ******** Only Citizens Vote Month is almost here--and we're ready to equip you to lead. To help you plan and execute impactful events in support of the SAVE Act (Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility Act), we're offering a series of **[free, online deep-dive training webinars](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf05189/1edb9794acef7913) across five**** crucial categories**. **Training kicked off Monday **and** ** sessions run through the first half of August with rotating times to fit your schedule; you can easily find a day and time to match your needs. **Choose from five training categories:**
* **Door-to-Door Canvassing**
* **Small Group Gatherings**
* **Rallies & Sign-Waving**
* **Relational Organizing**
* **Effective Communication**
You can register for the sessions that match your goals--or attend all five for the full toolkit. **** ****

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ REGISTER ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf05189/1edb9794acef7915)
---
| **** **** ********As a dedicated American patriot, your efforts are critical and we can 't win without you. These trainings are designed to sharpen your skills--not just for August, but for the long road to victory in 2026. **Let 's make this the biggest grassroots push for election integrity yet.** Thank you for standing up to protect the commonsense principle that **_only American citizens should vote in American elections._** In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin **_The SAVE Act (Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act)_**_ is a commonsense bill that would require individuals to provide documentary proof of U.S. citizenship when registering to vote in federal elections. It closes loopholes in current law that allow noncitizens to register and even vote simply by checking a box. The SAVE Act is a critical step toward restoring integrity to our elections and ensuring that only American citizens vote.___ ****

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| **** ******************** ********
__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf05189/1edb9794acef7917)
---
|
---
|
---

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: 🚧Stop Elon and Lee’s Underground Grift in Nashville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Musk blew up our federal government, fired thousands, cut vital funds, and now Bill Lee wants to give him state property.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K1JYF87ZQ72YH9WT4T934EA7_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K1JYF87ZQ72YH9WT4T934EA7_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Elon Musk’s DOGE scheme was allegedly going to root out government waste. Instead, it literally torched taxpayer dollars, resulted in massive federal layoffs, and cut funding to vital programs and research. Now, after a mean _girls_ -style public breakup with Trump, Musk wants a new sweetheart deal for him and his investors. Who better to take advantage of than a starry eyed, fanboy like Bill Lee? Let’s be honest - Lee, no stranger to secret privatization deals, was an easy target. Lee is giving Musk and his Boring Company state property for 50 years to use century-old technology to dig a tunnel to operate an underground taxi service — with no oversight, regulation or price controls and zero public input or transparency. This tunnel isn’t an “innovative” solution for public transit. The Boring Company’s so-called Vegas Loop was a congested, single-lane death trap that OSHA flagged for serious workplace safety violations. **Now Tennessee Republicans** **— including Gov. Lee, Speaker Sexton,** **and Sen. Massey —** **are threatening Nashville’s underground** **infrastructure for another Musk boondoggle** while our neighbors face skyrocketing grocery prices, brutal cuts to SNAP and TennCare, and an ever-growing healthcare and childcare crisis.
---
| | [ Fight Back ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K1JYF87ZQ72YH9WT4T934EA7_2)
---
| It’s time to stand up and say: **_no more billion-dollar pet projects for a failed DOGEr on the rebound._** Join the Tennessee House Democrats in calling for an end to this corruption. Demand transparency, accountability, and investment in real solutions — not Musk’s circus tunnels. Chip in now to help us fight back and protect Tennessee families from being sold out — again.
---
| | [ Donate now to stop Musk’s tunnel scam ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K1JYF87ZQ72YH9WT4T934EA7_3)
---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112553514/560872570/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_250801Thanks_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2Q0ZTBjYy1kZjZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWN2hY9jUSph-Ga9zGWgU7iYVU7VrnKC8q--Vhi-2G4=) Hi Peter,

Thank you for all of your support this past month. With your help, we hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal and got a step closer to holding Republicans accountable for their chaos and destruction.

As Trump and his MAGA followers in the House are working overtime to sow division and hatred, I am continuing the fight to protect the hardworking people of our nation from their destruction. Too many people are being forced to choose between groceries, rent, and healthcare, because Republicans want to fund massive tax breaks for the mega wealthy. We won’t let that stand.

I will continue to do everything in my power to defend our nation and our freedoms, and I am so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

name: Andy Roth
subject: The Most Underreported Story Ever?
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pL40Qj_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer0tgTVTEQp-2BZg5N39Nh-2Fl-2BEjPycG5-2BUvevHYpWQICRm4rDrTDrMF0rMh0aCwgH3-2Bzm4e9Kbuo1bD-2B4lImr8lL-2FUN3YYTjtoVu0Q87byp3pU3RvhSu4ezKiDJXGsGcqEdzi5zQJU9QsyCbvPVcB60SQlufG7WmWB3JPahE-2F7m9gT6daYO0gNnJ-2FfsvKXhDq8o-2BvlLgP3Rp2JxkuYGq1cLRb6FaGl50PpFcwHwkwboNUpo-3D)

|

Dear Friend, Another busy week of our state freedom caucuses fighting for you. Here are the top stories.
---
|
---
**THE BLAZE** I was in Dallas earlier this week, so I stopped by The Blaze studio to talk with Jill Savage and Matthew Peterson on their show, "The Mandate". The key point I made, which is highlighted below, was that "Red states, almost all of them, are governed by Democrats with an R after their name. It's one of the most underreported stories in the country." The video clip got a lot of attention on social media. The dozens of online comments echoed my sentiment. They included:

"Like Texas...absolutely""That's Ohio with DeWine""This is true, surprisingly, in Arkansas!""Especially Utah"This can be depressing news, but as supporters of the State Freedom Caucus Network, you know that there is hope. You know that there is an answer to this problem. The solution is our ever-growing group of 13 state freedom caucuses comprised of almost 200 principled, conservative state lawmakers who are exposing this liberal conceit on a daily basis.Our mission remains the same - continue to support and help our current states and expand into new states until we're in all 50. That's the goal and we're going to get there with your help.
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjukVziHFJdlRGeoV594grnu-2FCbb53ooGt4jq0dGQQvqU4TAHGXuXlzlkE1rZC6A6DA-3D-3DHl-4_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer0tgTVTEQp-2BZg5N39Nh-2Fl-2BEjPycG5-2BUvevHYpWQICRm4rDrTDrMF0rMh0aCwgH3-2Bzm4e9Kbuo1bD-2B4lImr8lL-2FaFPF-2FlCHUJ-2FR09rVkcmNsGS1FOxnFxvveSUWx7QLMXtmee-2B9qFggEu7DJj-2BPZgwtdPCTA-2FGCXIO0Fh38O5luEBiN2RzqOrxeXCiCbJNpncpOjyRvzjnZgnz5i3BbCDaGq6dO-2Be-2BxLLlA-2BY-2BWjG8deU-3D)
---
|
---
**MISSOURI** The **Missouri Freedom Caucus** is leading the charge to draw Congressional maps that reflect the will of Missouri voters and give President Trump the strong conservative majority he needs in Congress.But surprise, surprise: the Jeff City Swamp and their "Republican" leaders don't seem to be interested.So the MOFC is calling for a special session to force the issue. We must seize the opportunity to stop the Swamp and out-of-state liberal groups that are trying to alter Missouri's constitution.The ball is now in the Swamp's court. Will they hold a special session or defy President Trump and the Missouri Freedom Caucus?
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjlGtTaWglf8SUGjOni7plj10W-2Bj2lrqV3rS3MHFyk8SgsF39niscbW6m68rgDCuLaIhJCQX5ZnxDLwOAPmUuLiI-3DmYud_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer0tgTVTEQp-2BZg5N39Nh-2Fl-2BEjPycG5-2BUvevHYpWQICRm4rDrTDrMF0rMh0aCwgH3-2Bzm4e9Kbuo1bD-2B4lImr8lL-2FblL1yJTUJ-2BcWvqpjPSwi1j5eO27OWhrzReyZVp7-2B8wMbFvQAPDImqN1vSyyw4qs9xTPju-2BeoyYgBhOykbpdRsYD1lVV0omeEbX-2BPoCCSrGwaXEAsmRACwKjTLvf7oy6BA7NKLb-2BTQyRraP7bQFqmvQ-3D)
---
|
---
**MARYLAND** For years, power plants have been closing in Maryland due to the Maryland Democrats' “Green Energy Scam”.On top of that, environmental extremists like the Sierra Club have sued coal and oil-powered plant operators leading to their systematic demise in Maryland. The result is crushing energy bills throughout the state as they import a whopping 40% of their electricity from Pennsylvania and beyond. Still, it is not enough to keep the lights on. The **Maryland Freedom Caucus** began raising the alarm of coming blackouts in February of this year. Their relentless pursuit to keep power plants open by any means necessary, including three letters to the federal Department of Energy throughout the year, resulted in a huge win this week. Thanks to the Maryland Freedom Caucus, the Wagner power plant in Anne Arundel County can now operate at peak capacity, with no caps imposed by legal settlements or “green energy mandates”, through October.They’ll continue to fight until energy is affordable and reliable once again.
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjiwkZmtXDP4u12gaI7rwUjae8XQZaRZzQyAlLxNMAq3UBytwagpclZIOlF6cXW-2BXzj0ng87KBSCbM82lKj79coc-3DMR2S_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer0tgTVTEQp-2BZg5N39Nh-2Fl-2BEjPycG5-2BUvevHYpWQICRm4rDrTDrMF0rMh0aCwgH3-2Bzm4e9Kbuo1bD-2B4lImr8lL-2FaBoZ3Y8-2BwkHKL-2FEpviNHd7WDv5G2538RoF3UQxb1J2YGNsOWYUDkbtAbntYV8VGgFpnYRPyKifLiMy0gHhTlN0Kv9phKTEZ9SkkoI9ZPfH8ohlJE08zBMWZST3Ub9NKafWE1JKi0IMK3wjzHuomVH4-3D)

**HELP US GROW** Summer is almost over. Now is the time to help us grow and expand into new states while keeping our current states strong.

Every dollar counts—especially now. Can we count on your support today?

Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum.
---

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Fourteen years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’ll never forget this moment.
#

Fourteen years ago today, I returned to Congress for the first time after being shot. I’ll never forget that moment.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250801-1-b&t=1&akid=10740%2E3935704%2E6v8CaS)
After I was shot, it wasn’t clear that I would make it. Some outlets initially reported that I hadn’t survived.
Even once I was stable, my doctors didn’t know if I would regain the ability to walk or talk.
It was hard, but giving up was never an option.
Then on August 1, 2011 -- seven months after I was shot -- I made my way onto the House floor and voted to save our country from a financial crash.
It’s been fourteen years. Some days have been harder than others, but I’ve never forgotten where I came from or what made me who I am today.
That fight hasn’t stopped.
**I founded GIFFORDS because we cannot be a country of political assassinations or gun violence. This cannot be the new normal. Our democracy won’t survive it.**
We have the tools to build a safer America — and now, it’s on all of us to take up the fight.
[**We can -- and must -- continue the fight for our country. If you’re able, will you join me in this fight for gun safety by pitching in a donation of any amount?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250801-1-b&t=2&akid=10740%2E3935704%2E6v8CaS)

name: Team Freedom Va
subject: 🏖️Can You Believe It’s August Already?☀️
body:
We can hardly believe that July is over and that August has begun. So much has happened this summer and there’s still so much work to be done!
| | |
---
| |
---
| 🏖️Can You Believe It's August Already?☀️
---
| Friends-
We can hardly believe that July is over and that August has begun. So much has happened this summer and there's still so much work to be done!
Early in the month, our Co-Executive Director Ryan O'Toole joined Protect Our Care, Congresswoman Jennifer McClellan, Senator Ghazala Hashmi, the SEIU Virginia State Council, and the SAARA of Virginia to talk about the recent cuts to Medicaid and what that means for hardworking Virginia families.
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rvdi5CHwfqPOFXgoMCcUpqpBtQK6h0h5rW5Co8Hpil-KITFk0xYHSLnOtFoxkcDRFEHi0qli8yjPc6bYn4HYRe4UGyuPE5Gt0KtijYPgo-5Q4rMmWIMYMKnO0Mq1XtH9jUnPusxl_5iqHUBYHSkVaepQc_djtmZjArqHRu0MCBkxNJklaeJtlnwFS1xc8TRYenP4sEkcrCsSM3VoMjhnMsxsnm4K-6PNRZO0jGZV05vMqIyFYSNbqzwXeRLP9VD-gXuQIj0j7GJbIBiMpwxXWrxqW0f7vSKBSdBww-mvvE0YdbX986exubkskZgIwSH7&c=jIH64KEvCteHUevRliBf3RD_CPkpx6kUb4b9YWto5qtrm9QuOvPSdA==&ch=J38WnsI-UUhevBEbkpJJT1RvSmdbvN_6uCFt2x53AS9wjHBI0j2qqg==)
---
| "This bill is a slap in the face for so many Americans... this bill echoes what we hear from Virginians all the time: that corruption makes our economy work great for special interests, but not for regular people".
-Ryan O'Toole, Co-Executive Director of Freedom Virginia
Thank you to everyone who came to our event celebrating the legacy of Good Trouble and John Lewis. We talked about the knowledge left by John Lewis and how it applies to the Beloved Community in Virginia Beach and surrounding areas. Go out and make some good trouble, Virginia!
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rvdi5CHwfqPOFXgoMCcUpqpBtQK6h0h5rW5Co8Hpil-KITFk0xYHSLnOtFoxkcDRFEHi0qli8yjPc6bYn4HYRe4UGyuPE5Gt0KtijYPgo-5Q4rMmWIMYMKnO0Mq1XtH9jUnPusxl_5iqHUBYHSkVaepQc_djtmZjArqHRu0MCBkxNJklaeJtlnwFS1xc8TRYenP4sEkcrCsSM3VoMjhnMsxsnm4K-6PNRZO0jGZV05vMqIyFYSNbqzwXeRLP9VD-gXuQIj0j7GJbIBiMpwxXWrxqW0f7vSKBSdBww-mvvE3qF4T5-TYg6siHed5wu9Uz&c=jIH64KEvCteHUevRliBf3RD_CPkpx6kUb4b9YWto5qtrm9QuOvPSdA==&ch=J38WnsI-UUhevBEbkpJJT1RvSmdbvN_6uCFt2x53AS9wjHBI0j2qqg==)
---
Finally, we joined Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, the National Domestic Worker's Alliance, Affordable Virginia, and other organizations to put Families First in Virginia Beach! Together, we collectively demanded for an end to policies that actively harm children, seniors, and families such as the cutting of Medicaid, food stamps, school lunches, and more. clean_body: We can hardly believe that July is over and that August has begun. So much has happened this summer and there’s still so much work to be done! | | | | | | 🏖️Can You Believe It's August Already?☀️ | Friends- We can hardly believe that July is over and that August has begun. So much has happened this summer and there's still so much work to be done! Early in the month, our Co-Executive Director Ryan O'Toole joined Protect Our Care, Congresswoman Jennifer McClellan, Senator Ghazala Hashmi, the SEIU Virginia State Council, and the SAARA of Virginia to talk about the recent cuts to Medicaid and what that means for hardworking Virginia families. | | == | "This bill is a slap in the face for so many Americans... this bill echoes what we hear from Virginians all the time: that corruption makes our economy work great for special interests, but not for regular people". -Ryan O'Toole, Co-Executive Director of Freedom Virginia Thank you to everyone who came to our event celebrating the legacy of Good Trouble and John Lewis. We talked about the knowledge left by John Lewis and how it applies to the Beloved Community in Virginia Beach and surrounding areas. Go out and make some good trouble, Virginia! | == Finally, we joined Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, the National Domestic Worker's Alliance, Affordable Virginia, and other organizations to put Families First in Virginia Beach! Together, we collectively demanded for an end to policies that actively harm children, seniors, and families such as the cutting of Medicaid, food stamps, school lunches, and more. We put our First in Virginia! | == | July was busy and beautiful, and we look forward to August being even better and more productive! As always, thank you so much for your continued support and dedication to creating an affordable Virginia- we couldn't do it without you! | == == == | | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |

null, experts are predicting that Michigan could very likely decide Senate control, and _The Cook Political Report_ ranked this seat as a pure "Toss Up."
---
That means this race is going to be decided on the margins, which is why we urgently need to confirm where grassroots Democrats stand.

**We're looking for 10,000 responses to our live straw poll before midnight tonight. Tell us now:**
---
**Who would you vote for in Michigan's Senate race?**
---
| | | [Haley Stevens](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=416%2E49239%2ECfBoLm)
---
| [Mike Rogers](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=416%2E49239%2ECfBoLm)
---
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4023?t=6&akid=416%2E49239%2ECfBoLm) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4021?t=7&akid=416%2E49239%2ECfBoLm)
---

Thank you,
Haley

Peter, it’s Charlie. I’ve got great news: We hit our July fundraising goal! Thanks to **you** , we can start reaching more voters across the Peach State. That matters so much right now, because what happens in Georgia in 2026 won’t just shape the future of our state — It will help decide the future of the country. The truth is, no one is coming to save us, Peter. Every state has a role to play — but what happens here in Georgia could determine whether we put a real check on the GOP’s abuse of power. We’ve seen what happens when we wait too long — and we’ve seen what’s possible when we organize early and bring people in. So let’s talk to our neighbors, prepare our friends and families, and remind people what’s at stake — **and why this fight _matters._** We all have a part in what happens next, and we must start **right now.** Thank you for being in this fight, Charlie Bailey Chair, Democratic Party of Georgia [P.S. Hey folks,
I went live yesterday from the back of an Uber--because sometimes you've got to spend the cash and make it work. I couldn't let the day pass without jumping on to talk through the latest wave of Epstein revelations, Trump's jaw-dropping White House renovation plans, and my recent trip back to Fox News. This one gets real. Don't miss it.
* **[00:01:11] Trump 's tangled Epstein timeline:** I break down Virginia Giuffre's family demanding the release of unredacted flight logs--and Trump's bizarre admission about why he distanced himself from Epstein.
* **[00:04:42] Demanding justice (and transparency):** Why it's time to stop laughing and start asking serious questions about who was on the island and what they knew.
* **[00:10:49] The $200 million distraction:** Trump announces a White House facelift for "fancier" parties--while slashing cancer research and food assistance. I call it what it is.
* **[00:15:15] My Fox News return:** They invited me back after last week's inflation debate. I came armed with facts--and their own poll numbers. Watch what happened.
* **[00:26:00] What the economy feels like right now:** From Klarna groceries to millennial burnout, I get personal about why most Americans feel shut out--and why I'm saving for my son's future like it's my job (because it might be).

**If you care about accountability, justice, and what the hell is going on in this country, this is an essential watch. Become a paid subscriber to keep these convos going --and to be part of a community that doesn't flinch from the truth.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TuXLe0-BTEAOHgqw8iVkdHuCoEl8ZCWjq8jH0su7W_k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169793199)
With urgency,
--Mike.

| |
## **Get the Facts. Take Action. Fix Our Food System.**
This important Zoom Webinar promises to give you the tools to protect your family from the toxic chemicals and additives in American food. The MAHA Action Media Hub brings the experts right to your screen, with speakers such as Gov Patrick Morrissey, Calley Means, Vani Hari, and many more. **Join Us:** Date: 8/6 Time: 4:00 PM EDT Platform: Zoom Independent media and grassroots action remain critical to sustaining moment and achieving lasting change. clean_body: I’ve seen firsthand what’s at stake in this critical election cycle. The radical Left is pouring MILLIONS into North Carolina to drown out our conservative voice | Fellow American, I’ve seen firsthand what’s at stake in this critical election cycle. The radical Left is pouring MILLIONS into North Carolina to drown out our conservative voice and keep their grip on the Senate. That’s why I’m standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Michael Whatley, a proven America First fighter, to win North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat. Michael Whatley has President Trump’s full support -- and mine too. Michael’s track record speaks for itself. He helped deliver North Carolina for President Trump THREE TIMES , fought relentlessly to secure our elections, and stood firm against the globalist elite. He’s ready to take that same grit to the U.S. Senate to close our borders, end DEI nonsense, crush the Deep State, and fight for Trump’s America. The Leftist establishment is backing radical Democrat Roy Cooper, dumping over $3.4 MILLION into his campaign in the first 24 hours of his campaign. The media is spreading lies, and Leftist elites are desperate to stop our movement. Will you join me in supporting Michael Whatley? Michael’s a warrior ready to go to Washington and fight for YOU. With your support, we can flip this Senate seat, take back the majority, and put America First. Let’s send a message to the Left that North Carolina - and America - won’t back down. For America, Steve Daines P.S. Michael just announced his candidacy yesterday. We need every Republican to step up in the next 48 hours to send the Democrats a message that we’re ready to fight and defend this Republican seat. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Abigail has condemned the chaos coming out of Trump's White House — but it's critical that all of us speak out. Let us know where you stand by midnight: Thanks for chiming in, Team Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let Trump officials delete Trump's impeachment from the Smithsonian
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Smithsonian Museum Removes References to Trump from Impeachment exhibit after pressure from Trump officials. Don’t let Trump erase history!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d7ca25d-19dc-4265-86cc-0154da2458a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T354a293d-a8ee-431c-8268-e18df77f6f46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump officials aren't satisfied with destroying our present, they are now going after our history too -- and [trying to erase Trump's impeachment:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T977a6458-3dd8-48da-bf85-aac74d4c397c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" The [Smithsonian American History] museum removed references to Trump's two impeachments from a part of the museum, according to the Washington Post, citing an anonymous source which Newsweek did not verify. The publication said this was because of a content review the museum agreed to amid pressure from the Trump administration to remove a museum director." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38fd345d-a167-46fb-b7d8-78c195af118f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) _ WTF? Trump is now editing our history, and deciding to delete the parts he deems "doubleplusungood"? Fight back, and keep up the pressure until it is confirmed that this change has been reversed, and that similar censorship efforts will be rejected. [**Add your name, and tell the Smithsonian: "Don't let Trump erase history."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted4e73e6-23e3-430e-8640-deea6ad93d5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f8b2423-5dac-49cf-bd02-886860873f69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [Update: Note, there are reports that this will be reversed, but the quote says that the exhibit will be restored to its "2008 appearance" which is troubling, since that pre-dates Trump's presidency. So keep up the pressure!] Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a21de25-e030-4539-9009-5d1f76ced26c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I've spent time thinking hard about what I could do to fight back, and after careful consideration, [I've made a decision.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0sspj84h0npo9cq6l65alfpuk73umd0bboslo38_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jm2o72clh2bs)

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Our final chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg750qkurgen5q1kfm659m5encsbtpg9t7frlt1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)I was really hoping it wouldn't come to this, Friend...
I hate to tell you this, but I got word that we fell short of our CRUCIAL End of Month Deadline last night. This is a crushing blow. But I'm not about to quit on our movement, Friend.
I've launched an internal extended deadline for the next ten minutes to give us one more shot at reaching this key Goal! Now, you have a choice. You can:

* Give up on our fight to keep Virginia red. The country will think conservatives aren't committed to building a better tomorrow for our nation and here in Virginia.

* [OR you can send in even just $16 to help me and my team reach our End of Month Extended Deadline Goal in the next ten minutes! We'll turn our virtually tied race into a HUGE win!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeoahmfo2mm6c49slifnolbkuk85tgpr5oo64118_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)

[DONATE $16 OR MORE ASAP >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zutl269udu6qg6v9s0e0dub1fm5lrgt2kq9avgig_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)[DONATE RIGHT NOW >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcg6jr9jfa1pqer3gm434e5k54371mbqo7ton05o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)I'm completely counting on you! I know we can finally reach this Goal and close the MASSIVE fundraising gap between me and my Leftist opponent. [](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu7qt2st9ioa4qkfprv1805k0651r6ctr8suvpg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)[Send in any amount you can right now >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm5a5db83qcvghgs6r3u2qjvt98rkdid15a5ift8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)[DONATE ANYTHING YOU CAN >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z742r0u8nvtmse03b64hjc12rld12arqo5uo21t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)Please don't ignore this request - I'm begging you.
I can't thank you enough for your support, Friend. I can't wait to see your donation process.
God bless,Winsome[DONATE NOW >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8v672egnhbasdj79827n8572s34l4ksbndrt200_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c1jmapr4cph2bs)

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party August Newsletter
body:
Our First 2025 Endorsments!

|
## Endorsements
Over the past several months, we've been promoting the importance of these 2025 elections and for good reason. While everyone's political attention is on the things being done in Washington, the lives of Pennsylvanians are more impacted by the things done in their own communities. This is the reason we exist. Building an organization to support candidates looking reflect our forward values is reason we do what we do. Thank you to everyone who working on our candidate research team.
#### It is our pleasure to announce our first PA Forward Party endorsements of 2025.
[Lesa Brackbill](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Ti8dq0HSthkqNcbUN_k82an5R3AKq7rZWNSAcCtzoGV6DhYfW32jsC5f15HShkSZSMSe7Wl3vjVLqaURmG3k6L4YL2J4om5gBnmDOLp3SNjFlYp1OxGhDxc2eEhRJOhZ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=1) \- Independent candidate for Derry Township School Board Director [Danny Ceisler](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=0T30S6r5c37VnexfTBs2wUm5JAqv8rgz9X_854_GJGQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=2)\- Democratic candidate for Bucks County Sheriff [Tommy Feldman](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=1Z4755vj8j2DjmB42s0QxpbuNyWcH2ssKLztUJZQRfMzqdKHjnoWX60rmfPCEYnGGPJ0kAAbrVQd02JmP1Rrmma_tb3jaC1bCkOgO5DAz46LoAMGbU6xKf90nFaa1dqi9PoaddEkRhBMACAwP2RjoQL2DgYw2xlsXum8PLoejhfgu7S-5QogY2sZWESqaURSawo9lA7U2TWxo084J-DQRSGTAElUFB71ZhdPCpV1jvOAGDANAHSykgLYL_Wj2qa_&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=3)\- Republican candidate for Delaware County Controller [Matthew Guglielmello](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=ibIe43eg_cdVNTpN1eVHom5mkD6OsoOmNNFMsGsqDjoca1OgPukGQpkrBZiefo3y&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=4)\- Republican candidate for Lower Macungie Township Commissioner You can check out the pledge they signed [here](https://www.forwardparty.com/pledge/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=5). You'll hear more about these candidates and future endorsed candidates over the next few months. In the meantime, please check them out and offer some support. Let us know if you know of any candidates in your area we should be working with. [
](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodUR-7alEp57O08vr8cfcTeFUloFbffPqlZP8qsSt5ozRpo-ljG0b_nmp5HGri8eilg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=6) Join us August 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We will**too!** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u0Syw_kx-cupiUoDBXFH8I1DFqXFTeuCiy-qttFB29F_V21YBQTeL-EZmazMea671g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=7) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=k1wEMZKawatLobqqoHU4rL-DZ6X72BSvaB6jjTZIDhYDR6D-Swkkxy4V1GmeH3D4eiCn42FmzxK8zRAoPLuB0A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=8) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=k1wEMZKawatLobqqoHU4rL-DZ6X72BSvaB6jjTZIDhaju6AK0mcGaJIyOKKEWUljT3PdaE6H7OvNmUBkJnIQXA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=9) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=k1wEMZKawatLobqqoHU4rL-DZ6X72BSvaB6jjTZIDha4tPCIEBpDH2VWeYxORZsRQOOp_leG1pdEsboKzfumFA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_newsletter&n=10)

clean_body: Our First 2025 Endorsments! | Endorsements Over the past several months, we've been promoting the importance of these 2025 elections and for good reason. While everyone's political attention is on the things being done in Washington, the lives of Pennsylvanians are more impacted by the things done in their own communities. This is the reason we exist. Building an organization to support candidates looking reflect our forward values is reason we do what we do. Thank you to everyone who working on our candidate research team. It is our pleasure to announce our first PA Forward Party endorsements of 2025. \- Independent candidate for Derry Township School Board Director \- Democratic candidate for Bucks County Sheriff \- Republican candidate for Delaware County Controller \- Republican candidate for Lower Macungie Township Commissioner You can check out the pledge they signed . You'll hear more about these candidates and future endorsed candidates over the next few months. In the meantime, please check them out and offer some support. Let us know if you know of any candidates in your area we should be working with. Join us August 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We willtoo! Click below to see more** Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States

name: Uh oh
subject: Rigged by a serial cheater
body:
They know the unpopularity of their actions will lead to a massive backlash at the polls. But they don’t care because they are planning to cheat in upcoming elections.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSUK1O4D33WcQ8uLlmJGmQgPSjQLHZ2v4ry9XvYfxouiTFfhg9W5IIAbaX2S0-pMZq1ycS-I6WCUm6j4vsLEqUw3yh4Ml4Z-2nfbjhZ7GOnnGeUW1dlSXIs91wFJFFaiDfUbZLZyidNwku3-f0Ipakd888gLQbK_khMSqC_a6YQX_wJSwGkwnqzjxGWFydzgGvRFARBdDGJ3cPX1AwchJryQtnnl3UBA-X3p3o8ItkQ=&c=yF4Q4lomjurU3SHqw6TlTN2J0yHjzB_6SE1LDYxZQts5W7JXejSkcA==&ch=_eE_2-GjqHg3epXHKKFl6z6fEH-2kYqkm7sh153PSjCPmmxdYS4R4Q==)
---
| Peter,
This past weekend, Donald Trump was caught blatantly cheating at his Turnberry golf course in Scotland, with a video showing his caddie dropping the president's ball in a favorable position after shanking a drive:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSUK1O4D33WcQ8uLlmJGmQgPSjQLHZ2v4ry9XvYfxouiTFfhg9W5IIAbaX2S0-pMZq1ycS-I6WCUm6j4vsLEqUw3yh4Ml4Z-2nfbjhZ7GOnnGeUW1dlSXIs91wFJFFaiDfUbZLZyidNwku3-f0Ipakd888gLQbK_khMSqC_a6YQX_wJSwGkwnqzjxGWFydzgGvRFARBdDGJ3cPX1AwchJjyTjEG_IRcY5MYQJt9MFDM=&c=yF4Q4lomjurU3SHqw6TlTN2J0yHjzB_6SE1LDYxZQts5W7JXejSkcA==&ch=_eE_2-GjqHg3epXHKKFl6z6fEH-2kYqkm7sh153PSjCPmmxdYS4R4Q==)
---

While barely news worthy, it does highlight one important thing for Democrats to remember about Donald Trump: Trump cheats at literally everything --golf, on his taxes, on his wives, and elections too.
His newest scheme to rig the 2026 midterms could change everything:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSUK1O4D33WcQ8uLlmJGmQgPSjQLHZ2v4ry9XvYfxouiTFfhg9W5IIAbaX2S0-pMZq1ycS-I6WCUm6j4vsLEqUw3yh4Ml4Z-2nfbjhZ7GOnnGeUW1dlSXIs91wFJFFaiDfUbZLZyidNwku3-f0Ipakd888gLQbK_khMSqC_a6YQX_wJSwGkwnqzjxGWFydzgGvRFARBdDGJ3cPX1AwchJttZDoZH6tSh0z-q-PB4RPo=&c=yF4Q4lomjurU3SHqw6TlTN2J0yHjzB_6SE1LDYxZQts5W7JXejSkcA==&ch=_eE_2-GjqHg3epXHKKFl6z6fEH-2kYqkm7sh153PSjCPmmxdYS4R4Q==)
---
Just like the caddie who dropped the ball in a favorable spot after Trump shanked his drive, Texas Republicans are trying to give Trump a more favorable map for the midterms after the disastrous first 7 months of his second term.
Trump and the GOP know their agenda is unpopular. They aren't afraid of the consequences of the inhumane mass deportations, the Epstein coverup, or gutting healthcare for millions by slashing Medicaid. They know the unpopularity of their actions will lead to a massive backlash at the polls. But they don't care because they are planning to cheat in upcoming elections.
Right now, MAGA operatives are quietly dumping millions in this November's Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election. By gaining control of the court, they will have MAGA loyalist judges in place that will allow them to gerrymander PA just as badly as TX, and throw out ballots cast by Democrats.
Unfortunately, this is happening right under Democrats' noses. The media is not covering this election at all and hardly any Democrat organizations are getting involved in this race. Defend our Courts is one of the only Democratic organizations engaged in this race, and we are working to keep up with the tens of millions the GOP is dumping into this race but so far we've only raised $500k since launching in May.
[This race needs to be Democrats primary focus. ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSUK1O4D33WcQ8uLlmJGmQgPSjQLHZ2v4ry9XvYfxouiTFfhg9W5IIAbaX2S0-pMZq1ycS-I6WCUm6j4vsLEqUw3yh4Ml4Z-2nfbjhZ7GOnnGeUW1dlSXIs91wFJFFaiDfUbZLZyidNwku3-f0Ipakd888gLQbK_khMSqC_a6YQX_wJSwGkwnqzjxGWFydzgGvRFARBdDGJ3cPX1AwchJgN0zDxTJwmZHi_KAqoM694=&c=yF4Q4lomjurU3SHqw6TlTN2J0yHjzB_6SE1LDYxZQts5W7JXejSkcA==&ch=_eE_2-GjqHg3epXHKKFl6z6fEH-2kYqkm7sh153PSjCPmmxdYS4R4Q==)[This election is in three months and if MAGA wins,Trump cheating will only get worse. Can we count rush a donation of whatever you can spare so we can stop this serial cheater?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSUK1O4D33WcQ8uLlmJGmQgPSjQLHZ2v4ry9XvYfxouiTFfhg9W5IIAbaX2S0-pMZq1ycS-I6WCUm6j4vsLEqUw3yh4Ml4Z-2nfbjhZ7GOnnGeUW1dlSXIs91wFJFFaiDfUbZLZyidNwku3-f0Ipakd888gLQbK_khMSqC_a6YQX_wJSwGkwnqzjxGWFydzgGvRFARBdDGJ3cPX1AwchJlmM_do3-e7g8_u7CykzBHI=&c=yF4Q4lomjurU3SHqw6TlTN2J0yHjzB_6SE1LDYxZQts5W7JXejSkcA==&ch=_eE_2-GjqHg3epXHKKFl6z6fEH-2kYqkm7sh153PSjCPmmxdYS4R4Q==)

clean_body: They know the unpopularity of their actions will lead to a massive backlash at the polls. But they don’t care because they are planning to cheat in upcoming elections. | | | | | == | Peter, This past weekend, Donald Trump was caught blatantly cheating at his Turnberry golf course in Scotland, with a video showing his caddie dropping the president's ball in a favorable position after shanking a drive: | | == While barely news worthy, it does highlight one important thing for Democrats to remember about Donald Trump: Trump cheats at literally everything --golf, on his taxes, on his wives, and elections too. His newest scheme to rig the 2026 midterms could change everything: | | == Just like the caddie who dropped the ball in a favorable spot after Trump shanked his drive, Texas Republicans are trying to give Trump a more favorable map for the midterms after the disastrous first 7 months of his second term. Trump and the GOP know their agenda is unpopular. They aren't afraid of the consequences of the inhumane mass deportations, the Epstein coverup, or gutting healthcare for millions by slashing Medicaid. They know the unpopularity of their actions will lead to a massive backlash at the polls. But they don't care because they are planning to cheat in upcoming elections. Right now, MAGA operatives are quietly dumping millions in this November's Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election. By gaining control of the court, they will have MAGA loyalist judges in place that will allow them to gerrymander PA just as badly as TX, and throw out ballots cast by Democrats. Unfortunately, this is happening right under Democrats' noses. The media is not covering this election at all and hardly any Democrat organizations are getting involved in this race. Defend our Courts is one of the only Democratic organizations engaged in this race, and we are working to keep up with the tens of millions the GOP is dumping into this race but so far we've only raised $500k since launching in May. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for your support, Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Washington Republicans handpicked my GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Will you help me fight back?
_I have an update to share on our campaign for U.S. Senate from North Carolina:_
Michael Whatley, a DC insider and big oil lobbyist, and Republican National Committee Chair, announced he’s running to defeat me. **Whatley has a record of doing and saying anything to gain President Trump’s personal favor — even if it hurts North Carolinians.** It’s paid off for him so far, earning him the RNC chairmanship and Trump’s endorsement in this U.S. Senate race.
[**Can you rush in a contribution now to help us fight back? Click here to split a contribution between our campaign and Sarah McBride >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250801-1?refcode=em20250801-2234}&refcode2=2234_21716_VXK2yC&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)
You know, I never really wanted to go to Washington. I just wanted to serve the people right here in North Carolina. But we’re facing a moment as fragile as any that I can remember, and we can’t afford to elect a D.C. insider who only stands for his political party and those he lobbied for — not the people of North Carolina.
It’s more important than ever that NC be represented by someone who will do what is right. And on this, I give you my word: I will stand up for your families and do everything in my power to make this country better.
We all know that this isn’t going to be an easy race to win. We’re in for a long, expensive fight no matter what — and Republicans are preparing, too. They plan to spend hundreds of millions in our state, and they even started attacking us _before we officially announced our campaign_ because they’re so concerned about losing this seat and losing the Senate.
[**One way you can help us fight back against Whatley and the GOP machine behind him is by making a grassroots donation right now. Let’s show them that we have the momentum in this race from the get go, and that their mega-donors can’t buy our state. Chip in $10 or $20, split between our campaign and Sarah McBride's team, today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250801-1?refcode=em20250801-2234}&refcode2=2234_21716_VXK2yC&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250801-1?refcode=em20250801-2234&refcode2=2234_21716_VXK2yC&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)**
Thank you for your support,
Roy Cooper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250801-1&t=1&refcode2=2234_21716_VXK2yC&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2234%2E21716%2EVXK2yC)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/521d2b63-f319-4f72-a2c6-2e31e8dd712b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/521d2b63-f319-4f72-a2c6-2e31e8dd712b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
We've got a great week coming up, starting Monday with Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights, Harmeet Dhillon. Tuesday I'm talking with acting ICE Director Todd Lyons, then tune Thursday for our panel featuring Matt Whitlock and Patrice Onwuka. Finally, don't miss my conversation Friday with NY Times White House correspondent, Tyler Pager. Subscribe and turn on notifications to catch it all!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!

## Senators on summer break...
Everybody loves a good summer vacation.
Take a week or so, rest, relax--it can be a great reset.
But a month long vacation?
In the middle of your company's busiest and most crucial work period?
Probably a bad call.
But that's exactly what the Senate is doing right now.
America's on a roll with Trump's wins, but if the Senate slacks off, those unelected bureaucrats will slow-walk his plans.
I get that the August recess is sacred--and I love a vacation as much as the next guy.
The problem is, there are 158 nominees waiting for a Senate vote. It's time to put in the work and keep the momentum going--not let up.
Let's break down what really needs to happen. ...

clean_body: It's time to buckle down and get the job done. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more It's time to buckle down and get the job done. | | | Aug 1| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ICYMI: President Trump reshapes the global trading order... Stories I'm reading... \- via The New York Times \- via The New York Times \- via Politico \- via CNBC \- via Politico \- via Fox Business \- via Newsbusters \- via The Washington Post \- via The New York Times \- via AP News \- via New York Post Start your day in the know Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it! This week on The Sean Spicer Show... We've got a great week coming up, starting Monday with Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights, Harmeet Dhillon. Tuesday I'm talking with acting ICE Director Todd Lyons, then tune Thursday for our panel featuring Matt Whitlock and Patrice Onwuka. Finally, don't miss my conversation Friday with NY Times White House correspondent, Tyler Pager. Subscribe and turn on notifications to catch it all! Wellness update... If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center. If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me! Call Bishop Gold! Gold is over $3000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included. | | ---|---|--- Senators on summer break... Everybody loves a good summer vacation. Take a week or so, rest, relax--it can be a great reset. But a month long vacation? In the middle of your company's busiest and most crucial work period? Probably a bad call. But that's exactly what the Senate is doing right now. America's on a roll with Trump's wins, but if the Senate slacks off, those unelected bureaucrats will slow-walk his plans. I get that the August recess is sacred--and I love a vacation as much as the next guy. The problem is, there are 158 nominees waiting for a Senate vote. It's time to put in the work and keep the momentum going--not let up. Let's break down what really needs to happen. ... name: Raul Ruiz
subject: This is tough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=cKiAFKvGN998LB0vzYHlGx4LnvufYDCM3V6Isy4VsNxdNswEEB0Kiwd9%2BPLEnDewERFkMMiJHYorD14oADf3LMI26EYje%2F87ON9KGo%2BVTLlygoWRfNsatKG59cqnIwPx61MFHxHFrZ2s158q1WFKuQ%2B2q1KjNNZil1FN%2FpTTVHiXzCi1I0%2FCjWbboEkKp3jYycb%2FSfBL%2FFh5dH4MifemgUVHW9XGcwpVyE7U9ObEOMAy0wiTMUpsR5oiqTgPHSeApqCHh0HDj1Yi5uQbxcEP5xjYMI7syWInLcQfSct%2B9V0rSVdIMGmM6x9PngPbKcoVN9l%2B9K4yFXqSpQ4grf5r%2BbB0JmzC%2FjLeqQVkmTAKWvK5qMKWZpzEHPpDkChBxDyhyV%2FwCB0xL%2FJI9tIvEFXWrO3GX0nnLlgAYLy1rPT2mfgjypDdQhVPs%2BqdFm4YBCZS]

# [#]
Hi, it's Raul.

This is tough. I was hoping for a different outcome, but we fell short of our July fundraising goal.

Fighting an uphill battle is exhausting, I know. But right now, the stakes are just too high for us not to stay vigilant.

Donald Trump and his Republican allies are pushing their dangerous agenda forward at full speed — dismantling our democracy, destabilizing our economy, and gutting critical services like healthcare access.

They may have control right now, but there's still a lot we can do.

I want to remind you — I'm here to fight for YOU. Whether it's affordability or healthcare access, I will do everything I can to protect and advance the issues you care about.

I'm calling out Republican extremists, voting against their harmful bills in Congress, and moving forward on bipartisan legislation where possible.

But our efforts are limited until we flip the House and get Republican chaos under control. That's where you come in.

Donald Trump gained 13 points in CA-25 from 2020 to 2024, and Republicans see that as an opportunity. They're already loading up their candidates with big money.

We can't risk losing this seat, and we need to stay on track with our fundraising goals so we have the resources to take on Republican challengers in 2026.

If everyone who reads this email donated just $5 today, we would make up for where we fell short on our July fundraising goal.

So, will you chip in $5 today to help us get back on track to flipping the House blue and stop the out-of-control Republican agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-aug25?amount=5]

DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-aug25?amount=5]

— Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hi, it's Raul. This is tough. I was hoping for a different outcome, but we fell short of our July fundraising goal. Fighting an uphill battle is exhausting, I know. But right now, the stakes are just too high for us not to stay vigilant. Donald Trump and his Republican allies are pushing their dangerous agenda forward at full speed — dismantling our democracy, destabilizing our economy, and gutting critical services like healthcare access. They may have control right now, but there's still a lot we can do. I want to remind you — I'm here to fight for YOU. Whether it's affordability or healthcare access, I will do everything I can to protect and advance the issues you care about. I'm calling out Republican extremists, voting against their harmful bills in Congress, and moving forward on bipartisan legislation where possible. But our efforts are limited until we flip the House and get Republican chaos under control. That's where you come in. Donald Trump gained 13 points in CA-25 from 2020 to 2024, and Republicans see that as an opportunity. They're already loading up their candidates with big money. We can't risk losing this seat, and we need to stay on track with our fundraising goals so we have the resources to take on Republican challengers in 2026. If everyone who reads this email donated just $5 today, we would make up for where we fell short on our July fundraising goal. So, will you chip in $5 today to help us get back on track to flipping the House blue and stop the out-of-control Republican agenda? [] DONATE $5 [] — Raul [] [] [] [] The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] . Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it—Congress is broken.There are politicians who have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.As if it wasn't hard enough to fix anything in Washington, D.C.!But every week President Trump proves that we don’t have to accept the status quo: the demolition of Iran’s nuclear capabilities, NATO upping their contributions, the downsizing of Big Government agencies, etc... George Washington famously served just two terms as President—then went home.But our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves. clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it—Congress is broken.There are politicians who have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.As if it wasn't hard enough to fix anything in Washington, D.C.!But every week President Trump proves that we don’t have to accept the status quo: the demolition of Iran’s nuclear capabilities, NATO upping their contributions, the downsizing of Big Government agencies, etc... If there was ever a chance for big change – it’s now. Today, WE THE PEOPLE, have our best chance to break the career politician’s hold on Congress.But we need to know if you support term limits and how you want to get it done -- and we have to act fast. Our Founding Fathers never intended for government service to be a permanent career. George Washington famously served just two terms as President—then went home.But our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves. That’s why they included a powerful safeguard in our Constitution -- an escape hatch -- enshrined in Article V.If Congress ever became too corrupt to fix itself, Article V. says the states can act.34 states can call a convention, propose an amendment -- like the one being proposed on term limits -- and Congress can’t do a thing about it. Every one of our initiatives for America is led by you – patriots aged 50+. We are AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of Americans, “action” is what we’re known for.President Trump has said that AMAC Action is so effective that members of Congress run the other way when they see our delegates coming down the hall.Washington lifers will certainly be on the run if you tell us you support term limits! Do you agree... > No more golden pensions for people who work 170 days a year and spend half of that time just trying to get reelected.>> No more using the power of the office and insider deals to get rich.>> No more jobs for life with nothing to show for it! Tell us right away if you want us to unleash our AMAC Action delegates and tell us your thoughts on Article V. Nancy Pelosi — 38 years Mitch McConnell — 40 years Maxine Waters — 34 years Chuck Schumer — 44 years They’ve been in the swamp so long they’ve grown gills. Your completed “TIME FOR TERM LIMITS SURVEY” gives AMAC Action our marching orders PLUS it shows a massive groundswell of support for term limits (if that turns out to be the case) to embolden the 34 states needed.That’s why we’re spearheading this massive nationwide survey and why you got my email today. You’ve proven that you’re a patriot who can be counted on to take action. We couldn’t waste any time on people who prefer complaining to acting. We need to reach 1 million patriots with surveys just like the one I’m asking you to fill out.We’re blanketing the country through the mail, email, calls, and reaching patriots in person. All that takes time and money.The Washington lifers are counting on having more power, influence, and resources than the American people. They’re counting on our complacency and despair.But here at AMAC Action, if you agree, we’ll finish the fight our Founders began and restore America’s government to the people!With commands from one million surveys, we’ll know if it’s time to use Article V. to retake the ship. You can see that** singlehandedly, you are an indispensable force multiplier in this effort.But if you do nothing, you let other patriots speak for you. And worse, nothing changes. Immigration policy will never get fixed and just stay a meaningless election year talking point. America’s spending and debt will continue to grow unchecked. Remember when we had a balanced budget? We can get back there if career politicians do something!Social Security will keep getting raided while real policies to protect your benefits sit on the back burner.Healthcare costs will do nothing but skyrocket leaving seniors vulnerable. America’s children will stay trapped in the leftwing indoctrination centers we call “public schools.”And the Washington, D.C. lifers will just get lazier and lazier. But don’t let me decide for you. One million “TIME FOR TERM LIMITS SURVEYS” is a bold goal but we can do it if we all pitch in. Every dollar helps. Every signature counts. Every day matters.Your survey is only 4 questions long – please complete it and respond right away.Thank you and may God bless you and these United States. | | With hope and urgency, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. Our Founding Fathers left us a Constitutional escape hatch in case Congress was sinking the ship. It’s Article V. and if you agree, we can use it to make term limits law. While the Washington lifers are lounging on the Lido deck, we can make history and save America. It’s your choice. Please respond ASAP! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

# [Very Large, but not Beautiful](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F08%2F01%2Fvery-large-but-not-beautiful%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=fd5dd81d11708d8e5f0d234c2a919124&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on August 1, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
On July 4th, President Trump signed into Law the 2025 Budget Reconciliation known as H.R.1 - the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, or OBBBA, as I refer to it.
This bill promises to tear away healthcare and food assistance from millions of Americans while simultaneously extending the 2017 for the ultra-wealthy and adding substantially to our national deficit.
Our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, voted for it...twice.
I have taken the time to create a slideshow presentation to highlight several aspects of this bill for you. Please get comfortable because it is an hour and 18 minutes.
Here is the accompanying slide deck if you would like that as well.
[Beth Farnham's Presentation on H.R.1 - the One Big Beautiful Bill Act](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=336fcb0f16a9a35a7c9cb8ee37b8aba4af1c49f3ce060d51d1f3c65e7fdc15f3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=4998&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=04197196929bc7d10b720d8f688ef884&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vcHJlc2VudGF0aW9uL2QvMUVHSGlUZ0YyMWNvOEppUlV6YkV5VlIzQldIdGYwbGZ2RjEyanBvUlRDcUkvZWRpdD91c3A9c2hhcmluZw=&email_id=12eb1751ce939f9045a998c37d552952)
Sincerely,
Beth

body:
What I tell you next should enrage you.
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21201957/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvREhUczNZNXhxMg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNseWdCUzl6ZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmMwWnJTeEI3SEJYNnhscw/gaIzqYQ/seq9ef976ab)

| |
