| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21201957/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zdW1tZXIyNS1zYi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNseWdCUzl6ZQ/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MDcxMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTNfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWxvZ28/gaIzqYQ/s5q4c19c084)
Patriot, what I tell you next should enrage you.

A recently declassified report details irrefutable evidence that **President Obama, former Director of the CIA John Brennan, and others fabricated the Russia hoax** , promoting the LIE that Vladimir Putin helped President Trump win the 2016 election.

You read that right, Patriot. The Democrats manufactured a complete, alternative reality just to undermine the legitimacy of President Trump.

_**Take a moment and think about all the effects downstream of this betrayal...**_

Now, Tulsi Gabbard is referring former President Obama to the Department of Justice for criminal implications.

THIS is why it is CRITICAL that radical, conniving Democrats, like Obama, do NOT take back any ground we won in 2024.

Turning Point PAC has a plan to build the RED WALL to secure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This is why I need your help to raise $75,000 before the end of the month.

**As part of that plan, we’re giving away my book and exclusive President Trump lithographs when you donate before the end of the month.**
[Donate $25 = Get _Right Wing Revolution_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [Donate $100 = Get Pres. Trump Lithograph and _Right Wing Revolution_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [Donate $250 = Get Signed _Right Wing Revolution_ and Lithograph](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
The last election was an America First mandate, but we cannot afford to rest on our laurels.

You and I must [ACT NOW to build the RED WALL](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21201957/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zdW1tZXIyNS1zYi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNseWdCUzl6ZQ/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MDcxMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTNfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazE/gaIzqYQ/s3jd5dac5b0) by focusing our energy on MUST-WIN battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

Otherwise, these bad actors will come back into power and resume their subversion of our American way of life.

They will destroy everything that this country stands for, namely the Constitution and the Bill of Rights.

Patriot, we now have proof they tried to undermine President Trump’s victory before.

**_What else have the Democrats done to stop us from achieving victory that we don’t even know about yet?_**

This is why we are fighting door-by-door, ballot-by-ballot, to win in critical battleground states.

[It’s also why I’m asking you to pitch in and help us build the RED WALL by donating today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21201957/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zdW1tZXIyNS1zYi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNseWdCUzl6ZQ/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MDcxMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExMTNfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazI/gaIzqYQ/sfsba2d5c13)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

clean_body: I’m officially the target of foreign election interference! A shadowy Leftist dark money group backed by a foreign billionaire just announced their $2 MILLION ad campaign targeting me. | Fellow American, I wanted to share this news with you personally. I’m officially the target of foreign election interference! A shadowy Leftist dark money group backed by a foreign billionaire just announced their $2 MILLION ad campaign targeting me and three other battleground Republican seats across Texas. Democrat insiders hope this new ad spend will put our Republican seat in play in 2026. I don’t need to tell you that $2,000,000 is game-changing and could tip the balance of battleground races determining who controls the House Majority. Because of this announcement, my team is upping our our August grassroots fundraising goal by more than $25,000. I’ll be honest: if I don’t hit that target, I’m in serious trouble, and Democrats have a clear path to the Majority. Fellow American, this is part of a coordinated strategy to not only retake the House Majority but also turn Texas blue. Thank you, Beth Van Duyne GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=s8%2BzjECzY3aHkcoF0YBQ%2F7qyyVQB4AZm%2FP0Al8JmeyUpFsWohJzNPSENIzxjNqmy3UNKgsaCdg98TTr4j%2FwA9whDZHRdKWqR%2FY9%2Fa%2BV8G2aR5wr1WBoOOmrHkmiEpboJSpbmNJCmvBJbUUPiiBZGk4YDf50nsrFmtcvW2MNJ8HcFoe9EyRjSyE%2FxG97Y2zdKXYNqHiNYejDBm%2Be1T%2FbgWLjSdRqqxwnij4nUgleuyL2V5q0EwueUu6keCj9hNBM8vy1RXnl727%2BglMw8FXE%2FEzctsky8%2BDCJfrYcPADEr3O6jpSOIEmPYgIMZSgq59a1OUYlYoIsWI4o0PbIRvfbdd%2BNpBGNoyZzADfghCqtp8sU%2BXc34Npb9mZfSfqb%2BaosxZuRhijxRZZ%2Bsx7KxRm7G2bW%2FXT5vN2NJzGf73JWSxc%3D)

It’s Gabe. We just closed out our fundraising for July, and **I’m proud to let you know that we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.** That might not seem like a big deal in the grand scheme of things, but in a campaign like ours — built on everyday people stepping up here in NM-02 — it means _everything_ to me. I didn’t come into politics the traditional way. I wasn’t groomed for this or handed a clear path. I was raised by a single mom who came to this country from Mexico with nothing but hope and determination. She worked long hours and sacrificed plenty so I’d have a shot at something more. It was her strength that shaped my view of the world — that dignity and hard work matter. And it’s because of her, and families like ours, that I decided to run. Since then, my mission’s been simple: speak up for the people who usually get ignored. For the folks who keep things running but rarely get credit. For the people living in small towns, raising kids, working two jobs, and hoping someone in power finally pays attention. But here’s the hard truth: **empathy is in short supply in our politics right now.** We’re watching lawmakers tear down the very people they should be fighting for. We’re being told that looking out for each other is weakness — that compassion should come second to profit or power. I couldn’t disagree more. There is nothing extreme about caring for our neighbors. There’s nothing soft about standing up for each other. It’s not a weakness — it’s the foundation of strong, thriving communities. I believe we can get back to that. **I believe we _must._** But it won’t happen on its own. It’ll take all of us — organizing, voting, pushing — to replace those who’ve turned their backs on our values with leaders who carry them forward. We’ve got a real shot to start turning things around in 2026 — and lay the groundwork for real, lasting change. And with you on this team, I know we can start building toward something better, together. Thanks again for everything, Gabe Vasquez [P.S. We just launched our August fundraising. If you’re able to pitch in again, even a few dollars will help us keep building momentum. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Gabe. We just closed out our fundraising for July, and I’m proud to let you know that we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. That might not seem like a big deal in the grand scheme of things, but in a campaign like ours — built on everyday people stepping up here in NM-02 — it means everything to me. I didn’t come into politics the traditional way. I wasn’t groomed for this or handed a clear path. I was raised by a single mom who came to this country from Mexico with nothing but hope and determination. She worked long hours and sacrificed plenty so I’d have a shot at something more. It was her strength that shaped my view of the world — that dignity and hard work matter. And it’s because of her, and families like ours, that I decided to run. Since then, my mission’s been simple: speak up for the people who usually get ignored. For the folks who keep things running but rarely get credit. For the people living in small towns, raising kids, working two jobs, and hoping someone in power finally pays attention. But here’s the hard truth: empathy is in short supply in our politics right now. We’re watching lawmakers tear down the very people they should be fighting for. We’re being told that looking out for each other is weakness — that compassion should come second to profit or power. I couldn’t disagree more. There is nothing extreme about caring for our neighbors. There’s nothing soft about standing up for each other. It’s not a weakness — it’s the foundation of strong, thriving communities. I believe we can get back to that. I believe we must. But it won’t happen on its own. It’ll take all of us — organizing, voting, pushing — to replace those who’ve turned their backs on our values with leaders who carry them forward. We’ve got a real shot to start turning things around in 2026 — and lay the groundwork for real, lasting change. And with you on this team, I know we can start building toward something better, together. Thanks again for everything, Gabe Vasquez = | | = | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just called for my prosecution — here's why I won't back down:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi — this is Adam Schiff. The DSCC said I could reach out with this urgent message:

**Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.**

Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I've held him accountable. Because I haven't stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump's latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won't stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.

I'm not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one's weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.

[**Nevertheless, I need your help right now: rush a split donation between me and the DSCC to help us fight for a Democratic Senate majority that will hold Trump accountable.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Adam Schiff for Senate and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)
---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=9&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)
---

Trump doesn't want to talk about skyrocketing prices, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.

But I won't be intimidated. And I won't stop speaking out – not now, not ever.

Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.

He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.

[**Please, rush a split donation to help me and the DSCC fight back by flipping the Senate blue.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)

Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fighting for the American people.

Thank you for standing with me,

Adam

Adam Schiff
Vice Chair, DSCC

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)

Adam Schiff has represented the people of California at the state, congressional, and senatorial level for over 25 years. As a congressman, he worked to hold Trump accountable, and continues that work as a member of the United States Senate.
_**[Will you join Adam Schiff in the fight to stop Donald Trump's agenda by flipping the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250801-AdamSchiff-SchiffTrumpAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20893%2E9716520%2EuopffX)**_

name: John Fetterman
subject: some bad news 😬
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey folks,
It’s John. Just got some bad news. 😬
We _barely_ missed our $20K end-of-month goal. So we’re giving it one more shot – **EXTENDING the deadline 'til midnight TONIGHT.**
We’re nearly there. If everyone reading this chipped in, we’d be done. But not everyone will – so I’m asking: **[Can you step up?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk183-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10232%2E434096%2EmLhASJ)**
We need to tell the truth about what Trump and the Republicans just did this month.
👉 They lied for MONTHS. Said they wouldn’t touch Medicaid.
👉 Then they gutted it anyway. 🤬
👉 Now **300,000 Pennsylvanians are losing coverage.**
👉 **Rural hospitals will be forced to shut down.**
**👉 ERs jammed.**
👉 **Seniors kicked out of nursing homes.**
👉 All to hand tax breaks to Trump’s rich pals. 😤
It’s shameful. It’s cruel. And they _think_ they’ll get away with it.
I’m not gonna let that happen. But I can’t do it alone.
If we hit this goal, we can get the word out. We can show Pennsylvanians exactly who’s screwing them – and start kicking these hacks out of office.
**[So will you pitch in $5 – or whatever you can afford – to get us over the finish line before midnight tonight?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk183-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10232%2E434096%2EmLhASJ)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk183-fr-fl&t=3&akid=10232%2E434096%2EmLhASJ)
---
Thanks for always having my back,
John ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk183-fr-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10232_434096_mLhASJ&akid=10232%2E434096%2EmLhASJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=10232%2E434096%2EmLhASJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10232%2E434096%2EmLhASJ)

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop ICE deportation flights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Earlier this year, Avelo Airlines quietly signed on to fly deportation
flights for ICE, turning our airports into launchpads for tearing families
apart.

Public outcry followed as activists around the country launched anti-Avelo
billboards and public protests over the cruel deportation flights...and
now the pressure is starting to work. Activists – including Our Revolution
members – in Burbank, California just helped push the airline to close its
base there.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33260?source=email-20250801&t=1011&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Headline: Avelo Airlines to close US West Coast base amid backlash over
deportation flights

Next we’re taking the fight to Maryland and Maine to turn up the pressure
and show Avelo – and all airlines – that separating families and powering
ICE’s deportation machine is NOT good for business.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33260?source=email-20250801&t=1012&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Will you take 30 seconds to demand that state and local officials in
Maine, Maryland and beyond REFUSE to do business with Avelo – or any
airline – that runs deportation flights for ICE?

Avelo started flying special charter ICE deportation flights in May.
Protests and vows to boycott the airline soon followed, and haven’t let up
since.

Now, the protests have spread to airports like Maryland’s
Baltimore-Washington International (BWI) airport, which is owned by the
state of Maryland. That means its Governor and transportation officials
have the power to decide which airlines use public resources for their
operations.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33260?source=email-20250801&t=1013&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Headline: Dozens protest over Maryland's BWI Airport over Avelo
Airlines role in ICE deportations

We’re not stopping there. Avelo also operates flights out of Portland,
Maine, where city officials have direct jurisdiction.

This means that decision-makers at airports like BWI and Portland
International Jetport have a choice. They can stand with immigrant
families and refuse to do business with an airline responsible for ripping
families apart – or they can turn a blind eye while our tax dollars
bankroll Trump’s deportation machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33260?source=email-20250801&t=1014&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Grassroots organizing in Burbank worked because the outcry was
impossible to ignore. And now we’re ready to do it again and again until
no airline wants to be associated with ICE’s cruel deportation. Add your
name now to help us flood state and local officials with a clear message:
don’t be complicit in ICE’s deportation pipeline.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33260?source=email-20250801&t=1015&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250801.0UPmrg&t=1008&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250801.n05dxq&t=1009&akid=9112%2E5885482%2EfPebNV ]GIVE MONTHLY

This means that decision-makers at airports like BWI and Portland International Jetport have a choice. They can stand with immigrant families and refuse to do business with an airline responsible for ripping families apart – or they can turn a blind eye while our tax dollars bankroll Trump’s deportation machine. [ ]Grassroots organizing in Burbank worked because the outcry was impossible to ignore. And now we’re ready to do it again and again until no airline wants to be associated with ICE’s cruel deportation. Add your name now to help us flood state and local officials with a clear message: don’t be complicit in ICE’s deportation pipeline. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win. Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. name: Roy Cooper
subject: We officially have our GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Will you help me fight back?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250801_1_cooper?refcode=em20250801-1687&amount=5&refcode2=1687_582294_Hh7brr&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)
_I have an update to share on our campaign for U.S. Senate from North Carolina:_
Yesterday, Michael Whatley, a DC insider and big oil lobbyist, and Republican National Committee Chair, announced he’s running to defeat me. **Whatley has a record of doing and saying anything to gain President Trump’s personal favor — even if it hurts North Carolinians.** It’s paid off for him so far, earning him the RNC chairmanship and Trump’s endorsement in this U.S. Senate race.
[**Can you rush in a contribution now to help us fight back? Click here to split a contribution between our campaign and Chris Pappas >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250801_1_cooper?refcode=em20250801-1687&amount=5&refcode2=1687_582294_Hh7brr&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)
You know, I never really wanted to go to Washington. I just wanted to serve the people right here in North Carolina. But we’re facing a moment as fragile as any that I can remember, and we can’t afford to elect a D.C. insider who only stands for his political party and those he lobbied for — not the people of North Carolina.
It’s more important than ever that NC be represented by someone who will do what is right. And on this, I give you my word: I will stand up for your families and do everything in my power to make this country better.
We all know that this isn’t going to be an easy race to win. We’re in for a long, expensive fight no matter what — and Republicans are preparing, too. They plan to spend hundreds of millions in our state, and they even started attacking us _before we officially announced our campaign_ because they’re so concerned about losing this seat and losing the Senate.
[**One way you can help us fight back against Whatley and the GOP machine behind him is by making a grassroots donation right now. Let’s show them that we have the momentum in this race from the get go, and that their mega-donors can’t buy our state. Chip in $10 or $20, split between our campaign and Chris Pappas's team, today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250801_1_cooper?refcode=em20250801-1687&amount=5&refcode2=1687_582294_Hh7brr&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250801_1_cooper?amount=5&refcode=em20250801-1687&refcode2=1687_582294_Hh7brr&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)**
Thank you for your support,
Roy Cooper
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250801-1?t=1&refcode2=1687_582294_Hh7brr&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1687%2E582294%2EHh7brr)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21724/6374453/af8f4d27c50351a2baceeeb7f7a90536de9f69d1/e6a6cb959801ea1dd184cc9884dc0147161f1cab)

| | |
---
_August 1st, 2025 at 08:56 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP** .

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21724/6374453/03ce0cc686b7213c9ada1c8aaf2bcdda1609e22e/e6a6cb959801ea1dd184cc9884dc0147161f1cab). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21724/6374453/03ce0cc686b7213c9ada1c8aaf2bcdda1609e22e/e6a6cb959801ea1dd184cc9884dc0147161f1cab).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21724/6374453/03ce0cc686b7213c9ada1c8aaf2bcdda1609e22e/e6a6cb959801ea1dd184cc9884dc0147161f1cab)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New Op-Ed: "The Big Beautiful Bill’s Healthcare Opportunity"
body:
The legislation makes it easier for families to join direct primary care practices.| | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=20c7e4c644cb497798807351c982539f&_e=zlKSlFTC4Fqt5SBsw9FqtNyd6oMe6NQiTxP9p2NEM5_mG8YxvAQ-o8MQzgKV4M2O_eMh3scsSAQJGYumuTvEjLaSsXDAFclJPUY8ORJXVZEWuvixMjppG9iBh6KfviD8arYRvz5Lu6kBjE1fGr5xpUQE6blGqj4mvXk8rTDRAdBkMDXoCjSlmu6IDZlt1kp98lOiC7lJFbt9hHOv0ZOpTMLjfK3wXGdIguFJ00p1oMJIwiLXNbAIlLcVALULDpZM4mIDqhadJ5yl1fBuUPEPSYQ62mk6nVSu1bqh65kjPaqPiRl0nfd90bXMintYdI6z)

**The Big Beautiful Bill’s Healthcare Opportunity** _The legislation makes it easier for families to join direct primary care practices._ By Bobby Jindal and Charlie Katebi
---

---
Health-insurance companies have long dictated which doctors Americans can consult, trapping patients in narrow networks and bureaucratic red tape. The One Big Beautiful Bill Act breaks that monopoly. By loosening the grip of insurers and empowering families with greater choice and flexibility, this bold reform restores control to patients.

Most Americans pay for medical care through traditional health insurance provided by their employer or through the individual market. This system puts insurers in charge of determining which physicians and facilities families can visit, often through network restrictions and prior-authorization barriers. It also forces healthcare providers to spend large sums of money on billing departments to request and negotiate payments from health insurers. One 2009 study estimates that physician practices spent 13% of their revenue on administrative overhead for insurance billing and reimbursement. Every dollar that healthcare providers spend on their billing departments shows up in higher prices... [**FINISH READING AT WSJ.COM**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=20c7e4c644cb497798807351c982539f&_e=zlKSlFTC4Fqt5SBsw9FqtCb3Av7mtn497U8e04D8nUFqobFp7ifrAbgFLwQoM3pYIB9ZH6z3AuB9QSoxV7RRzhrivBnve0eYUURCWHTe5clQ_Hs9SQNxWkFJBPaoFOJkry76gwkqsUsL45n074DvJFC0DmvdUEaqdHt9oz21SyXP0s-RiPV6UNkmbhmQ9Aec3RwLnJE261Nwl6IIqwEtRLG5fAEPx_P0symD8qsWV8V6TXNgDx1_F6Z2crNyNiMFEfpyFx0BhXbqlmck18oSk95zmLNMdwgiO-HJgDDBGf9ptscWAAYvqm1HMK6bOlb0ReksCt6Ew_OAxAAcDdgDPlRUtfzwmsB5KDXjJ0LxMw7DVK_qG_AWhXe9jJ0IdYpaYf4z3ckMMx4Gqc4_CbwuuBtQGmQRgnsuUtBSSn-Q7NCwXzKYzz5Kj1igHmScDlGOq2ZQp6Dc2ZgpZLxoDgMIig%3D%3D)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T361e8935-44d4-4da6-b3b6-bf6d39d426e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- August 1
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors,
Wednesday night I voted for two Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block the sale of arms to Israel. To witness the inhumanity of starving children and say nothing is not just a dereliction of duty but of conscience. My [full statement](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1950748916971868539&redir_log=932082665853334) is below:
*******
We've had a busy week here on Capitol Hill and across the state. From working to get legislation passed that will allow Marylanders access to more affordable housing, to introducing critical bipartisan legislation to address fibroids, to demanding answers about Marylanders snatched off the streets by ICE - I've been working hard to get things done despite all of the roadblocks in Washington.
Let's get into it. **Fighting for Maryland Families** This week I voted to pass The Renewing Opportunity in the American Dream to Housing Act of 2025, the Banking Committee's bipartisan housing package that expands and preserves the housing supply, improves housing affordability and access, and cuts red tape. While there are numerous pieces of legislation within the bill, I cosponsored and successfully fought for:
* **The Bipartisan Community Investment and Prosperity Act** , which raises the Public Welfare Investment cap for banks, which will increase financing of housing projects, particularly in Baltimore.
* **The Bipartisan Whole-Home Repairs Act** , which creates a pilot program for low- and middle-income homeowners to use federal funds to make home repairs.
* **The HOME Investment Partnerships Reauthorization and Improvement Act** , which reauthorizes HOME, the federal government's flagship affordable housing grant program for states and cities. Maryland received over $18 million in HOME funding in 2024; this package ensures this will continue.
* **The Appraisal Modernization Act** , which combats bias in home equity valuations to ensure that all Americans have an opportunity to build generational wealth.

The Road to Housing Act of 2025 passed unanimously out of the Committee. This is the Committee's **first bipartisan markup of housing legislation in more than a decade** - a true testament to our nation's desperate need to address the housing crisis, make home ownership a reality, and fight to bring down the cost of rent. Home ownership is one of the surest paths to building wealth. By making housing more affordable, we are blazing new pathways for Americans to build generational wealth and provide for their families. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1950224435564122483&redir_log=377044933715332) [See my full remarks from committee markup here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1950224435564122483&redir_log=377044933715332) Section-by-section of the bill is [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.banking.senate.gov%2fimo%2fmedia%2fdoc%2froad_to_housing_act_of_2025_section_by_section.pdf&redir_log=53384357093668). Legislative text is [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.banking.senate.gov%2fimo%2fmedia%2fdoc%2froad_to_housing_act_of_2025_legislative_text.pdf&redir_log=434488699754654). **U-FIGHT Act** Not only do I continue to fight for the financial prosperity of all Marylanders but also their physical wellbeing. As you may know, we just wrapped up Fibroid Awareness Month, and I am proud to share that I, along with Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-Wy.), introduced the bipartisan Uterine Fibroid Intervention and Gynecological Health Treatment (U-FIGHT) Act. This legislation would expand access to early screening, detection, and intervention methods for individuals diagnosed with uterine fibroids. For too long, uterine fibroids have plagued women. We need to invest in research, raise public awareness, and develop programs for early treatment. No woman should have to suffer in silence. We only now as a country direct about 0.03% of all of our research dollars to fibroids. Remember, again, this is a physically painful issue that affects close to 80% of all of the women in our country. And yet only 0.03% of research dollars are directed to this issue. It is time that changes. I'm so proud to work with my colleague Senator Lummis on this pressing issue that impacts women and families across this country, no matter their politics. "I am proud to reach across the aisle and partner with Senator Alsobrooks to ensure women in Wyoming and across the country suffering from uterine fibroids no longer suffer in silence. Our bipartisan legislation will expand access to screenings and intervention, providing hope to the millions of women who endure this painful condition," said **Senator Lummis**. At the beginning of last month, I met with Academy-award winner Lupita Nyong'o to discuss how we can work together to get the U-FIGHT Act across the finish line and signed into law. I also joined lawmakers and advocates to introduce a package of bills aimed at supporting women with uterine fibroids - including the U-FIGHT Act. [Congresswoman Shontel Brown](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fshontelbrown.house.gov%2fmedia%2fpress-releases%2fcongresswoman-brown-introduces-u-fight-act-fund-research-uterine-fibroids-part&redir_log=020402384981919) (OH-11) introduced the U-FIGHT Act in the U.S. House of Representatives. You can find a link to a recent article in The Hill [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fthehill.com%2fhomenews%2fsenate%2f5427520-uterine-fibroid-research-grants-senate-bill%2f&redir_log=50928977156605), and the legislative text [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2025%2f07%2fU-FIGHTupdated.pdf&redir_log=727158972792526).
**Fighting for Transparency**
ICE Oversight Earlier this week, I, along with Senator Chris Van Hollen, and Representatives Kweisi Mfume, Glenn Ivey, Johnny Olszewski, Jr., and Sarah Elfreth conducted oversight on the Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) facility in Baltimore and on the President's draconian and inhumane tactics he is employing - throwing innocent people in jail, housing undocumented people in awful conditions, snatching people off the street, and more. We were denied access to the facility despite it being within our constitutional authority and our Congressional responsibility to conduct oversight. It was abundantly clear that the people working in this facility have been instructed to hide the horror of the inhumane treatment of the people in their custody. And the man behind it all - Donald Trump - clearly does not care about any of us. His inhumanity is not limited to the people of these facilities. We recently had an awful flood in Western Maryland. People's lives were disrupted and their homes and livelihoods taken away. And what is the response of this Administration: deny Maryland disaster relief. You know why? Because he couldn't care less, really, about any of us. I will continue to fight for answers, demand transparency, and work to ensure due process for every individual in our state. Epstein Files As I'm sure many of you have heard, the President is attempting to hide the contents of the so-called Epstein Files from the American public. [New reporting ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.wsj.com%2fpolitics%2ftrump-jeffrey-epstein-birthday-letter-we-have-certain-things-in-common-f918d796%3fgaa_at%3deafs%26gaa_n%3dASWzDAh4Qi_euHRmSVSXqm9ykklK8KB7KLVwwPOcHnP4kDgTkGN9cYpPzswTxlC9YpU%253D%26gaa_ts%3d688b944c%26gaa_sig%3dhe8Hb4nMZMi5xM6J6hvU0S-sfbPSGax5Ljmy0i6Js5IvFN-rTUzsnBLzLr21Nav2Zf7ZN33Rpu8XH6CIzVqUuw%253D%253D&redir_log=259221890552138)has come out that suggest the President may have had a closer relationship to this criminal than previously disclosed. That's why I cosponsored **The Epstein Files Transparency Act** , a bill requiring the Attorney General to release all relevant Department of Justice documents and records relating to Jeffrey Epstein. This bill directs the Department of Justice, including the FBI and U.S. Attorneys' Offices, to release materials related to:
* Investigations and prosecutions of Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell;
* Flight logs, travel records, and other transportation data;
* Individuals and entities connected to Epstein's activities and immunity deals;
* Internal DOJ communications and decisions not to prosecute;
* Records surrounding Epstein's detention and death.

Importantly, the legislation includes strong protections for victims' privacy and national security, while explicitly prohibiting redactions based on reputational harm or political sensitivity.
**Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to work hard to fight for Marylanders. From fighting to address reproductive care to assisting our veterans through service dogs to ensuring each of us has access to the health care we need, I wanted to share some of the legislation I cosponsored over the last week.
First-Time Homebuyer Tax Credit Act of 2025 This bill would establish a refundable tax credit worth up to 10 percent of a home's price (to a maximum of $15,000) for first-time homebuyers. John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act This bill would provide a process to determine which states and localities with a recent history of voting rights violations must preclear election changes with the Department of Justice. Caucus Health Repeal Bill to One Big Beautiful Bill Act This bill would repeal the health provisions included in the Republican reconciliation bill. The legislation would eliminate all provisions under Subtitle B of the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," restoring protections under the Affordable Care Act and Medicaid that were weakened or eliminated. Access to Fertility Treatment and Care Act This legislation would require comprehensive coverage of fertility treatment and preservation services across public and private health plans, including Medicaid and Medicare, helping to ensure that all Americans have equitable access to reproductive care. Family and Medical Insurance Leave (FAMILY) Act This legislation would create a comprehensive national program administered by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to guarantee all workers up to 12 weeks of paid parental, medical, and caregiving leave. Lumbee Fairness Act This bipartisan bill would grant federal recognition to the Lumbee Tribe of North Carolina and ensure its members are eligible for all services and benefits that other tribes receive. There are 10,000 Lumbee living in Maryland. All Aboard Act This bill would make actionable investments in today's rail network and provide the funding needed to transform the future of transportation. Ensuring Lasting Smiles Act This bipartisan bill would require private insurance plans to cover medically necessary diagnosis and treatment for individuals with congenital anomalies, including reconstructive and dental procedures often denied as cosmetic. Captive Primate Safety Act This bill would prohibit the sale, breeding, and possession of nonhuman primates (such as chimpanzees and monkeys) for the pet trade. This prohibition is narrowly focused on pet primates and exempts zoos, research labs, sanctuaries, and universities. Better CARE for Animals Act This bipartisan bill would strengthen the enforcement capabilities of the Animal Welfare Act for the Department of Justice (DOJ). The bill would also facilitate better cooperation between the DOJ and U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA). Service Dogs Assisting Veterans Act This bipartisan bill would establish a five-year pilot program at the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to award grants to nonprofit organizations that provide trained service dogs to eligible veterans living with mobility limitations, post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), and other service-connected conditions. Resolution acknowledging the 35th Anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) This resolution reaffirms the ADA's promise of inclusion, independent living, and equal opportunity for individuals with disabilities, while urging continued action to break down remaining barriers. **Delivering for You** Our office has been working hard to deliver for Marylanders, and I'm happy to share a few success stories from our constituent services team over the last week.
* Successfully resolved a Social Security Administration survivor benefits case for a constituent that had a 60 day delay.
* Secured a 30 day hold on an IRS collections case so the constituent could submit an Offer in Compromise.
* Secured an I-94 expedited for a constituent who needs to be added to UNOS (organ transplant list) for a liver transplant. We resolved the issue in a day.
* Reinstated a constituent's Medicare application so they can retire and get health benefits.
* Secured an I-485 approval for a constituent, and now they are a green card holder.

Our constituent services team stands ready to assist you! If you are a veteran who needs help navigating the Department of Veterans Affairs, if you're having trouble navigating Social Security, the IRS or immigration, please reach out to our team by filling out the applicable form [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fservices%2fcasework%2f&redir_log=48139330565369). **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15666.10882509.5562797.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

The HOME Investment Partnerships Reauthorization and Improvement Act , which reauthorizes HOME, the federal government's flagship affordable housing grant program for states and cities. Maryland received over $18 million in HOME funding in 2024; this package ensures this will continue. The Appraisal Modernization Act , which combats bias in home equity valuations to ensure that all Americans have an opportunity to build generational wealth. The Road to Housing Act of 2025 passed unanimously out of the Committee. This is the Committee's first bipartisan markup of housing legislation in more than a decade - a true testament to our nation's desperate need to address the housing crisis, make home ownership a reality, and fight to bring down the cost of rent. Home ownership is one of the surest paths to building wealth. By making housing more affordable, we are blazing new pathways for Americans to build generational wealth and provide for their families. Section-by-section of the bill is . Legislative text is . U-FIGHT Act Not only do I continue to fight for the financial prosperity of all Marylanders but also their physical wellbeing. As you may know, we just wrapped up Fibroid Awareness Month, and I am proud to share that I, along with Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-Wy.), introduced the bipartisan Uterine Fibroid Intervention and Gynecological Health Treatment (U-FIGHT) Act. This legislation would expand access to early screening, detection, and intervention methods for individuals diagnosed with uterine fibroids. For too long, uterine fibroids have plagued women. We need to invest in research, raise public awareness, and develop programs for early treatment. No woman should have to suffer in silence. We only now as a country direct about 0.03% of all of our research dollars to fibroids. Remember, again, this is a physically painful issue that affects close to 80% of all of the women in our country. And yet only 0.03% of research dollars are directed to this issue. It is time that changes. I'm so proud to work with my colleague Senator Lummis on this pressing issue that impacts women and families across this country, no matter their politics. "I am proud to reach across the aisle and partner with Senator Alsobrooks to ensure women in Wyoming and across the country suffering from uterine fibroids no longer suffer in silence. Our bipartisan legislation will expand access to screenings and intervention, providing hope to the millions of women who endure this painful condition," said Senator Lummis. At the beginning of last month, I met with Academy-award winner Lupita Nyong'o to discuss how we can work together to get the U-FIGHT Act across the finish line and signed into law. I also joined lawmakers and advocates to introduce a package of bills aimed at supporting women with uterine fibroids - including the U-FIGHT Act. (OH-11) introduced the U-FIGHT Act in the U.S. House of Representatives. You can find a link to a recent article in The Hill , and the legislative text . Fighting for Transparency ICE Oversight Earlier this week, I, along with Senator Chris Van Hollen, and Representatives Kweisi Mfume, Glenn Ivey, Johnny Olszewski, Jr., and Sarah Elfreth conducted oversight on the Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) facility in Baltimore and on the President's draconian and inhumane tactics he is employing - throwing innocent people in jail, housing undocumented people in awful conditions, snatching people off the street, and more. We were denied access to the facility despite it being within our constitutional authority and our Congressional responsibility to conduct oversight. It was abundantly clear that the people working in this facility have been instructed to hide the horror of the inhumane treatment of the people in their custody. And the man behind it all - Donald Trump - clearly does not care about any of us. His inhumanity is not limited to the people of these facilities. We recently had an awful flood in Western Maryland. People's lives were disrupted and their homes and livelihoods taken away. And what is the response of this Administration: deny Maryland disaster relief. You know why? Because he couldn't care less, really, about any of us. I will continue to fight for answers, demand transparency, and work to ensure due process for every individual in our state. Epstein Files As I'm sure many of you have heard, the President is attempting to hide the contents of the so-called Epstein Files from the American public. come out that suggest the President may have had a closer relationship to this criminal than previously disclosed. That's why I cosponsored The Epstein Files Transparency Act , a bill requiring the Attorney General to release all relevant Department of Justice documents and records relating to Jeffrey Epstein. This bill directs the Department of Justice, including the FBI and U.S. Attorneys' Offices, to release materials related to: Investigations and prosecutions of Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell; Flight logs, travel records, and other transportation data; Individuals and entities connected to Epstein's activities and immunity deals; Internal DOJ communications and decisions not to prosecute; Records surrounding Epstein's detention and death. Importantly, the legislation includes strong protections for victims' privacy and national security, while explicitly prohibiting redactions based on reputational harm or political sensitivity. Fighting Through Legislation I continue to work hard to fight for Marylanders. From fighting to address reproductive care to assisting our veterans through service dogs to ensuring each of us has access to the health care we need, I wanted to share some of the legislation I cosponsored over the last week. First-Time Homebuyer Tax Credit Act of 2025 This bill would establish a refundable tax credit worth up to 10 percent of a home's price (to a maximum of $15,000) for first-time homebuyers. John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act This bill would provide a process to determine which states and localities with a recent history of voting rights violations must preclear election changes with the Department of Justice. Caucus Health Repeal Bill to One Big Beautiful Bill Act This bill would repeal the health provisions included in the Republican reconciliation bill. The legislation would eliminate all provisions under Subtitle B of the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," restoring protections under the Affordable Care Act and Medicaid that were weakened or eliminated. Access to Fertility Treatment and Care Act This legislation would require comprehensive coverage of fertility treatment and preservation services across public and private health plans, including Medicaid and Medicare, helping to ensure that all Americans have equitable access to reproductive care. Family and Medical Insurance Leave (FAMILY) Act This legislation would create a comprehensive national program administered by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to guarantee all workers up to 12 weeks of paid parental, medical, and caregiving leave. Lumbee Fairness Act This bipartisan bill would grant federal recognition to the Lumbee Tribe of North Carolina and ensure its members are eligible for all services and benefits that other tribes receive. There are 10,000 Lumbee living in Maryland. All Aboard Act This bill would make actionable investments in today's rail network and provide the funding needed to transform the future of transportation. Ensuring Lasting Smiles Act This bipartisan bill would require private insurance plans to cover medically necessary diagnosis and treatment for individuals with congenital anomalies, including reconstructive and dental procedures often denied as cosmetic. Captive Primate Safety Act This bill would prohibit the sale, breeding, and possession of nonhuman primates (such as chimpanzees and monkeys) for the pet trade. This prohibition is narrowly focused on pet primates and exempts zoos, research labs, sanctuaries, and universities. Better CARE for Animals Act This bipartisan bill would strengthen the enforcement capabilities of the Animal Welfare Act for the Department of Justice (DOJ). The bill would also facilitate better cooperation between the DOJ and U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA). Service Dogs Assisting Veterans Act This bipartisan bill would establish a five-year pilot program at the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to award grants to nonprofit organizations that provide trained service dogs to eligible veterans living with mobility limitations, post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), and other service-connected conditions. Resolution acknowledging the 35th Anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) This resolution reaffirms the ADA's promise of inclusion, independent living, and equal opportunity for individuals with disabilities, while urging continued action to break down remaining barriers. Delivering for You Our office has been working hard to deliver for Marylanders, and I'm happy to share a few success stories from our constituent services team over the last week. Successfully resolved a Social Security Administration survivor benefits case for a constituent that had a 60 day delay. Secured a 30 day hold on an IRS collections case so the constituent could submit an Offer in Compromise. Secured an I-94 expedited for a constituent who needs to be added to UNOS (organ transplant list) for a liver transplant. We resolved the issue in a day. Reinstated a constituent's Medicare application so they can retire and get health benefits. Secured an I-485 approval for a constituent, and now they are a green card holder. Our constituent services team stands ready to assist you! If you are a veteran who needs help navigating the Department of Veterans Affairs, if you're having trouble navigating Social Security, the IRS or immigration, please reach out to our team by filling out the applicable form . Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at . You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks United States Senator

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: He had no choice
body:
| | |
---
Dear Peter,I’m writing to you today because a Soros-funded prosecutor is trying to lock my police officer husband up for the next 11 years for saving a fellow officer’s life. **[And your petition to President Donald Trump is my last chance to save my family from being torn apart.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfDIHSiB_LQyx2cJUVfwskHFfO8mDw0A6ON2NihPwCaQemCYaU0uAsISk0rne1pDw3KcAI37g3ftuCtN1vG9tFhAjNLI2x1COm0CeYzspusQVBlwFsqFGYbkKD_FNlSpNFO-5SkUIyUA80JsK02AHcwDFSi8qAzR0Fe8HTPhzZ7wl_kRjl9C-joMerLrlZgOrc55jE7bSKsX4t0Ih_O6Y0ZBAHzNmAwM93jwV76_6nOBQnhN4CaBaL4hz-sBigoAbRQg5y7jTERJg0JJGE8j9XDjHL2smCEHntZDxkvrLan0QQbdbRI1EhBy7LKYJuwVyjB3q40dQu_9tuV5hg_g5MvSksvRVc_GmaWMvzaeHEaucFDB9zUwIwGeT7rbVxuzlnwKrpBmLupitUwZgv0alPoyFSC6dK8kcHl_AHbtDHeO8hxNh-AW_CW9aw8w7UdaEJHld8A2iF5T2TcaY0BVXgTx)**
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfB26Pruehi36z_zAE6InwKqksRHQug5eldmILmo_RWYDzI4GOEDDmhcRalOuSYrou0qSztdREkDaZ35odaZ2Y1NOjqHHluJk39ghR0Qa7j9Ht_lrdnGX1IdPMtspdST9czOwS-eww220LxRfodA6OHkCK_jLczWrAylxmEgCwbiA0_ER4jABTkOL61FFdluWzcAM3vtHe9kqbR52AVfs0_r5pnVQ0q_Ik79zeAcInoy5xL_3eI1MS1qHgGYKjgA28aKx8uFoEJUw-NNUScJ3nd2AGsu1EF3AttCndW4uBMb7rpW3vOi_ZILxyHuB34mf-fnN6grEXMIXvCv-KsLEvBEvADgm4ItKlZvFhIvnDd6zMdElRdAk6HqLDR02etN0584K8kqFfPfyVlbBk7U0J1WIG2UhqRUD8odyW2Aj53F2hPBkg0QCRYL_lM_Ti62aRdBH36-MJqZNzb6ppmAsxBD)
---
The picture I’ve sent you is of Brad with our two boys. To them, he’s not just their dad – he’s their hero. Peter, in 10 years as an officer with the Las Cruces Police Department, my husband had never fired his service weapon on the line of duty. But when his partner was lying stunned on the pavement – and the robbery suspect who knocked him down and tried to take his service weapon was aiming the officer’s stolen taser right at him... ...Brad knew he had no choice. He drew his pistol and fired a single shot, killing the suspect and saving his partner’s life. When Brad got home and told me what happened, I couldn’t stop crying. I was so grateful he was alive. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared Brad of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn’t have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the New Mexico Attorney General, Raul Torrez, charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! You see, Raul Torrez is an out-of-control prosecutor who hates the police. His campaign was funded by leftist billionaire George Soros. And he’s determined to make a name for himself by destroying Brad. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect’s family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a “racist” and a “cold-blooded killer.” It only got worse at the trial. And when the jury declared my husband guilty and Brad was led off to jail, it felt like our lives were over. But my heartbreak turned into rage when I found out two details weeks after the trial ended:
---
**#1. During the trial, the judge accidentally dismissed two jurors Brad’s legal team had chosen during jury selection, replacing them with alternates. ** **#2. One of the jurors was secretly an outspoken anti-police activist. **
---
Peter, this juror is a member of a radical anti-police group. They even participated in anti-police protests. And during jury selection, they failed to disclose any of this. In a sane world, this should have been enough to force Raul Torrez to request a re-trial – or drop the case completely. But that’s not the world we live in. Instead, he’s fighting all the way to the New Mexico Supreme Court to protect this lying juror and keep my husband’s unjust conviction in place. **[That’s why I’m asking you to sign the enclosed petition to President Trump.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfCUoc6UCRugih19l90FLB29RNZ9pANndzdCdl5EYFbyVCHcySAtkfXdMVYu0rjIZBvfzEXpzHR_FF8vHVBr3dNt4fUb5Pv2yxC9Vs4DNGvJ0XkMuDrCcRttCEVpPGTuSqmrOJaNJ2N6EzfsZWLMvqZm5SZBeXHB0r2EnpLsDF2leTUugezW5V44_XpiXxO-rhC8xVpPgiWebJZgHy-KLQivZdgqdede6IZ-fyB9qbukyILlWuL6vUbZYjFYChADG2l9aJvWkUHnXLkWGuVhQBNY9lwS2vKgaTX_lXXaW1nQgSxjw0u-DOnKzg4EfgaF9BzKOSGZUEPmwhmlj-0gsenmu92cI27YLHP5EVUzDQb7clFaCiGom-KmFP8JOSgvKyjXJM52_1B1MLjFWXf4bnr-p_eyyfdV7nFnaXOjfEYOdnTWyQNJIzURa32aaS8IhqsB8y5LnLuU5IJz7D7AFhJS)** Because if it wasn’t clear before, it is now... This was never about justice. It’s a politicized witch hunt of an innocent man just because he worse a badge. President Trump calls it “lawfare.” And the only way to put a stop to it is good people like you standing up for my husband and saying “NO MORE!” With your petition, you’re asking President Trump to order his Department of Justice to open an investigation into the unjust, politically motivated prosecution of my husband. **[Please take just a minute right now to sign and submit your petition.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfALB4BDkJYzeyR0r-zkEjGSrRSY4YscwpMfKb0uxxYgksUp25s_5KOnK3xFhpgJVx9MQtAuS4Q1HJN64YTZtxZ-aj-jFLxlogfMZyEEjjOybO2WXpDgpvWCoQc2B7F7Moa3Rnvuqsoz3Mm4IF0klIp9-T_-gIgh0tmiCvQYNBkBH2gH7IzDW7MfZGTulIMfkflGMmaOtkT-W7edowh2wHidfNpRXe99tRg_mnEeo95ff14OXPXG84D_aBm06aLgYDaqvUlwlRv614q_bjQGOCWs7JN7U_2tIyCC4RLQ61FigErUuEkkUfMH-NI5I_SXb-k6j4oU3oGPM9dczhJnh3ab5LOgzVibcSrUVWYxyYGm4a6MbPgyZK0yKAMiKEDcN-SVC1ue79wDM_iQIqbrHcSW_oBYe3csA7jYew9dPH5Dtm4NTarGEA2h-Qblug4ETngt6A5a4cq5-H43MEzbSP-4)** Because my husband doesn’t deserve this. He’s an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That’s why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it’s why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he’s a wonderful husband and incredible father to our 9- and 6- year-old sons. We’ve tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what’s going on. But they’re too young to fully understand. And I can’t bear to think of what it will do to them if they’re forced to grow up with him behind bars. But that’s exactly what will happen if Raul Torrez gets his way. For a long time, stopping this witch hunt seemed impossible. But thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer – and he’s the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers...like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers – and their families – when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own – I was certainly hopeless. LELDF is helping my husband get the legal defense he deserves by paying for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. And they’re also helping fund this petition drive to President Trump. LELDF was an answer to prayer for our family. And today I’m hoping you’ll be an answer to prayer too. **[When you submit your signed petition...would you please send in a contribution today to LELDF to help defend my husband?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfAvs2t0YTQvVEuGuy95lz_I9-d6Y1MbXF5nj2S4gAdMReSlgIOOHxIJRENhs4faU4_s3I73YwZ6SA9iZm9IyrAgCvn7AKEA7n5kB_6PP2DPP1T-qZMVWabCBA6ZJpEgWKyiLOx4tv5pN3DFzXzaupAZL2r61EjZ2PKb8MQ_-qE4OQFbES-aLFqUozosmWklZtv7IYn9S5HNWOp4hUidQ4HfWJN5uq_bOXxndy99NRUtCi7-yogXgyWO81an_Pf3uwJrRyu57BM6Ma62G5SJddxhu5WJcnQ-WgnOze-mtOh5VaClTBkUa8imGKc5FKqWG29l_lt5mAzXW3bR2qaFR9H3TU40Tb-nrxbMPFmAHIs3Zob9xKgcH76NjIiK_k7E1-gfg9RvRvCg3LnRHTRhBU7ZpaJ28jdNQneQcyyjrFAmVfJkakrii0cFtWgtUxRR4lb9T1nrAB1l4AR1zTZLTfSn)** Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. Because LELDF is a nonprofit, your gift is tax-deductible too. But whatever you can give, **[the most important thing is that you rush back your signed petition and your tax-deductible gift as soon as you can – right now if possible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfAyX7gaN3LkDYNt3BUsZcKrwCzqbyN5yAJ9yGR4s6GlLHxP9cSr7XSHkPqSecaUkQg0w1idYbncrYTAPI6cQE5KxdGSJUzeb7BXjDZ-ONRHuUigkkjyUIRcwzRvXLFJ7mH1vsUecUCt86eEHln7S-OJxU-8lp63SdPSMSLccY_08Kvurr6FFaaDTdxFvQMn9lWULZ_KKFmyVQWg5myHcnhCdT1nJaKiZ34uJ-dtmgdpQROAGkbGPaI2RuKm_XqNGfs8emHM-NNw5f7iCea29YhpRuRA15mZJlwhZVES90X4vnfxIWleqLtk8Upyiju5ZI6s1cDCdlzsDqrbnhWCCJRK46XE1GYN9nJF0oPdlRTocCEh2uSbHO5RWiFa3D_Eko1T-jsHd7kSFZR-IaujBOuAbVgLIhEacNgOgSJ8FUVzqYfUmGDeBhU-B4be2hLqjljd32NbUkb27ab-xyujehII)** I need to deliver your petition to President Trump as soon as possible. And your petition and $35 gift could be the difference between stopping this witch hunt... ...or my husband spending the next 11 years behind bars. I’m sorry this email wound up being so long. Thank you for taking the time to read it today. And thank you in advance for helping defend my Brad from this witch hunt.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. The last three years have been a never-ending nightmare for my family. And right now, you’re our only hope. **[Please rush back your signed petition to President Trump and your tax-deductible gift of $35 or more as soon as you can.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=af5da278cdc64480ac23ca3422033e10&_e=Tc4MfByu3DbLlg7vWNogTiSaR7Br41fDbPR763M-Z0oozJiaTAXRjo2JiJuIkU8rn9MVbOZ_lHiHDNJ5IWmYJofvP8DieCj2Cm9HB_qzOUPaD45RW5-ht-Hr6mv1Nw0S97a8i_NHlV_WXgGr4yYqjVAXwxzU5An-XZhNwDMVlokPWpsYZ412Siv9_4s0XEoQRRx9LZZqfEuaOZkTKf3uDYZ2Hk0rZa2iVHO9nEd9kfCzkFKd8dNP-rbUj4_qh954Dr7V0PHTxhebbnhBFgcxMwkBbfYxlzUfFf57CULAhI536qqnkVBBMqVfwRGTMpuhPNSQ3b7lUwcMQFX9zT3IS4Jhca3C4z4J4X15R-rwKn7JglCfYHTBdA_HTWGFQe8UzqkNyTuRjxPJnDGw7UwaU5hnv7Q5SpcuQVsF1A3SZ3iaceJwZ2nT-jDMBDegmRlmx9G9qlxJwpEi9MOpFjpK9reMxpAM2I-bajVy_--qPnj8yFM5rTq0kpJ2e3XfstDW9C4uAg0ICBj62RZq-4bVHiqkpQTrSepnMO9QZaZmwiKKIBlJ9eOSoJNPU5oLyB3m2oexjkK2dsxiaJEoJvFpAXgHBxVY-ANTU2QqkTs6XbaEJWmSFL2SIPVEYLJQiIknFHoFyrlYMoRGwsF-xSYc8GoH5I2jAuU915sV00_fDHxbzaJlpmXHxsP_j3uFllr1)** My husband doesn’t deserve to spend the next 11 years in prison for saving a fellow officer’s life. And my boys don’t deserve to have their father locked up. If he’s ripped away from us, they’ll never recover. Thank you for doing what you can to help our family!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund |
