clean_body: | | | Dear Peter,I’m writing to you today because a Soros-funded prosecutor is trying to lock my police officer husband up for the next 11 years for saving a fellow officer’s life. The picture I’ve sent you is of Brad with our two boys. To them, he’s not just their dad – he’s their hero. Peter, in 10 years as an officer with the Las Cruces Police Department, my husband had never fired his service weapon on the line of duty. But when his partner was lying stunned on the pavement – and the robbery suspect who knocked him down and tried to take his service weapon was aiming the officer’s stolen taser right at him... ...Brad knew he had no choice. He drew his pistol and fired a single shot, killing the suspect and saving his partner’s life. When Brad got home and told me what happened, I couldn’t stop crying. I was so grateful he was alive. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared Brad of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn’t have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the New Mexico Attorney General, Raul Torrez, charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! You see, Raul Torrez is an out-of-control prosecutor who hates the police. His campaign was funded by leftist billionaire George Soros. And he’s determined to make a name for himself by destroying Brad. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect’s family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a “racist” and a “cold-blooded killer.” It only got worse at the trial. And when the jury declared my husband guilty and Brad was led off to jail, it felt like our lives were over. But my heartbreak turned into rage when I found out two details weeks after the trial ended: #1. During the trial, the judge accidentally dismissed two jurors Brad’s legal team had chosen during jury selection, replacing them with alternates. #2. One of the jurors was secretly an outspoken anti-police activist. Peter, this juror is a member of a radical anti-police group. They even participated in anti-police protests. And during jury selection, they failed to disclose any of this. In a sane world, this should have been enough to force Raul Torrez to request a re-trial – or drop the case completely. But that’s not the world we live in. Instead, he’s fighting all the way to the New Mexico Supreme Court to protect this lying juror and keep my husband’s unjust conviction in place. Because if it wasn’t clear before, it is now... This was never about justice. It’s a politicized witch hunt of an innocent man just because he worse a badge. President Trump calls it “lawfare.” And the only way to put a stop to it is good people like you standing up for my husband and saying “NO MORE!” With your petition, you’re asking President Trump to order his Department of Justice to open an investigation into the unjust, politically motivated prosecution of my husband. Because my husband doesn’t deserve this. He’s an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That’s why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it’s why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he’s a wonderful husband and incredible father to our 9- and 6- year-old sons. We’ve tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what’s going on. But they’re too young to fully understand. And I can’t bear to think of what it will do to them if they’re forced to grow up with him behind bars. But that’s exactly what will happen if Raul Torrez gets his way. For a long time, stopping this witch hunt seemed impossible. But thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer – and he’s the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers...like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers – and their families – when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own – I was certainly hopeless. LELDF is helping my husband get the legal defense he deserves by paying for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. And they’re also helping fund this petition drive to President Trump. LELDF was an answer to prayer for our family. And today I’m hoping you’ll be an answer to prayer too. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. Because LELDF is a nonprofit, your gift is tax-deductible too. But whatever you can give, I need to deliver your petition to President Trump as soon as possible. And your petition and $35 gift could be the difference between stopping this witch hunt... ...or my husband spending the next 11 years behind bars. I’m sorry this email wound up being so long. Thank you for taking the time to read it today. And thank you in advance for helping defend my Brad from this witch hunt. Sincerely, Lacy Lunsford P.S. The last three years have been a never-ending nightmare for my family. And right now, you’re our only hope. My husband doesn’t deserve to spend the next 11 years in prison for saving a fellow officer’s life. And my boys don’t deserve to have their father locked up. If he’s ripped away from us, they’ll never recover. Thank you for doing what you can to help our family! | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

subject: Happy Colorado Day! ⛰️

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, Happy Colorado Day!

Today marks the 149th anniversary of our great state joining the Union.

From our mountains to our main streets, we’ve got a lot to be proud of. And here at Team Crow, we’re taking a moment to celebrate the values that make Colorado special: service, independence, progress, and community.

Jason has spent his life fighting for those values — on the battlefield, in the courtroom, and now in Congress. Whether he’s defending democracy, working to lower costs for Colorado families, or protecting our public lands, Jason’s never backed down from a tough fight.

With Donald Trump and his far-right cronies in the House pushing a dangerous, extremist agenda, Jason’s leadership is more important now than ever.
This Colorado Day, we’re asking folks to show their pride by powering a campaign that puts people first — right here in the Centennial State.

Can you chip in today to fuel Jason’s work and keep Colorado values strong in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=]

body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250801-1459-foote&t=1001&akid=1459%2E342411%2E6eXidY ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We want to say it loud and clear: Thank you.

Your support means everything. Because of
you, the Squad can keep pushing forward — standing up for bold progressive
values, challenging the status quo, and fighting for a country that works
for everyone.

You’re not just a
supporter. You’re an
essential part of this movement. The truth is, we wouldn’t be able to do
this without you showing up, time and again.

Together, we’re proving that real power comes from the people, not
corporate PACs or billionaires. Because of you, we’re not just fighting —
we’re creating change.

From all of us at the Squad Victory Fund: Thank you for standing with us
and fueling this progressive movement.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing strong against Trump
and MAGA Republicans’ authoritarianism — but they cannot do it alone.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service.

1\. **The Post Office is enshrined in the US Constitution and created by an act of Congress.** _Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional!_

2\. **Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service** — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities.

3\. **It’s a threat to our elections.** Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy.

We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely.

**[As New Dems fight to defend working Americans’ access to the USPS, we need you to have our back! Can you add your name to defend the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112573551/560925724/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250801_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTI0YWUxOC1mYjZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Oa7WsBhSdtOXZH30eW-_mZhvsg8IjvpdR-QWny1tZI=&emci=6ab1e7e6-e66e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7524ae18-fb6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump wants to turn the White House into Mar-a-Lago. Stop him.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stop Trump’s Plan to Turn the White House into a Gaudy Monstrosity](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85dbd789-6048-44b7-adbf-c0e729f1d3f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4f896cc-e76c-4619-8c1c-aead7eb8e73c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Donald Trump is trying to turn our nation's most iconic and sacred building into a[personal vanity project](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f7eea28-1aae-4a04-8bfa-a3a152a2a08c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** He is pushing to add a massive, gold-trimmed ballroom to the White House—complete with wildly inappropriate chandeliers, marble statues, and other stuff you'd expect from a guy with gold-plated toilets. **This isn't modernization. It's desecration.** The White House belongs to the people, not a wannabe king obsessed with glitz, glamor, and self-glorification. This plan would not only cost hundreds of millions, it would deface a symbol of democracy to satisfy one man's never-ending need for applause. Add your name and join us in demanding: 1) A complete and immediate halt to any construction, design, or planning for a "Trump ballroom" at the White House; and 2) Clear public oversight of any future changes to the White House grounds or residence **America doesn't need another Trump party palace. We need leadership, dignity, and respect for our institutions. And if renovation is to be done at the White House, let it be led by qualified experts, not a guy who actually thinks that spray tan looks good. ** [**Add your name and tell Trump: Hands off the White House. This isn't Mar-a-Lago.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d66d322-7ff5-427b-86dd-cf4c3be5110b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td99c8de4-c725-459d-8e87-83b6f31a910a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Trump’s $200 Million War Chest vs. Our Movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
Trump’s Super PAC just raised $200 Million. We must fight back. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DgRIc3dVclSbDpZFEZN1onVekzOkiSD8inyp3BvGSbBViw7-vi1lGHxSY1QQ0wSo6WUFr4QY6K98wxgcfLzFgEvu981aEbtQQoPPW6ArlHSzOAxH9bqySkvPg7eFMgGKCHOKUL09fa44RIppUa4JrXFwLxYZcC7JBxDq002SXxE8aGie3ZYEJGkI0AuLxRT652Q7k4OgYTrheVNF2EBEkjScD2i80D5hHlKGHgD4HyWMIKMJEEecNC58HzwzVutInvozTh7ITXl3tAPKsMg6xfnnEA4qyk-ELD5pgZVbVmCwS-QE0Q-OJ1L-1cC0AXgio/4io/Usp0JCPMRseieHLcIvVT3A/h0/h001.b1NjD5_kuCvOVIMwpWnYUUDnXet4OasbrWnVQTdxH4E)
---
Friend, Donald Trump's control over the Republican Party is at an all-time high, and his influence is **threatening to take over the entire American political system.** MAGA Inc., his super PAC, now holds nearly **$200 million** thanks to billionaires like Elon Musk, crypto execs, and corporate lobbyists buying their way into Trump's inner circle. This is only about power, and Trump's using it to influence general elections, dominate Republican primaries, crush any dissent, and install loyalists who will carry out his extremist agenda in 2026 and beyond:
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DgRIc3dVclSbDpZFEZN1oneoF2yhvsEQ1WRLU1j5-7jGiniC9pThJgMJanb2td5ipvSsQMAyA8F6P5JjpEW5w0BpeZVlA1PMq6E8UT-H7TV1LGFuh05sibwH93t74Nzqq3KH-eNsVk-_1qRz5HT_5YCwKDNa-87sFlzKndiaRhIBzxzrdDXTPp7KJ26r8Hh4UB0XRFGIZnZY5MYR6U8bk6BRwgaDwvIseXGN89Ny87ZQqa1iO2Kp0rP0-XeS2F5O_go-f-8zlkZRJA9roQiwJ9nhNGyLacffK9lpFUKpdw_8tPjjLXivUUyOItgqNs-3M/4io/Usp0JCPMRseieHLcIvVT3A/h1/h001.d3pbbbg4KkxEdXP-ljSSfFgp_zrsQg_G2IjY5mEwj_Q)
---
Here's the truth: ➡️ Trump's super PAC has **more cash on hand than any political group in history** for a term-limited president. ➡️ He's holding million-dollar fundraisers at his own properties -- letting CEOs and lobbyists whisper in his ear. ➡️ MAGA Inc. is targeting Trump's _own party members_ who dared to stand up to him. ➡️ Corporate donors are trying to **buy our democracy** , and Trump is selling. We can't let billionaires bankroll the future of this country unchecked. **We need grassroots supporters like you** to close the gap. If you believe in standing up to Trump's influence, in _Democrats who fight for the working class, for peace in Gaza, and against corporate lobbyists_ -- now's the time to act. [**Chip in $50 or whatever you can to stop Trump 's $200M machine from hijacking our future. This isn't just another election cycle. It's a battle for our democracy, and we need you in it.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DgRIc3dVclSbDpZFEZN1onUEI6xcRyDErgaxJvgGTq9iujCoIuWBcWOlKye2HtA1WOp2sWUDuuSjLpnfWgp_iwzfOBPylitFCJqWvVnSV7x667r6G5c0C-mbjtrxiJW0l53wYii8q604bi7VbPKkUhIl11mD8-d9Iu7CgLdlTef5UE3G4gvXbfwJ0mEqiTUPfsrxbBYI8gWSkRJ4otE7cKH52PICs--PG0Y_l9W73uWSSceGTg2ZqUJptjxRD78PVo9ZylHhosBeSY7s8aCdYSdzMhK-7xM1_2ctc1KDC9CTyW9GCmroeIOxz88iemWej/4io/Usp0JCPMRseieHLcIvVT3A/h2/h001.AA_o0mUurlBfPSPoQCPb3opNeyUZP4zz0JQMUobPHac)

clean_body: Trump’s Super PAC just raised $200 Million. We must fight back. | | Friend, Donald Trump's control over the Republican Party is at an all-time high, and his influence is threatening to take over the entire American political system. MAGA Inc., his super PAC, now holds nearly $200 million thanks to billionaires like Elon Musk, crypto execs, and corporate lobbyists buying their way into Trump's inner circle. This is only about power, and Trump's using it to influence general elections, dominate Republican primaries, crush any dissent, and install loyalists who will carry out his extremist agenda in 2026 and beyond: | Here's the truth: ➡️ Trump's super PAC has more cash on hand than any political group in history for a term-limited president. ➡️ He's holding million-dollar fundraisers at his own properties -- letting CEOs and lobbyists whisper in his ear. ➡️ MAGA Inc. is targeting Trump's own party members who dared to stand up to him. ➡️ Corporate donors are trying to buy our democracy , and Trump is selling. We can't let billionaires bankroll the future of this country unchecked. We need grassroots supporters like you to close the gap. If you believe in standing up to Trump's influence, in Democrats who fight for the working class, for peace in Gaza, and against corporate lobbyists -- now's the time to act. Thank you for your support, \- The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . body:
Can we count on you? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575026/560929687/823540626?refcode=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzMzZmM1MC1mZTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MieJnT08tDfqxTuV4vAqLpMwLd7vjvu0jsN95pImYdM=&emci=3133fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
It’s the biggest Senate race of 2026. And, according to The Hill, North Carolina is the MOST flippable red-to-blue state. _And Roy Cooper is OFFICIALLY IN._ **We can’t overstate how essential it is to grow momentum in the early days of this campaign.** You see, the GOP will go _all out_ to defeat us — including by pouring Super PAC money into our race, attacking Roy, and targeting our state with high-profile political visits. While we’ve been blown away by the number of supporters who’ve already joined our fight with a donation, we can’t let up now. Today, we need you to stand with Roy in a way that won’t cost a cent. **[We only have ONE simple question. Peter — are YOU in this race with Roy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575027/560929688/-278599412?refcode=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzMzZmM1MC1mZTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MieJnT08tDfqxTuV4vAqLpMwLd7vjvu0jsN95pImYdM=&emci=3133fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** | [I’M IN!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575031/560929689/-278599412?refcode=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzMzZmM1MC1mZTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MieJnT08tDfqxTuV4vAqLpMwLd7vjvu0jsN95pImYdM=&emci=3133fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)

Pledging your support today helps us continue building on the GRASSROOTS MOMENTUM and enthusiasm we’ve seen so far this week. All we need is you to sign your name and stand proudly with us in our fight to take back the Senate.
**_North Carolina is where Democrats can make a stand. We need you with us._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575032/560929693/-278599412?refcode=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzMzZmM1MC1mZTZlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MieJnT08tDfqxTuV4vAqLpMwLd7vjvu0jsN95pImYdM=&emci=3133fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3733fc50-fe6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
Let’s do this,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

clean_body: Can we count on you? | It’s the biggest Senate race of 2026. And, according to The Hill, North Carolina is the MOST flippable red-to-blue state. And Roy Cooper is OFFICIALLY IN. We can’t overstate how essential it is to grow momentum in the early days of this campaign. You see, the GOP will go all out to defeat us — including by pouring Super PAC money into our race, attacking Roy, and targeting our state with high-profile political visits. While we’ve been blown away by the number of supporters who’ve already joined our fight with a donation, we can’t let up now. Today, we need you to stand with Roy in a way that won’t cost a cent. | Pledging your support today helps us continue building on the GRASSROOTS MOMENTUM and enthusiasm we’ve seen so far this week. All we need is you to sign your name and stand proudly with us in our fight to take back the Senate. North Carolina is where Democrats can make a stand. We need you with us. Let’s do this, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. subject: no days off
body:
Hi Friend, As we kick off August, Republicans in Congress hit the pause button on Congress’ work. After passing their Big, Ugly Law that will make life harder for working families and doing nothing to lower the cost of living for the last six months, Republicans skipped town to start their summer break early.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575121/560930158/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc3YmQzMGUtZmY2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=85upRJ0Ae6A3Nhki7eLXxk-1YFB_Tx3QhBUgKQTLCQU=&emci=8829858a-fd6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a77bd30e-ff6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Hi Friend,
---
As we kick off August, Republicans in Congress hit the pause button on Congress’ work. After passing their Big, Ugly Law that will make life harder for working families and doing nothing to lower the cost of living for the last six months, Republicans skipped town to start their summer break early.
---
Pushed by Trump, their reckless law cuts critical health care, food assistance, education, and energy programs that lower costs — all to pay for huge tax breaks for the wealthiest corporations and richest individuals in our country. It’s a cruel choice that puts stability and opportunity out of reach for everyone except those at the very top.
---
As Republicans head off for their summer recess, they are leaving hardworking Americans to deal with the disastrous fallout — higher costs, less support, and more uncertainty.
---
I’m not going to sit back and let this happen. I’m fighting every day to push back against Trump’s harmful policies and actions. I am committed to standing up for the people of Rhode Island. And we CAN win.
---
[_**But I need your help. Will you contribute today to help me keep the pressure on, hold these Republicans accountable, and build a future where everyone can thrive?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575122/560930159/322856550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc3YmQzMGUtZmY2ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=85upRJ0Ae6A3Nhki7eLXxk-1YFB_Tx3QhBUgKQTLCQU=)

Our fight doesn’t take a summer break — and neither will I.
---
Thank you for standing with me,Gabe

clean_body: | = Folks, this is Roy Cooper, and I’m reaching out with exciting news that I wanted to make sure you heard from me: I’m officially running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. We launched our campaign on Monday, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the response from Democratic supporters across the country. I never take running for office lightly, but more than ever, I know that we can win together. = Here’s why we need to have you with us: 👉 North Carolina’s Senate election is set to be the most competitive of 2026 & The Hill has rated this the most likely Senate seat to flip 👉 Winning here is essential to our chances of taking back the Senate 👉 Republicans are ready to do everything possible to stop us & Donald Trump already handpicked RNC Chair Michael Whatley to run against me = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Let’s do this together, Roy Cooper [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: =?iso-8859-13?q?Ken=FFTravius?= Coleman, United for Democracy
subject: Don’t let Paramount back down to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, When Trump sued Paramount over a CBS interview with Vice President Harris he didn’t like, Paramount could have fought back. Instead, the media giant capitulated to Trump’s authoritarian attack on our First Amendment rights and settled for $16 million. **Three days later, Paramount cancelled The Late Show, which is helmed by outspoken Trump critic Stephen Colbert.** **Just over a week after that, Trump’s FCC chair approved Paramount’s $8 billion merger.** It’s clear that Paramount is complying with Trump’s authoritarian desire to silence voices that are critical of him, and Trump is rewarding them for it after pocketing a bribe. Even worse, the Supreme Court has shown every indication that it’s willing to go to the mat to allow Trump to attack our Constitutional rights at every turn. **We cannot sit by while a giant media sells our First Amendment rights to a wannabe dictator. CBS and its parent company Paramount need to hear from us right now.** [**Add your name! Tell Paramount to stand up for free speech and rescind its cancellation of The Late Show with Stephen Colbert.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxO0hggiamAdv-zf_csdFEQlxgFiJTiphtFer-JLpZMBmggfYEGNx0e5fa2Zl7PuDdW1yzAulbQSpCeZ09UOBUKV_Z-wMRAepxA_I90iOvDuJCNo1MYduithqUrFAibTL1BfuAFe0pZJc1pjpXvznk-8__q-m33PlKQ8KkViU3bYuQZ5RzW8au4b_sG_b7Crt26Un-0Zue2Jzt7gfxyEhKuXLGV5gI4SZfYkHhzfjA5Z8CLUa_FmgYJO8hQg8kX0DCxlKbklIrI6GIPvhKMdFWdK3U-6oVQP6dUjvt5_-YIYpzYxfHyhG5nvibJHs_B8eKwg69eKSt8BuMvv_O1NSewL5qjerjMZm-I92_icDiJRum0S9b3u1qXVclN9-RGisokSVXUUn_SfYS26zIRwbxY_oW9g7uYIkkBoivsiGfWXuM/4io/H2IbZpM0RWC-6o4lgDV-bA/h0/h001.VbTiUNykQRQ150aw1yfaj732DXwxAimjBiUwnvtDjgU) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxO0hggiamAdv-zf_csdFEQlxgFiJTiphtFer-JLpZMBmggfYEGNx0e5fa2Zl7PuDdW1yzAulbQSpCeZ09UOBUKV_Z-wMRAepxA_I90iOvDuJCNo1MYduithqUrFAibTL1BfuAFe0pZJc1pjpXvznk-8__q-m33PlKQ8KkViU3bYuQZ5RzW8au4b_sG_b7Crt26_gTuBImTAvAG6rCnElrWJ3Rft6lTd73dyoVKT9a0oNbODBkscAyxte8eXDrmsmXcwu0CKajXWaOV8-OuMNDBKWSO4e1ZN3ltKf2-RU8H2j1dcoZeFCMsKndr_EH_GCFOIodDegGFaqSGBoZ7udkqxoSAAFgqYmeykdr5JctuLc23Y0uTf1oIZkVThUcYSlLxuL0p9LDKt2Y5dSVo_lcQP85GDFvokUljvO1dVFivhMg/4io/H2IbZpM0RWC-6o4lgDV-bA/h1/h001.FADraqKxlTX4ue9uUHZwG6msbnzdIzim0EbGlJTqnlE) **To be clear, this isn't just about CBS or Stephen Colbert. This is about our very democracy, and whether we allow Trump to strip us of our First Amendment rights.** The network has put restrictions on content critical of Trump in order to curry favor with him. Former Meet the Press moderator Chuck Todd said that Paramount’s moves have effectively "made CBS state TV." When giants like CBS fold to Trump’s dangerous demands, it makes it that much easier for Trump to attack free speech for all of us. **The Supreme Court has already been stacked to greenlight the actions of a wannabe dictator. It’s up to the media and We the People to stand up and say we won’t stand for Trump’s attacks on our rights.** Our allies at the Progressive Change Campaign Committee have already delivered 250,000 petition signatures to Paramount demanding they save The Late Show. But we need to keep up the pressure. [**Demand Paramount to end its capitulation to Trump’s authoritarian demands. Tell them to restore The Late Show with Stephen Colbert now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxO0hggiamAdv-zf_csdFEQlxgFiJTiphtFer-JLpZMBmggfYEGNx0e5fa2Zl7PuDdW1yzAulbQSpCeZ09UOBUKV_Z-wMRAepxA_I90iOvDuJCNo1MYduithqUrFAibTL1BfuAFe0pZJc1pjpXvznk-8__q-m33PlKQ8KkViU3bYuQZ5RzW8au4b_sG_b7Crt26z8uoMgCPi7iLRktqtxGvKsU2iim96KxjCw25I89UV8xSEJJG2mnYxBmv3vFF4zF9eiUb8_vsskMhvmgf9aSF72lK0VP3NkmJSXwEObuW3xL0FIQ15pxG4eIQEhQMMZw8LkWRlFmHyBn5rlrQkCbmqWaqvFsAE65jdKD19ITy9fsXC2xJoR6QeT1ZN3vpj58Vdm-SI2mWOUQ2qMvc2bsPZxWJEV6S18YGzX02QxZxw6o/4io/H2IbZpM0RWC-6o4lgDV-bA/h2/h001.-jfvtYnHs_NlIWjVvr41LEGp47fA70E0IPkzzFLPMiA) Thank you for fighting for freedom of speech, Ken’Travius Coleman
United for Democracy

subject: The truth is…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
We wish we had better news. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112575770/560931823/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_080125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU2Y2FhMmYtMDE2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ts7wwT-V96L-hVDAJnZ4jWnFe7Op9bCQvpfHaSg3gps=&emci=b0029e23-eb6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6e6caa2f-016f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter, we don’t like sending emails like this, but transparency is an important part of building a winning campaign. **The truth is we fell short of our July fundraising goal.** _**Here's why that matters:**_ Every missed goal means fewer ads, fewer organizers, and fewer chances to fight back against James Uthmeier and his special interest allies. The election may seem far away, but James Uthmeier and his team are working around the clock to keep the status quo in Tallahassee and protect their rigged system. That's the reality we're facing. _We can close the gap today – but only if supporters like you step up now._ **[So we’re asking, Peter: Can we count on you to make your first $5 donation to help us close the gap and start August strong? clean_body: We wish we had better news. | Peter, we don’t like sending emails like this, but transparency is an important part of building a winning campaign. The truth is we fell short of our July fundraising goal. Here's why that matters: Every missed goal means fewer ads, fewer organizers, and fewer chances to fight back against James Uthmeier and his special interest allies. The election may seem far away, but James Uthmeier and his team are working around the clock to keep the status quo in Tallahassee and protect their rigged system. That's the reality we're facing. body:
This month is crucial for the balance of power in statehouses across America. Two upcoming special elections are toss-ups, where just a handful of votes could decide the victor. | | |
---
| |
---|---
This month is crucial for the balance of power in statehouses across America. Two upcoming special elections are toss-ups, where _just a handful of votes could decide the victor._ **📍 DE HD-20:** In Delaware, holding this seat will go a long way toward protecting a Democratic supermajority at a time when the Trump administration is hell-bent on attacking blue states. **📍 IA SD-01:** In Iowa, we have the chance to _break_ a GOP supermajority in the state Senate and block a far-right maniac from winning a seat in Iowa’s state legislature. This would allow Democrats to block the court and agency appointments of MAGA sycophants. [With such an important slate of elections ahead, will you pledge $7 to help our party win close elections nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdhlgn5tXAOH3M1W1YRfTECEPJ1bUod9QRdIF7YIvNuM-RJJfkZ81bQAhvD_8qF-evAyozPGqzQl-WczdvXrnBFuha6TyzdZjo1elXQOfgJS_cHlhTQ78zUKVY84f_2zRP7sRafUxYTyZaZl4o99oR6e7ZIfSXVd5XzeEFH2szFI4xzD4Z4phHL6hZi3DwomTqQRz6vyc8x39Qu8ewYc5m9hOJR1-9oGiHF-X4adjrVfXR7SdpapxsgBh0xC5XES910wNgg_dYiLtm2QKQ0VjZ2831_os7zGqN0Dg3e26Ipfn_z4U2dQsacVOaZLgiErPRZuRTX_bux6KG9qC0vhpyMgAwwMAYl-8VzV9x52zPoH4/4io/9k-RqYfvRGS3guio-Vh2zA/h0/h001.79kLvVXGmED2kAuehL_NR-WfjuuZIDzv28jlko4mNtk) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Sign on to protect next year's elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
With all the accusations, the attacks on our elections, on our ballots, how we submit them, plus all the rumors about the last election, the voter purges, and everything that's been happening -- we can't just assume next year's elections will happen and go off without a hitch.
Stand up now and make your voice heard loud and clear: Tell your state election officials to keep your voter data secure, say no to Trump and his corrupt DOJ's demands, and protect our elections! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump and the MAGA movement are already plotting to rig the 2026 elections, and Trump’s using his Justice Department takeover to do it.
Trump’s DOJ is demanding that states and counties hand over sensitive voter rolls, voting histories, private data, and even physical access to voting machines.
They claim it’s about security. It’s not. It’s about seizing control of our election systems and setting the stage to challenge or even overturn results he doesn’t like.
Tell election officials in all 50 states: Defend our democracy against Trump’s scheme to steal the midterms. Block all attempts to gain access to private election data and voting machines without a court order >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
We’ve seen this before. In 2020, Trump tried to bully his way to victory by spreading lies about voter fraud. Now he’s at it again, laying the groundwork for chaos and manipulation long before a single vote is cast.
This is a test of our democracy. If state officials give in, they open the door to a federal takeover of local elections and a flood of political interference. But if they stand firm, they can block Trump’s power grab before it gains ground.
We have the power to stop this. Public outcry can give state leaders the courage to resist. But we must act fast—before the pressure campaign succeeds.
Tell your state election officials: Say NO to Trump’s demands. Keep voter data secure. Protect the 2026 elections from political sabotage! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080125_2&amount=20]

clean_body: With all the accusations, the attacks on our elections, on our ballots, how we submit them, plus all the rumors about the last election, the voter purges, and everything that's been happening -- we can't just assume next year's elections will happen and go off without a hitch. Stand up now and make your voice heard loud and clear: Tell your state election officials to keep your voter data secure, say no to Trump and his corrupt DOJ's demands, and protect our elections! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [] Folks, Donald Trump and the MAGA movement are already plotting to rig the 2026 elections, and Trump’s using his Justice Department takeover to do it. Trump’s DOJ is demanding that states and counties hand over sensitive voter rolls, voting histories, private data, and even physical access to voting machines. They claim it’s about security. It’s not. It’s about seizing control of our election systems and setting the stage to challenge or even overturn results he doesn’t like. Tell election officials in all 50 states: Defend our democracy against Trump’s scheme to steal the midterms. Block all attempts to gain access to private election data and voting machines without a court order >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] We’ve seen this before. In 2020, Trump tried to bully his way to victory by spreading lies about voter fraud. Now he’s at it again, laying the groundwork for chaos and manipulation long before a single vote is cast. This is a test of our democracy. If state officials give in, they open the door to a federal takeover of local elections and a flood of political interference. But if they stand firm, they can block Trump’s power grab before it gains ground. We have the power to stop this. Public outcry can give state leaders the courage to resist. But we must act fast—before the pressure campaign succeeds. Tell your state election officials: Say NO to Trump’s demands. Keep voter data secure. Protect the 2026 elections from political sabotage! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

body:
79 Campaign Stops in Two Months... KTR Will Not be Outworked!

| | | | | |

| | | | | | | | | | |

## JULY 2025 CAMPAIGN UPDATE
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Friend,
Karrin is crisscrossing Arizona this summer and meeting voters where they are. With 35 more campaign stops in July, she’s now done 79 stops this summer and over 150 since the campaign kicked off.
**She will not be outworked.**
President Trump endorsed Karrin because she’s a conservative businesswoman who gets things done. She built a career, raised four kids as a single mom, and lived the American dream. Now she’s running to protect it.
Check out some highlights from the past month below, and email info@karrinforarizona.com to let us know where we should go next!
— Parker Carey, Campaign Manager
_P.S. Please sign Karrin’s petition below to get her on the ballot!_
---
| [SIGN KTR’s PETITION](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=e7807b796b&e=ebfb0fda52)
---

[|

| _WATCH: Karrin joined Mark Curtis to discuss her campaign for Governor and why President Trump endorsed her to lead Arizona. 🎥_

| _Karrin was thrilled to be back in Mohave County for the 81st annual MCRCC Picnic! Congratulations to Chair Jodi Saegesser and her team on a job well done._
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | _The Nogales Police Officers Association (NPOA) officially endorsed Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor of Arizona. With the endorsement of the Nogales Police Officers Association, Karrin Taylor Robson now holds the support of three major law enforcement organizations in Arizona, as she is also endorsed by the Tucson Police Officers Association and the Combined Law Enforcement Associations of Arizona (CLEAA) which combined represent thousands of officers across the state._
_READ MORE:_[_CACTUS POLITICS_](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=89d2fc2bd9&e=ebfb0fda52)

|

| | | | | | | | | | | _Interested in being a part of Team KTR? Click the Join Team KTR button below to learn more ⬇️_
---
| [JOIN TEAM KTR](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=11c87a721a&e=ebfb0fda52)
---
|
---
|
---
|
## KARRIN TAYLOR ROBSON’S POLITICAL COMEBACK
---
| WRITTEN _by_ ERICKA PINON
---
| Karrin Taylor Robson enters the 2026 Arizona gubernatorial race with significantly stronger positioning than her 2022 campaign, armed with dramatically improved name recognition and a coveted endorsement from President Donald Trump. The business executive and Arizona native has transformed from a relatively unknown candidate to a major political force in the state.
Robson's rise from obscurity to prominence in politics is a remarkable accomplishment. She only had 2% statewide name recognition when she first started her governor campaign in 2022, which presented an immense challenge.
[READ MORE: KARRIN TAYLOR ROBSON’S POLITICAL COMEBACK](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=ca6682e13f&e=ebfb0fda52)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | | | | _It was great to be at the Snowflake Rodeo!_
---
|
---
|
---
| _Karrin announced a number of endorsements from high-profile Ret. U.S. Military officials, whom she got to know as part of the Air Force Chief of Staff’s Civic Leaders Group, as honorary commander of Luke AFB, and honorary commander of the 161st Air Refueling Wing. Here is what they had to say:_
**Gen. T. Michael Moseley (USAF, Ret.)**_18th Chief of Staff of the United States Air Force_
“Karrin Taylor Robson is the kind of leader Arizona needs. She understands the importance of national security, backs our military, and brings the same integrity and mission focus I saw in our best commanders. I’m proud to support her.”
**Gen. Robin Rand (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Commander, U.S. Air Force Global Strike Command and Air Education and Training Command_
“I know Karrin Taylor Robson well, and she is a leader I trust because she understands what it means to serve. She is a champion for those who wear the uniform and for the families who support them.With her deep national security experience and unwavering commitment to American freedom, she will be an outstanding Governor for Arizona."
**Lt. Gen. Richard Newton (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Assistant Vice Chief of Staff, United States Air Force_
“Karrin leads with discipline, purpose, perseverance and has deep respect for our military and our Veterans. She’s spent years supporting national defense and understands what’s at stake. Arizona will be much stronger with her as Governor.”
**Lt. Gen. John Regni (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Superintendent, U.S. Air Force Academy_
“Karrin embodies the same values we teach at the Air Force Academy: graduating leaders of character with integrity, service before self, and excellence in all endeavors. She brings people together and delivers results. Arizona can count on her.”
**Maj. Gen. A. Bowen Ballard (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Assistant Chief of Staff for Intelligence, U.S. Air Force, and Former Mobilization Assistant, National Security Agency_
“Karrin Taylor Robson has a deep respect for those who serve and a clear understanding of what it takes to keep our nation secure. She brings strength, integrity, and steady leadership to everything she does. I’m proud to support her for Governor of the great state of Arizona.”
**Lt. Col. Rusty Mitchell (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Commander, 21st Fighter Squadron & Luke AFB Community Liaison_
“Karrin has been a champion for Luke Air Force Base and Arizona’s military families. She listens, builds trust, and gets things done. She’s the right choice for Governor.”
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Karrin had a busy day on the campaign trail in Pima County!
Stop 1: Lunch with the Pima County Republican WomenStop 2: Meeting with the Green Valley Sahuarita Chamber of CommerceStop 3: Toured the H.S. Lopez Center for Opportunity Stop 4: Dinner with Hispanic Business Owners at Delicias
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| _“From the start of her presentation, Robson, a native of Mesa and Arizona State graduate, made clear she would be a governor who “will have President Trump’s back” and “Make Arizona Strong Again.”_
---
| [Read More](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=97af21028f&e=ebfb0fda52)

| _Karrin joined Tom Bevan on the RealClearPolitics Podcast to discuss her campaign for Governor and why Katie Hobbs is failing Arizona. Watch the full interview_[ _here_](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=f35a1a354e&e=ebfb0fda52)

| _Karrin attended the Yavapai County Farm Bureau’s candidate forum. Of note, Karrin was the only Gubernatorial candidate who showed up to the forum, despite all candidates being invited._
---

---
| | | | | | | | | | |

---

| | “Karrin Taylor Robson is a proven leader who delivers results,” said Mayor Stephanie Irwin. “Her background as a successful business executive gives her the experience and discipline to Make Arizona Strong Again. Karrin understands the needs of our small towns, supports rural economies, and will bring common sense back to our state government. I’m proud to support her for Governor.”
_READ MORE:_[_Mayor Irwin Endorsement_](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=83d3280f48&e=ebfb0fda52)

name: Powered by People
subject: Add your name to urge Texas Democrats to prevent redistricting and show them you have their back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Texas House Republicans just unveiled a proposed Congressional map designed to take Congressional seats away from Democrats to secure Republican dominance in the 2026 midterm elections.
Republicans are trying to rig the maps—plain and simple.
Democrats in Texas can break quorum and literally walk off the job to stop Republicans from holding a vote. It’s the most powerful tool Texas Democrats have to stop this blatant power grab. _And Attorney General Ken Paxton has already threatened arrest for members who take this action._

subject: Cheating their way through the 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Trump thinks he can cheat and steal his way to electoral victory. Not if we have anything to do with it.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112577623/560937911/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxN2YwZjZiLTAzNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OAVOAqpzJT2tkO0e8P8pDmczS7DbQcQQafbWdM9JGVs=&emci=a3d884d4-226e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=717f0f6b-036f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112577625/560937912/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SimpleRedraw_email_202050801-NDRC-Tier1-SimpleRedraw_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050801-NDRC-Tier1-SimpleRedraw_&utm_campaign=SimpleRedraw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxN2YwZjZiLTAzNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OAVOAqpzJT2tkO0e8P8pDmczS7DbQcQQafbWdM9JGVs=)
---
Peter,
Donald Trump knows the 2026 midterm elections will be a pivotal moment for our country, and he knows that right now, his party is staring down an epic rebuke from voters. That’s why he’s demanding mid-decade map redraws in a handful of key states Republicans control — it’s a craven attempt to cheat their way into holding on to power in Congress.
In Texas, Trump outright told the press that he wants to see state lawmakers pass an even more gerrymandered map where “we pick up five seats.” — just this week, Republicans unveiled a map designed to do exactly that. And now, there are reports that the White House is pressuring Missouri to follow suit and redraw its map to help Republicans potentially win seven of its eight congressional districts. That’s right: Instead of trying to win elections fairly, Trump wants to rig the rules of the game and take power away from voters.
The question now is whether these state-level Republicans will rubber stamp these blatant power grabs.
[**The NDRC exists for fights like this — alongside our affiliates, we’re ready to use every tool at our disposal to sound the alarm about the threat of extreme Republican gerrymandering in Texas and in any other state that tries it. But this fight takes resources. Will you step up today with a donation to ensure we can fight this shameless gerrymandering when it matters most?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112577629/560937913/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SimpleRedraw_email_202050801-NDRC-Tier1-SimpleRedraw_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050801-NDRC-Tier1-SimpleRedraw_&utm_campaign=SimpleRedraw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxN2YwZjZiLTAzNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OAVOAqpzJT2tkO0e8P8pDmczS7DbQcQQafbWdM9JGVs=)

Peter, win or lose in Texas, we know that this is the other side’s playbook for the months ahead: Rig the rules of the game. That’s why it’s so crucial that we hold the people responsible for this power grab accountable. We won’t stand by and let voters be silenced. And we won’t let anyone get away with trying.
Thank you so much for being with us in this fight.
Team NDRC

clean_body: Trump thinks he can cheat and steal his way to electoral victory. Not if we have anything to do with it. | | = Peter, Donald Trump knows the 2026 midterm elections will be a pivotal moment for our country, and he knows that right now, his party is staring down an epic rebuke from voters. That’s why he’s demanding mid-decade map redraws in a handful of key states Republicans control — it’s a craven attempt to cheat their way into holding on to power in Congress. In Texas, Trump outright told the press that he wants to see state lawmakers pass an even more gerrymandered map where “we pick up five seats.” — just this week, Republicans unveiled a map designed to do exactly that. And now, there are reports that the White House is pressuring Missouri to follow suit and redraw its map to help Republicans potentially win seven of its eight congressional districts. That’s right: Instead of trying to win elections fairly, Trump wants to rig the rules of the game and take power away from voters. The question now is whether these state-level Republicans will rubber stamp these blatant power grabs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Peter, win or lose in Texas, we know that this is the other side’s playbook for the months ahead: Rig the rules of the game. That’s why it’s so crucial that we hold the people responsible for this power grab accountable. We won’t stand by and let voters be silenced. And we won’t let anyone get away with trying. Thank you so much for being with us in this fight. Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it—Congress is broken.There are politicians who have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.As if it wasn't hard enough to fix anything in Washington, D.C.!But every week President Trump proves that we don’t have to accept the status quo: the demolition of Iran’s nuclear capabilities, NATO upping their contributions, the downsizing of Big Government agencies, etc... clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it—Congress is broken.There are politicians who have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.As if it wasn't hard enough to fix anything in Washington, D.C.!But every week President Trump proves that we don’t have to accept the status quo: the demolition of Iran’s nuclear capabilities, NATO upping their contributions, the downsizing of Big Government agencies, etc... If there was ever a chance for big change – it’s now. Today, WE THE PEOPLE, have our best chance to break the career politician’s hold on Congress.But we need to know if you support term limits and how you want to get it done -- and we have to act fast. Our Founding Fathers never intended for government service to be a permanent career. George Washington famously served just two terms as President—then went home.But our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves. That’s why they included a powerful safeguard in our Constitution -- an escape hatch -- enshrined in Article V.If Congress ever became too corrupt to fix itself, Article V. says the states can act.34 states can call a convention, propose an amendment -- like the one being proposed on term limits -- and Congress can’t do a thing about it. Every one of our initiatives for America is led by you – patriots aged 50+. We are AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of Americans, “action” is what we’re known for.President Trump has said that AMAC Action is so effective that members of Congress run the other way when they see our delegates coming down the hall.Washington lifers will certainly be on the run if you tell us you support term limits! Do you agree... > No more golden pensions for people who work 170 days a year and spend half of that time just trying to get reelected.>> No more using the power of the office and insider deals to get rich.>> No more jobs for life with nothing to show for it! Tell us right away if you want us to unleash our AMAC Action delegates and tell us your thoughts on Article V. Nancy Pelosi — 38 years Mitch McConnell — 40 years Maxine Waters — 34 years Chuck Schumer — 44 years They’ve been in the swamp so long they’ve grown gills. Your completed “TIME FOR TERM LIMITS SURVEY” gives AMAC Action our marching orders PLUS it shows a massive groundswell of support for term limits (if that turns out to be the case) to embolden the 34 states needed.That’s why we’re spearheading this massive nationwide survey and why you got my email today. You’ve proven that you’re a patriot who can be counted on to take action. We couldn’t waste any time on people who prefer complaining to acting. We need to reach 1 million patriots with surveys just like the one I’m asking you to fill out.We’re blanketing the country through the mail, email, calls, and reaching patriots in person. All that takes time and money.The Washington lifers are counting on having more power, influence, and resources than the American people. They’re counting on our complacency and despair.But here at AMAC Action, if you agree, we’ll finish the fight our Founders began and restore America’s government to the people!With commands from one million surveys, we’ll know if it’s time to use Article V. to retake the ship. You can see that** singlehandedly, you are an indispensable force multiplier in this effort.But if you do nothing, you let other patriots speak for you. And worse, nothing changes. Immigration policy will never get fixed and just stay a meaningless election year talking point. America’s spending and debt will continue to grow unchecked. Remember when we had a balanced budget? We can get back there if career politicians do something!Social Security will keep getting raided while real policies to protect your benefits sit on the back burner.Healthcare costs will do nothing but skyrocket leaving seniors vulnerable. America’s children will stay trapped in the leftwing indoctrination centers we call “public schools.”And the Washington, D.C. lifers will just get lazier and lazier. But don’t let me decide for you. One million “TIME FOR TERM LIMITS SURVEYS” is a bold goal but we can do it if we all pitch in. Every dollar helps. Every signature counts. Every day matters.Your survey is only 4 questions long – please complete it and respond right away.Thank you and may God bless you and these United States. | | With hope and urgency, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. Our Founding Fathers left us a Constitutional escape hatch in case Congress was sinking the ship. It’s Article V. and if you agree, we can use it to make term limits law. While the Washington lifers are lounging on the Lido deck, we can make history and save America. It’s your choice. Please respond ASAP! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

We’re taking back the Senate Majority. | | | Friend, I’m Roy Cooper. On Monday, we launched our campaign to help take back the United States Senate for Democrats, and already, the enthusiasm we’ve seen from folks across the country is astonishing. Can I have a moment of your time to reintroduce myself and let you know why I’m running?

**North Carolina is my home, and I’ve spent a lifetime in service to this state.** It’s where I was born, raised, went to school, and raised my own family. I’ve had the honor of serving as a state legislator, Attorney General, and Governor.

**I’m proud of the work we achieved together — including bringing thousands of jobs to the state and, in what may have been my most impactful achievement as Governor, expanding Medicaid.** Now, more than 650,000 North Carolinians are covered by Medicaid expansion — but that coverage is imperiled by Washington Republicans’ bill slashing funding for Medicaid and other services Americans rely on.

**I’m asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic Senator because so much of the progress we have made is in danger now, not only for North Carolinians, but for every American. That’s why I’m running for Senate.**

I’m running because**every American deserves access to health care** — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout.

I’m running because **reproductive rights are fundamental** — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide.

I’m running because **our planet is in jeopardy** — and right now the people in power would rather allow corporations to pollute our air and water than find a new direction.

**Americans deserve leaders who will take a stand for what is right. I am ready to serve again, but this time in Washington.**

******[I can make no greater pledge to you than this: I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great state and country. Friend, we can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does $20 fit in your budget? clean_body: We’re taking back the Senate Majority. | | | Friend, I’m Roy Cooper. On Monday, we launched our campaign to help take back the United States Senate for Democrats, and already, the enthusiasm we’ve seen from folks across the country is astonishing. Can I have a moment of your time to reintroduce myself and let you know why I’m running? | North Carolina is my home, and I’ve spent a lifetime in service to this state. It’s where I was born, raised, went to school, and raised my own family. I’ve had the honor of serving as a state legislator, Attorney General, and Governor. I’m proud of the work we achieved together — including bringing thousands of jobs to the state and, in what may have been my most impactful achievement as Governor, expanding Medicaid. Now, more than 650,000 North Carolinians are covered by Medicaid expansion — but that coverage is imperiled by Washington Republicans’ bill slashing funding for Medicaid and other services Americans rely on. I’m asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic Senator because so much of the progress we have made is in danger now, not only for North Carolinians, but for every American. That’s why I’m running for Senate. I’m running becauseevery American deserves access to health care — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because reproductive rights are fundamental — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because our planet is in jeopardy — and right now the people in power would rather allow corporations to pollute our air and water than find a new direction. Americans deserve leaders who will take a stand for what is right. I am ready to serve again, but this time in Washington. **** We have work to do, Roy Cooper elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states. They want revenge. If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down. That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up. Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Thank you.
body:
|
#
Hi there, I just wanted to take a moment to say**thank you.** July brought a major shift in this race. A new far-right opponent officially jumped in – confirming what we’ve known all along: that this seat is a top GOP target. Outside groups have been spending heavily for months, and now the attacks are only going to escalate. **But thanks to you, we’re ready.** Because of your support, we hit our July fundraising goal – and proved once again that this campaign is built to stand up to whatever comes next. I know you get asked to do a lot – not just by me, but by other campaigns too. That’s why I’m especially grateful you chose to stand with me when it mattered most. So whether you chipped in, shared a post, or simply read and believed in our message – you made a difference. Enjoy your weekend – and thank you again for being part of this. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/1/2025
body:
They built the budget bomb: Now Colorado Democrats say President Trump lit the fuse
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado’s budget crisis is deepening, with Democrats deflecting blame for a [$1 billion shortfall](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) while critics point to unchecked progressive spending. AG Phil Weiser faces backlash from Mesa County’s sheriff over a [lawsuit targeting a deputy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and ranchers are raising alarms after CPW has verified a [second litter of wolf pups](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in the Aspen area. Meanwhile, [Xcel’s costly coal exit plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) could saddle consumers with higher bills, and the South Rim wildfire is [50% contained](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) but the damage and emergency response costs are mounting.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump criticized Fed Chair Jerome Powell for [keeping interest rates high](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), blaming him for economic losses and demanding his replacement. At the same time, [surging costs for English learner programs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) are straining school budgets, even amid widespread cuts.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Bobbie Daniel argues Colorado’s budget crisis was the result of [reckless political choices](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—ballooning spending and unfunded mandates—not economic forces. Meanwhile, Mark Polk satirically diagnoses a summer spike in [“Trump Derangement Syndrome,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) calling for tequila, not panic.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, August 1, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[They built the budget bomb: Now Colorado Democrats say President Trump lit the fuse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
They built the budget bomb. Now they say Trump lit the fuse.
Colorado Democrats want you to believe they’re victims of the Big Bad Federal Budget Bill. That the state’s $1.2 billion shortfall just... happened. Like a pothole after a snowstorm. Nothing to do with how they’ve governed.
Governor Polis says, “The Trump Administration is withholding needed funds from our classrooms,” and Senate President James Coleman warns, “There’s no avoiding the fact that these cuts will hurt Colorado families.”
Convenient. But here’s the part they don’t mention: Colorado’s fee-based revenue—the stealth tax that doesn’t require a vote—blew through the roof to $25.8 billion last year.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Daniel: Colorado’s Budget Crisis Wasn’t an Accident — It Was a Choice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Mesa County Commissioner Bobbie Daniel discusses how Colorado’s $1.2 billion budget shortfall stems from state leaders using one-time COVID relief funds to create long-term programs—leaving taxpayers to cover the ongoing costs.
* Exploding Medicaid costs, including programs for non-citizens, are straining the budget and squeezing out private insurance options, especially in rural areas.
* Daniel argues that the crisis was a political choice—not an accident—and urges voters to prioritize fiscal responsibility and leadership change in 2026.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[CPW Confirmation of New Wolf Pups Raises Alarms in Colorado Ranch Country](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) confirmed at least six new wolf pups in the One Ear Pack in Jackson County—marking the third reintroduced pack with documented births.
* The news follows earlier sightings of pups in Routt County and the lethal removal efforts underway for the Copper Creek Pack in Pitkin County.
* CPW officials noted that pup survival rates in the wild vary widely, with only 50–60% typically surviving the first year.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Polk: Summer TDS cases are rising across the U.S. — Is it time for a shot?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MARK POLK****| COMMENTARY | JULY 31** _Mark Polk shared this satirical piece with his personal network, where it sparked laughter and strong reactions. He adapted it from a recent COVID vaccine shot article and noted it may be “too hot to handle” for some—but readers who enjoy biting political humor may find it hard to resist._

**[What schools won’t say: The furry behavior Colorado families keep reporting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | STATE | JULY 30** _Rumors about students dressing as animals and disrupting classrooms have circulated throughout Colorado for years, sparking political fights, school board blowback and media denials. Some say the “furries in schools” narrative is a hoax pushed by conservative figures. But school records, parent testimony and disciplinary documents tell a more complicated story._
__

**[Daniel: The state’s mandates, your money—and why counties are saying “Enough”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BOBBIE DANIEL | COMMENTARY | JULY 30** _Imagine walking into a restaurant, and before you even look at the menu, someone else orders for the whole table. They choose the most expensive items, add dessert, and go for top-shelf drinks—and when the check comes, they quietly slide it over to you._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**🤧 DID YOU KNOW?** **Kleenex was originally invented as a gas mask filter during WWI.** After the war, the material was softened and repurposed as a disposable tissue for removing cold cream—until people started using it to blow their noses. By the 1930s, it was marketed as the throwaway handkerchief.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "You will ever remember that all the end of study is to make you a good man and a useful citizen." – John Adams
|
