clean_body: A tiny Mexico City taco stand has as the first of its kind to earn a Michelin star. | | | | | | Friday, August 1, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! We're not going to pretend it was an accident--this week's Feel Good Flyover is heavy on the dog stories, and no, we're not sorry. Got a pup of your own? Send us a photo and a quick note about why you love your dog. We just might feature them next week. 🐾 Are you loving the newsletter? Take it further with , hosted by Amy Hess, as she shares behind-the-scenes details, visuals, and conversations--available on , , or . Try online therapy today from our sponsors at . | Marine Vet Stops Walmart Stabbing Spree Derrick Perry, 41, a Marine Corps veteran, is being praised nationwide after who wounded 11 people at a Walmart in Traverse City, Michigan, last weekend. shows Perry, armed with a handgun, shouting commands at the 42-year-old suspect, Bradford Gille, and helping other shoppers pin him down until police arrived. Family members called it a proud moment, with Perry’s daughter saying he acted instinctively to protect others. Perry’s quick, disciplined response likely prevented further injuries in what police are calling a random and violent rampage. . Tiny Taco Stand Earns Michelin Star A tiny Mexico City taco stand has as the first of its kind to earn a Michelin star. Operating since 1968 with just four beef tacos on the menu, Taquería El Califa de León impressed inspectors with its stripped down recipe: beef, salt, lime, and a fresh tortilla—sauce optional. Chef Arturo Rivera Martínez has run the 680-degree griddle for over two decades, serving the same no-frills tacos in a 100-square-foot space with no seats and barely room to stand. At nearly $5 a taco, it’s not cheap by local standards—but loyal customers say it’s worth every peso. As Rivera Martínez put it, "," and that’s about as flashy as it gets. Abandoned Baby Moose Finds New Home A was rescued in Ontario, Canada, after being found alone and disoriented. Just two months old and separated from his mother, Cedar had little chance of surviving in the wild. He was taken in by , where vets found he had limited vision in one eye. With nearby sanctuaries at capacity, the team quickly approved Cedar's move to . Staff there are now prepping his new habitat and coordinating care with Holly’s Haven. Though he can't return to the wild, Cedar will serve as an educational ambassador, helping people connect with native wildlife up close. | Flying together with our sponsor Summer can offer a much-needed pause. If you're feeling disconnected, therapy is a powerful way to reflect and reset. , you can talk to a licensed therapist from anywhere—even poolside or between flights. who understands burnout and high-pressure environments. You can talk through what’s weighing on you, on your schedule, from anywhere. 72% of clients report feeling better within 12 weeks, and sessions are rated 4.9/5 based on 1.7 million reviews. | ➤ After two stray labs followed her during a trip to Louisiana, a Florida woman returned months later to adopt them both, reuniting the bonded pair and giving them a permanent home together. () ➤ A baby from Iowa born at just 21 weeks and weighing 10 ounces has been named the world’s most premature surviving infant by Guinness World Records. Doctors gave him no chance of survival, but after six months in the NICU, he defied the odds and recently celebrated his first birthday. () ➤ A comedy museum in New York is hosting monthly memory cafes where classic TV clips and vintage humor help dementia patients reconnect with loved ones through shared laughter and fleeting moments of recognition. () ➤ The volunteer group #Popscope has brought free sidewalk stargazing to over 26,000 people in cities across the U.S. and abroad, setting up telescopes for passersby to glimpse Saturn’s rings or the Moon, often sparking wonder, laughter, and new friendships under the night sky. () ➤ An Atlanta man says his two-legged rescue Chihuahua saved his life by alerting him to a “widowmaker” heart attack, prompting emergency care that doctors say likely made the difference between life and death. () ➤ A Georgia rescue dog named Igor has gone viral thanks to a wildly creative adoption post describing him as a “fluff-coated poltergeist,” drawing thousands of laughs and adoption interest. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ The Secret to a Mirror-Finish Car Without Wax. Tired of spending hours waxing your car? makes your paint shine like new—in just minutes. clean_body: Donald Trump cannot buy this seat. | ICYMI: RNC Chair and Big Oil Lobbyist Michael Whatley is running for the U.S. Senate... but not for North Carolina. = Trump picked him. Trump courted him. Trump endorsed him. Who do you think Michael Whatley will be loyal to if he makes it to Washington? = | = Peter, a new poll shows this race WITHIN THE MARGIN OF ERROR. That’s way too close when the stakes are so high. Whatley has already made it abundantly clear: He doesn’t care about hurting North Carolinians, as long as it puts him in favor with Donald Trump. He even called Trump’s disastrous bill stripping Medicaid coverage for more than 650,000 North Carolinians and millions of other Americans “a huge win.” This is no time to elect a D.C. insider who only stands for his political party and those he lobbied for — not the people of North Carolina. As Governor, Roy Cooper PASSED Medicaid Expansion, and he will fight like hell to defend it as North Carolina’s next Senator. body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/Villegas%20Logo.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.1.25-all-a [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.1.25-all-a]

Thank you.

Whether you're chipping in a few dollars, signing up to volunteer, or believing in what we’re fighting for -- I’m deeply grateful. This campaign is only possible because of you.

July is usually a slow month for campaigns. Not this one.

With your help, we had one of our strongest fundraising months yet. Dozens of local elected officials and community leaders stepped up to endorse our movement -- and more are joining every week.

Together, we’re building real momentum in our fight to flip CA-22 and finally deliver the kind of representation our district deserves.

We began the month with David Valadao showing his true colors. He voted to gut Medicaid, SNAP, and WIC -- even though tens of thousands of our neighbors rely on these programs to survive. That kind of betrayal isn’t new. But this time, we’re ready to fight back.

That’s what makes this moment so powerful. It’s not just about me. It’s about all of us. It’s about proving the people too often left out of politics can be the ones shaping it.

So thank you. Together, we’re building something strong enough to take on David Valadao and flip this seat for the Valley.

Onward,

Randy

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign to stop lawless, masked immigration agents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7CGWeownhHReGL35s5ENcQR8IJu_YDRWXMdwUrPmPX2XuOerZeDr0o-wJqm5EWq8UW8zGIB6lJWk6ggEGZV_wmQyyMZqqR_qWT93empFQybXX9EHIydKF-T2YOcpyHIYJH1u0eevKI8OGRa_eEALY-0CzK0w4HQ7WMYVwdn1ttYhIw_wQWKdy9mKM6cr0LHex4w/4io/HSmNEuPOSfy7X8wdv7sOMg/h0/h001.iieeoW6228ifWHirEiH2Okn5GhNcu9DzJs4tS3PLbu8)
---
Friend, With Trump and Republicans’ Big Budget Betrayal signed into law, ICE is now the highest-funded federal law enforcement agency. More masked immigration agents are in our streets, unconstitutionally targeting vulnerable people. **We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors from these violent, lawless immigration agents.** Even in Democrat-led cities and states, police and other government officials often share data and coordinate with ICE. So people are mobilizing to ask their city leaders to **limit local law enforcement’s cooperation with ICE** , and to ask their local sheriffs to **refuse to cooperate with ICE’s unconstitutional kidnapping and detention of immigrants**.1 At the state level, officials can also pass or implement **stronger sanctuary policies**(including preventing immigration detention centers)**, create statewide legal defense funds for immigrants, pass policies to protect immigrants’ civil and constitutional rights** , and more. In my home state of Michigan, a woman who reported her assault to the police was then sent to ICE detention to be deported.2 We can and must push for sanctuary policies that include provisions **to allow immigrants to report crimes to the police without fear of deportation**.3 I’m also fighting for immigrants’ rights in Congress, including **co-sponsoring the**** _No Secret Police Act of 2025_** , which would require federal immigration agents to identify themselves clearly and stop hiding their faces and badges from the public. But we need more pressure from the American people to pass policies in Congress as well as at the state and local levels. Thank you for speaking up for immigrants’ rights and our shared constitutional rights. For example, every single resident of the United States has the right to due process, including the right to a fair hearing in court.
Our due process rights are also meant to protect us from unlawful arrests by prohibiting law enforcement officers from arresting or abducting people without reasonable suspicion of a crime. And as a former immigration lawyer, I want to clarify that being undocumented is not a crime; it’s an issue for civil courts.
Instead of reasonable suspicion of a crime, ICE and other immigration agencies are kidnapping and detaining our neighbors __ just because of their skin color or because they’re speaking Spanish. This is racial profiling and it’s illegal.

In my state of Michigan, a woman who reported her assault to the police was then sent to ICE detention and she’s about to be deported.1
Even in Democrat-led cities and states, police and other government officials regularly share data and coordinate with ICE. Right now, organizations are mobilizing people to ask their local sheriffs to **refuse to cooperate with ICE’s unconstitutional kidnapping and detention of immigrants**.2
People can also push their city leaders to **limit local law enforcement’s cooperation with ICE** or other federal immigration enforcement agencies. This is one component of many sanctuary policies, which can also include provisions **preventing immigration detention centers** or **allowing immigrants to report crimes to the police without fear of deportation**.3
State-level officials can also pass or implement **stronger sanctuary policies, create statewide legal defense funds for immigrants, pass policies to protect immigrants’ civil and constitutional rights** , and more.
And at the federal level, **members of Congress must use our oversight role to hold immigration agencies accountable** for violations of our laws and our rights.
For example, my colleagues have introduced multiple policies to force federal immigration agents to stop hiding their faces and badges—including the _No Secret Police Act_ , the _No Anonymity in Immigration Enforcement Act_ , and the _Combating Deceptive Immigration Enforcement Practices Act_.
I promise to continue fighting for a just immigration system and pushing to abolish ICE. But we urgently need people to press their representatives at all levels of government, asking them to do all they can to defend immigrants and citizens who are at risk of racial profiling.

clean_body: Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors. | | | Friend, With Trump and Republicans’ Big Budget Betrayal signed into law, ICE is now the highest-funded federal law enforcement agency. More masked immigration agents are in our streets, unconstitutionally targeting vulnerable people. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors from these violent, lawless immigration agents. Even in Democrat-led cities and states, police and other government officials often share data and coordinate with ICE. So people are mobilizing to ask their city leaders to limit local law enforcement’s cooperation with ICE , and to ask their local sheriffs to refuse to cooperate with ICE’s unconstitutional kidnapping and detention of immigrants.1 At the state level, officials can also pass or implement stronger sanctuary policies(including preventing immigration detention centers), create statewide legal defense funds for immigrants, pass policies to protect immigrants’ civil and constitutional rights , and more. In my home state of Michigan, a woman who reported her assault to the police was then sent to ICE detention to be deported.2 We can and must push for sanctuary policies that include provisions to allow immigrants to report crimes to the police without fear of deportation.3 I’m also fighting for immigrants’ rights in Congress, including co-sponsoring the No Secret Police Act of 2025 , which would require federal immigration agents to identify themselves clearly and stop hiding their faces and badges from the public. But we need more pressure from the American people to pass policies in Congress as well as at the state and local levels. | Thank you for speaking up for immigrants’ rights and our shared constitutional rights. For example, every single resident of the United States has the right to due process, including the right to a fair hearing in court. Our due process rights are also meant to protect us from unlawful arrests by prohibiting law enforcement officers from arresting or abducting people without reasonable suspicion of a crime. And as a former immigration lawyer, I want to clarify that being undocumented is not a crime; it’s an issue for civil courts. Instead of reasonable suspicion of a crime, ICE and other immigration agencies are kidnapping and detaining our neighbors just because of their skin color or because they’re speaking Spanish. This is racial profiling and it’s illegal. Together we will continue fighting for our rights and fighting against fascism. With you in this fight, Rashida 1 The #DisappearedInAmerica campaign’s “Talk to Your Sheriff Toolkit”is . 2 3 \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Tues, Jul 29, 2025 Subject: Sign to stop lawless, masked immigration agents To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. Masked agents have chased families of farmworkers, who’ve described feeling “hunted.” One farmworker recently died during a raid. Immigrants’ lives are not disposable! In violation of the Constitution, federal agents are racially profiling people at worksites, courthouses, and schools. They’re also unconstitutionally kidnapping people without warrants or probable cause. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors and protect our shared constitutional right to due process—which applies regardless of immigration status. In my state of Michigan, a woman who reported her assault to the police was then sent to ICE detention and she’s about to be deported.1 Even in Democrat-led cities and states, police and other government officials regularly share data and coordinate with ICE. Right now, organizations are mobilizing people to ask their local sheriffs to refuse to cooperate with ICE’s unconstitutional kidnapping and detention of immigrants.2 People can also push their city leaders to limit local law enforcement’s cooperation with ICE or other federal immigration enforcement agencies. This is one component of many sanctuary policies, which can also include provisions preventing immigration detention centers or allowing immigrants to report crimes to the police without fear of deportation.3 State-level officials can also pass or implement stronger sanctuary policies, create statewide legal defense funds for immigrants, pass policies to protect immigrants’ civil and constitutional rights , and more. And at the federal level, members of Congress must use our oversight role to hold immigration agencies accountable for violations of our laws and our rights. For example, my colleagues have introduced multiple policies to force federal immigration agents to stop hiding their faces and badges—including the No Secret Police Act , the No Anonymity in Immigration Enforcement Act , and the Combating Deceptive Immigration Enforcement Practices Act. I promise to continue fighting for a just immigration system and pushing to abolish ICE. But we urgently need people to press their representatives at all levels of government, asking them to do all they can to defend immigrants and citizens who are at risk of racial profiling. Thank you for taking action. Instead of sending hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars to expand ICE (as part of Trump’s Big Budget Betrayal), our government must dismantle ICE and invest in what communities need. Together, we’ll keep working to make a better world with dignity and safety for all. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. You can find Know Your Rights information and other resources for immigrants . 1 2 The #DisappearedInAmerica campaign has a “Talk to Your Sheriff Toolkit” . 3 , * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Roy Cooper
subject: We officially have our GOP opponent
body:
Will you help me fight back?
_I have an update to share on our campaign for U.S. Senate from North Carolina:_
Today, Michael Whatley, a DC insider and big oil lobbyist, and Republican National Committee Chair, announced he’s running to defeat me. **Whatley has a record of doing and saying anything to gain President Trump’s personal favor — even if it hurts North Carolinians.** It’s paid off for him so far, earning him the RNC chairmanship and Trump’s endorsement in this U.S. Senate race.
[**Can you rush in a contribution now to help us fight back? Click here to split a contribution between our campaign and Deb Haaland >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250801_1_split?refcode=em20250801-3546&refcode2=3546_400544_kIHXes&akid=3546%2E400544%2EkIHXes)
You know, I never really wanted to go to Washington. I just wanted to serve the people right here in North Carolina. But we’re facing a moment as fragile as any that I can remember, and we can’t afford to elect a D.C. insider who only stands for his political party and those he lobbied for — not the people of North Carolina.
It’s more important than ever that NC be represented by someone who will do what is right. And on this, I give you my word: I will stand up for your families and do everything in my power to make this country better.
We all know that this isn’t going to be an easy race to win. We’re in for a long, expensive fight no matter what — and Republicans are preparing, too. They plan to spend hundreds of millions in our state, and they even started attacking us _before we officially announced our campaign_ because they’re so concerned about losing this seat and losing the Senate.
[**One way you can help us fight back against Whatley and the GOP machine behind him is by making a grassroots donation right now. Let’s show them that we have the momentum in this race from the get go, and that their mega-donors can’t buy our state. Chip in $10 or $20, split between our campaign and Deb Haaland's team, today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250801_1_split?refcode=em20250801-3546&refcode2=3546_400544_kIHXes&akid=3546%2E400544%2EkIHXes)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250801_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250801-3546&refcode2=3546_400544_kIHXes&akid=3546%2E400544%2EkIHXes)**
Thank you for your support,
Roy Cooper
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=3546%2E400544%2EkIHXes)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3546%2E400544%2EkIHXes)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: This race just got real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)
Peter,
**One of Katie Porter’s opponents just dumped $10 MILLION of his own money into his campaign for California governor.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250801_2_ak?refcode=em20250801-39967&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39967_3422442_U4pPnl&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)
**[Make your first donation to Katie’s campaign today to help us keep up>>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250801_2_ak?refcode=em20250801-39967&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39967_3422442_U4pPnl&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)**
Katie Porter’s a working, single mom who can’t self-fund her campaign with a multimillion dollar check. She refuses money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, so she really relies on grassroots support.
Katie is running to deliver real results for working people. That means lowering the cost of housing, healthcare, and childcare–huge chunks of families’ budgets that make it hard for families to get ahead.
And that’s exactly what our fundraising reflects, everyday supporters are chipping in what they can, when they can.
Because the truth is, money will make a difference in who wins this race. It takes serious resources to reach the voters needed to win in a state as big as California, and our wealthy opponents have a head start.
**[Our grassroots supporters can be more powerful than any wealthy candidate. Can you chip in $5 to Katie’s campaign to help us build momentum and take the lead in this competitive race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250801_2_ak?refcode=em20250801-39967&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39967_3422442_U4pPnl&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250801_2_ak?refcode=em20250801-39967&refcode2=39967_3422442_U4pPnl&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)
We wouldn’t be where we are without Porter Supporters like you.
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250801-39967&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39967_3422442_U4pPnl&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39967&t=5&akid=39967%2E3422442%2EU4pPnl)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially running to be the next Democratic United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
We’re taking back the U.S. Senate Majority.

|
#
---
_Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from Roy Cooper, who is running for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. Please read his message below._
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112585610/560965141/-1548308941?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjVlZWFlOS0xZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLlzhTt6-4srLsKdezRq77T_PiVS_TWXnDA13_BxqT8=) Peter, this is Roy Cooper, and I’m reaching out with exciting news that I wanted to make sure you heard from me: **I’m officially running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina.** We launched our campaign on Monday, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the response from Democratic supporters across the country. I never take running for office lightly, but more than ever, I know that we can win together. **[I’m grateful to have Sen. Mazie Hirono’s support in these critical first few days, and I need yours, too. Could you split a donation between their team and our campaign for Senate right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112585611/560965142/-762782919?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjVlZWFlOS0xZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLlzhTt6-4srLsKdezRq77T_PiVS_TWXnDA13_BxqT8=)** Here’s why we need to have you with us: 👉 North Carolina’s Senate election is set to be the most competitive of 2026 & The Hill has rated this the most likely Senate seat to flip 👉 Winning here is essential to our chances of taking back the Senate 👉 Republicans are ready to do everything possible to stop us & Donald Trump already handpicked RNC Chair Michael Whatley to run against me **[Peter, a donation TODAY can help us prepare for Democrats’ most important Senate fight of 2026. Are you with me and Mazie in the fight? name: Tom Fitton
subject: VICTORY: Lawsuits to Clean Up Voter Rolls Move Forward
body:
Judicial Watch Settles Biden Audio Tapes Lawsuit

[INSIDE JW]

DOUBLE VICTORY: LAWSUITS TO CLEAN UP VOTER ROLLS ADVANCE IN TWO
STATES

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35788&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9ab0FTdE1qYkR5RT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=2392494c82c9040378643a5214599d63e802980efac96690d1239cc61caee989]

In a double win for Judicial Watch and clean elections, federal courts
in California and Illinois separately ruled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35783&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVnb3JpZXMvY2EtbW90aW9uLXRvLWRpc21pc3MtaWwtbW90aW9uLXRvLWRpc21pc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cd99494c6e06571284804a497596600a564cd0545355d68a849335309ad30755]
this week that our lawsuits may proceed against those states to force
them to clean up their dirty voter rolls.

Our lawsuits allege that both California and Illinois violated the
National Voter Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b],
which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a
reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the
names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence.

In California, Judicial Watch and the Libertarian Party of California
sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=32338&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jbGVhbi11cC12b3Rpbmctcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=43118f5469b09d5a03dd6c0922ba3e0197ee76e0636575890f560ca9c7026755]
after uncovering a broad failure to clean up voter rolls in dozens of
California counties. The amended complaint details that, in
correspondence with us, California admitted that 21 counties removed
five or fewer registrations in a two-year period pursuant to a key
provision of federal law. Sixteen counties removed _zero_ such
registrations during that period (_Judicial Watch Inc. and the
Libertarian Party of CA v. Shirley Weber et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=32353&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2ViZXItY2EtbnZyYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMzc1MC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e1b1d4be2f932dadc091edcaea65d59d644a08fdfbe6395256c56543e625bc64]
(No. 2:24-cv-03750).

In Illinois, Judicial Watch and two political organizations,
Breakthrough Ideas and Illinois Family Action, and registered voter
Carol Davis, sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=31560&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsaW5vaXMtdm90aW5nLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b9d889574013d51b5bb2a699b8d7eb63339c216bd80c8fc0830a6ff6ae1bf019]
after alleging
23 counties, with a combined 980,089 registered voters, reported
removing a combined total of just 100 voter registrations under a key
provision of federal law over the past two-year period (_Judicial
Watch Inc. et al. v. Illinois State Board of Elections et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35789&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaWxsaW5vaXMtYm9hcmQtb2YtZWxlY3Rpb25zLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTg2Ny9dXy5fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=74636a5eb34fe25cf99a43dff636bea9eadff439745db5f1e3357a7afce25d9d
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=31545&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaWxsaW5vaXMtYm9hcmQtb2YtZWxlY3Rpb25zLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTg2Ny8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=16428315e1a3dc5aa1a52e0025afa58f93fe983bcd5f4115a9b6f427df2cd076]
(No. 1:24-cv-01867)).

In both cases
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35783&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVnb3JpZXMvY2EtbW90aW9uLXRvLWRpc21pc3MtaWwtbW90aW9uLXRvLWRpc21pc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cd99494c6e06571284804a497596600a564cd0545355d68a849335309ad30755],
the judges allowed the lawsuits to continue.

The voter rolls in Illinois and California are a mess, and these court
decisions allow our legal team to proceed in court to clean them up.
The stakes are high—as there are potentially millions of ineligible
names on the voter rolls in these two states.

Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting
rights. As part of our work, we assembled a team of highly experienced
voting rights attorneys. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior
attorney, leads our election law program. Popper was previously in the
Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department,
where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent
decrees, and settlements in dozens of states.

We announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35168&F=T&&hash=54a98dc0af766e1e8cc838fce97a5fdf7566055cdbed1702d666a75e847d5956]
in May that our work led to the removal of more than five million
ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide.

Recently, the Commonwealth of Kentucky reported that 735,000
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=34903&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtYWRhbXMta3ktbnZyYS1jb21wbGlhbmNlLW5vdGljZS0wMDA5NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bc0d19050231e9e2e7b38d34efcd9fa4ab74a2999b47431616febf3c8d30105d]
ineligible voter registrations had been removed from its voter rolls
since 2019 by the State Board of Elections as part of its 2018 consent
decree settling a lawsuit by Judicial Watch.

As part of its 2022 settlement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=28646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f85eb002f4b9dfa8334e25686194139c3301a613cd8d8d197cbaf3272fc1aa08],
New York
City alone has removed 918,139 ineligible names from its rolls. Recent
data show 477,056
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=34904&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdmFsZW50aW5lLW55Yy1udnJhLXJlbW92YWxzLTIwMjMtMjAyNS0wMzk1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e75255b60e0d9142650fb9fd77ab73add57a5816b3083f563ddb2f3e405036e4]
removals between March 2023 and February 2025, which is in addition to
the 441,083 previously reported removals.

In July, we filed an opening brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35707&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtc2NvdHVzLWJyaWVmLTAyNzU0LTI2NDQtNTY4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3a30b634aa43d688b087924956aca5ad4734fdf3d0308b58ebe537cd59f9b434]
to the Supreme Court of the United States in a case filed on behalf of
Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before
the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law
extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by
federal law (_Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan
Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette
Matthews_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=28345&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hhZWwtYm9zdC1ldC1hbC12LWlsLWJvYXJkLW9mLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI3NTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f4376e8898ff95bf9e3947157b9ae5b6c5656a891d5567d3dadc20895ed43f3c
_(No.
1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)).

In June, we announced that the U.S. Department of Justice filed a
statement of interest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35436&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZ3JpZmZpbi12YWxhZGUtZXQtYWwtc3RhdGVtZW50LTAxNzgzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9123720e4790ee7d95e72b875c275f012aaf03e1e50aab2460654129fa680196]
in our lawsuit that calls on Oregon’s secretary of state to make
“a reasonable effort to remove” the registrations of ineligible
registrants from the voter rolls as required by federal law (_Judicial
Watch, et al. v. The State of Oregon et al._

terrorist organization. García is currently detained
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35759&F=T&&hash=3e9223b09297aed4d9d1e14d528e99f22e9af46b49ede4251c45dbd4ec1cbc95]
in a Tennessee jail, awaiting a judicial decision in his human
smuggling trial.

CRIMINAL ALIENS INFILTRATE U.S. THROUGH PROGRAM TO HELP ABANDONED KIDS

The word “porous” doesn’t begin to explain our southern border
before Donald Trump was elected President. Our_ Corruption
Chronicles_ blog describes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35773&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY3JpbWluYWwtYWxpZW5zLWluZmlsdHJhdGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ae4c7c1ba26a655c49dda5083f9a88509504cb2e9bd218cd4845758e74a6ded9]
one of the
many loopholes.

Violent gang members, murderers and sex offenders have infiltrated the
United States through a special government program that provides
illegal immigrants under the age of 21 who claim to be abused,
abandoned or neglected by a parent with a pathway to residency and
citizenship. In the last ten years more than 300,000 migrants have
applied for the protection, known as Special Immigrant Juvenile
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35793&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNjaXMuZ292L3dvcmtpbmctaW4tVVMvZWI0L1NJSj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=655019eb3992e585d4ce581739e1b3acbac6a46453bb4649f821753d76e79765]
(SIJ) classification,
and federal authorities are finally exposing the serious national
security and integrity vulnerabilities of the decades-old initiative.
Besides widespread identity and age fraud, known or suspected
terrorists are filing SIJ petitions, according to U.S. Citizenship and
Immigration Services (USCIS), the agency that oversees the program.

In a recently published report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35794&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNjaXMuZ292L3NpdGVzL2RlZmF1bHQvZmlsZXMvZG9jdW1lbnQvcmVwb3J0cy9ET19TSUpfUmVwb3J0LnBkZl1VU0NJUz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a83c1ed0fde665b52abe5a6120a067abfe982aaeba926b13501cbc4d0543b6ad
confirms that 198,414 SIJ petitions were approved in the last ten
years and more than half were over the age of 18. The overwhelming
majority—72%—came to the U.S. illegally from Guatemala, El
Salvador and Honduras, a region known as the northern triangle that
received billions of American taxpayer dollars under former Vice
President Kamala Harris’s failed Root Causes Strategy
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=35795&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdnBzLWZhaWxlZC1pbml0aWF0aXZlL110bz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=79d00a2f41e5f0851f224c7dd39f1bea63cb7475e9b249ad179419ed67b7e89c
curb illegal
immigration. Unbelievably, over 500 known or suspected members of the
notoriously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) were authorized by the
government for SIJ classification during the period examined. SIJ
petitions were also approved for members of other deadly gangs,
including Tren de Aragua (TdA), 18th Street gang and members of the
Sureño and Norteño gangs. “The gang statistics were compiled by
manual identification and, consequently, are likely an
underrepresentation of the total number of gang members within this
population,” USCIS found. The agency discloses that dozens of gang
members have been charged with federal racketeering offenses for
murder and attempted murder. Nearly 19,000 SIJ petitioners had
criminal arrests and at least 120 were arrested for murder, the agency
records show. At least 200 approved SIJ petitioners were convicted of
sex crimes and were registered in the National Sex Offender Registry.

As if this were not bad enough, federal immigration authorities
observed a “significant increase in SIJ petitions in recent years
filed by aliens from countries where designated foreign terrorist
organizations (FTOs) are known to recruit or operate.” The countries
include Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, Russia, Somalia, and Afghanistan. Many
of the SIJ petitioners from the terrorist countries entered the U.S.
“without inspection,” the report says, adding that “federal law
enforcement authorities have determined some of these SIJ petitioners
may pose a risk to national security.” As an example, USCIS offers
the case of an 18-year-old man from Tajikistan who crossed into the
U.S. illegally from Mexico through the San Ysidro port of entry in
April 2023. He claimed both his parents physically abused him, his
father by beating him while drunk and throwing vodka bottles at him
and his mother by hitting, slapping, and throwing heavy objects at
him. About a year later he was among a group of Tajik nationals
arrested by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for ties to the
Islamic State (IS or ISIS) terrorist group. Federal law enforcement
officials said that after the Tajik nationals entered the U.S., they
identified a terrorist plot in its early stages.

Many criminals have also come to the U.S. under another special
program that welcomes illegal immigrants under the age of 18 and
provides them with a multitude of taxpayer benefits. The government
refers to them as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) and hundreds of
thousands have entered the country in the last few years. The
overwhelming majority of UAC are not really children but rather young
adults in their teens and some have criminal histories. Approximately
72% of UAC in custody are over 14 years of age and 66% are male.
Nearly half (47%) of the underage migrants come from Guatemala, 32%
from Honduras,13% from El Salvador and 8% from other countries. A few
years ago, a 17-year-old MS-13 gang member who entered the U.S. as a
UAC raped and murdered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75708&L=28792&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ2FuZy1tZW1iZXItY2hhcmdlZC13aXRoLW11cmRlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=891fcb61f397e819fd51dd606e43faee6494a25f243d95a1727c93a33656126b]
a
20-year-old woman just months after being released in the country.
Years earlier two UAC were charged with raping a 14-year-old girl in
the bathroom of a Maryland public high school. The illegal immigrants
were both charged with first-degree rape and two counts of
first-degree sexual offense. Both were in the ninth grade like their
victim. One came from El Salvador and the other from Guatemala. A year
earlier two UAC, both 17-year-old MS-13 members from Central America,
executed a Massachusetts man by shooting him in the head shortly after
being welcomed into the U.S.

Until next week,

clean_body: Judicial Watch Settles Biden Audio Tapes Lawsuit [INSIDE JW] DOUBLE VICTORY: LAWSUITS TO CLEAN UP VOTER ROLLS ADVANCE IN TWO STATES [] In a double win for Judicial Watch and clean elections, federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled [] this week that our lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean up their dirty voter rolls. Our lawsuits allege that both California and Illinois violated the National Voter Registration Act [], which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. In California, Judicial Watch and the Libertarian Party of California sued [] after uncovering a broad failure to clean up voter rolls in dozens of California counties. The amended complaint details that, in correspondence with us, California admitted that 21 counties removed five or fewer registrations in a two-year period pursuant to a key provision of federal law. Sixteen counties removed zero such registrations during that period (Judicial Watch Inc. and the Libertarian Party of CA v. Shirley Weber et al. [] (No. 2:24-cv-03750). In Illinois, Judicial Watch and two political organizations, Breakthrough Ideas and Illinois Family Action, and registered voter Carol Davis, sued [] after alleging 23 counties, with a combined 980,089 registered voters, reported removing a combined total of just 100 voter registrations under a key provision of federal law over the past two-year period (Judicial Watch Inc. et al. v. Illinois State Board of Elections et al [ [] (No. 1:24-cv-01867)). In both cases [], the judges allowed the lawsuits to continue. The voter rolls in Illinois and California are a mess, and these court decisions allow our legal team to proceed in court to clean them up. The stakes are high—as there are potentially millions of ineligible names on the voter rolls in these two states. Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of our work, we assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. We announced [] in May that our work led to the removal of more than five million ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide. Recently, the Commonwealth of Kentucky reported that 735,000 [] ineligible voter registrations had been removed from its voter rolls since 2019 by the State Board of Elections as part of its 2018 consent decree settling a lawsuit by Judicial Watch. As part of its 2022 settlement [], New York City alone has removed 918,139 ineligible names from its rolls. Recent data show 477,056 [] removals between March 2023 and February 2025, which is in addition to the 441,083 previously reported removals. In July, we filed an opening brief [] to the Supreme Court of the United States in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews [ (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). In June, we announced that the U.S. Department of Justice filed a statement of interest [] in our lawsuit that calls on Oregon’s secretary of state to make “a reasonable effort to remove” the registrations of ineligible registrants from the voter rolls as required by federal law (Judicial Watch, et al. v. The State of Oregon et al. [] (No. 6:24-cv-01783)). EMAILS REVEAL BIDEN DHS AND FBI INVESTIGATIONS OF TIM WALZ AND CHINA Judicial Watch received 47 pages [] of records from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) in a FOIA lawsuit about Gov. Tim Walz’s connections to the Chinese Communist Party. DHS and the FBI counter-intelligence investigations into Walz’s CCP connections determined that “China is happy” with Walz being selected as Kamala Harris’s running mate on the 2024 Democratic presidential ticket. Walz’s connections to the CCP were extensive and a concern to the intelligence community, according to the documents produced. This is a major scandal. These documents show that the Biden administration covered up intelligence concerns about Tim Walz’s connections to China. The documents were released in response to our March 2025 FOIA lawsuit [] (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:25-cv-00625)) for: All documents and communications in the DHS Microsoft Teams group chat “NST NFT Bi-Weekly Sync” from July 1, 2024, to present, including all accompanying, uploaded, or imbedded attachments and documents, referring or relating to Minnesota Governor Timothy J. Walz (or the office and/or staff of Governor Walz) All Intelligence Information Reports and Regional Intelligence Notes (including these documents that have been titled or categorized differently) from November 1, 2023, to present related to Minnesota Governor Timothy J. Walz (or the office and/or staff of Governor Walz). All requests for assistance or referrals to other federal agencies regarding Minnesota Governor Timothy J. Walz. An email dated August 6, 2024, the day Walz was officially named the Democrat vice presidential nominee, shows Homeland Security personnel discussing how they were aware that communist China had a plan to target politicians likely to end up in DC, specifically Walz and Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo. A Homeland Security official whose name is redacted states: Walt’s got the Vp. You all have no idea how these feeds into what prc [People’s Republic of China] has been doing here with him and local gov. It’s seriously a line of the intel. Target someone who is perceived they can get to DC Another official responds: “this speaks too to the rin [raw intelligence] you reviewed for us”. A participant adds: “the perception narrative that has been pushed with one of the local ngos [non-governmental organizations] had direct ties to the former Gov here in Nevada. FBI has lead on a couple of things the only issue is being in the 9th circuit.” A participant states: “Good to know and yes there involvement with HSI [Homeland Security Investigations] and fbi on things here”. Another adds: “If anyone has interest I can give provide context in a classified setting.” An official noted: “But this has more of strategic impact then obviously the general public knows”. A BBC article [] titled “‘Harris’s no 2 taught in China': Chinese internet reacts to Walz.” is posted to the non-classified, Microsoft Teams group chat, on August 7, 2024, by a redacted Homeland Security participant in the group. The article states that Walz “spent a year in the south-eastern province of Guandong in 1989 – a topic that was trending on Weibo with 12 million views.” “The fact that it happened in 1989 - the year of the Tiananmen Square massacre – was not lost on those commenting on Chinese social media,” the article adds. A participant in the August 7, 2024, group chat with a name states: “China is happy” Another noted: “you need components” Someone adds: “and CIFTs [Counterintelligence Task Force] too” A group chat participant states: “with FBI mission in the CI [counterintelligence] field i believe they need to get included....” Another clarifies: “CITF [corrects the previous acronym above]” A group chat participant adds: “I think this conversation is FOIA-able...” A participant states: “makes a great point about CITF coordination, I will state though that folks need to be cognizant of who the primary players even with FBI being the executive agency for CITF. ie dealing with SAPs [Special Access Programs] here so CI depends on what the problem set is and who will take point” On October 29, 2024, House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer said a Homeland Security whistleblower [] told the committee that Walz was a “target” of the Chinese Communist Party as “someone they can get to DC.” The whistleblower also disclosed “that officials from DHS’s Office of Intelligence and Analysis (I&A) and Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) have been involved in the Department’s investigative and/or intelligence work connected with the CCP, the state of Minnesota, and Governor Walz.” The documents show a skeptical internal DHS discussion about Wang’s contacts with Walz. In the nation-state threat Bi-weekly sync conversation [] dated September 12, 2024, a DHS participant who has a redacted dhs.gov [] email address states: “I need someones thoughts (please keep internal to DHS)” Another participant explains: “so this person requested a meeting with Walz due to the house investigation they have walz for his relationship china. Then he drafted this letter for upcoming travel he has to china assuming he will get detained”. The person who requested the meeting with Walz, Chang Wang, is a U.S. citizen, an attorney, adjunct professor at the University of Minnesota, and vice chair of the Council on Asian Pacific Minnesotans. Wang writes to Walz that he fears being “forcibly detained” upon an upcoming visit to China. He also includes a copy of his itinerary while in China which includes being a witness in a court case. One participant responds: “I read this as TNR but what am I missing”. Another adds: “that’s what it looks like...begs the question, if he anticipates being detained, why go? weird.” Someone replies: “I know right”. Another group chat participant adds: “I am working with hsi (Homeland Security Investigations) on it”. A question follows: “what is TNR?” Another participant clarifies: “transnational repression”. One person elaborates: “i’m not sure it counts as TNR since it seems to assume being snatched while in China, so it isn’t crossing borders. if he claims they have been pressuring or seeking to coerce him while he’s home in, apparently MN, that would count as TNR. I don’t know the background on him. [Redacted] is my TNR lead.” Another offers: “can reach [redacted] as well, my China lead. A group chat participant writes: “mind you, if he's a known dissident they probably were pressuring him while he was in the U.S. If he went back anyway, Navalny style, and got pinched, it's just that part that might not be treated as TNR. There's no TNR statute per se (only proposals) so FBI investigates it as elements of the underlying offenses (like the stalking, extortion, assault, kidnapping, etc.” Another group chat participant adds: “Not my area but his itinerary entry for 9/29 is interesting appears he is a witness for the plaintiffs in a court case. Could be related to why he thinks he may be detained. Also is there additional context on why he requested that meeting or the proposed topic?” JUSTICE DEPARTMENT SETTLES JUDICIAL WATCH BIDEN AUDIO TAPES LAWSUIT Judicial Watch reached a settlement [] with the U.S. Department of Justice in which the government agreed to pay $10,000 for attorneys’ fees and other costs associated with our successful lawsuit forcing the release of the audio tapes of President Biden’s interview with Special Counsel Robert Hur (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:24 CV-700-TJK)). We filed the first FOIA lawsuit [] in July 2024 for the audio recordings (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-00700)). The lawsuit [] forced the release of the tapes in May, which has resulted in criminal and congressional investigations into the Biden White House Judicial Watch’s heavy lifting ended the cover-up of the Biden-Hur tapes. Our lawsuit caused the release of the tapes and multiple new official investigations of exactly who was running the Biden White House. The modest settlement of $10,000 is a fraction of the value to the public interest from our lawsuit. In June 2024, this lawsuit forced the Biden administration to admit [] that the transcripts of audio recordings of Biden’s interviews with Special Counsel Hur had been altered and are not accurate. The transcripts were altered in a way, as the actual audio shows, to minimize evidence of Joe Biden’s cognitive failure. In February 2025, a federal court ordered [] the Trump Justice Department to declare whether it intended to continue denying our request for the audio, which led to today’s release. In April 2025, we uncovered Justice Department records [] showing White House staffers suggesting edits to transcripts of President Biden’s interview regarding his handling of secret documents. The Justice Department also recently turned over to ush 49 pages [] of records detailing pressure asserted by the Biden White House and Joe Biden’s personal lawyers on Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding the interviews of then-President Biden. Non-disclosure agreements signed by the president’s lawyers were also included in the records. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ON SEN. VAN HOLLEN’S VISIT TO EL SALVADOR You’re aware of Sen. Chris Van Hollen’s infamous trip to El Salvador to give aid and comfort to a dangerous illegal alien. Your tax dollars paid for the Maryland Democrat’s political theater, so we want to know more. Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the U.S. State Department for all records regarding the trip, on which he met with deported illegal alien and accused MS-13 gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [ (No. 1:25-cv-02273)). Judicial Watch sued after the State Department failed to respond to an April 22, 2025, FOIA request for: Any and all records concerning, regarding, or relating to the April 2025 visit to El Salvador by Senator Chris Van Hollen. This request includes, but is not limited to, all related agendas, briefing materials, and records of communications. Van Hollen met with Garcia in El Salvador on April 17. The senator admitted [] in an April 20 interview with Fox News that his trip to El Salvador was taxpayer funded. Homeland Security released documents [] that it says prove the 29-year-old Garcia is a member of the notorious MS-13 gang, which the Trump administration has declared a foreign terrorist organization. García is currently detained [] in a Tennessee jail, awaiting a judicial decision in his human smuggling trial. CRIMINAL ALIENS INFILTRATE U.S. THROUGH PROGRAM TO HELP ABANDONED KIDS The word “porous” doesn’t begin to explain our southern border before Donald Trump was elected President. Our Corruption Chronicles blog describes [] one of the many loopholes. Violent gang members, murderers and sex offenders have infiltrated the United States through a special government program that provides illegal immigrants under the age of 21 who claim to be abused, abandoned or neglected by a parent with a pathway to residency and citizenship. In the last ten years more than 300,000 migrants have applied for the protection, known as Special Immigrant Juvenile [] (SIJ) classification, and federal authorities are finally exposing the serious national security and integrity vulnerabilities of the decades-old initiative. Besides widespread identity and age fraud, known or suspected terrorists are filing SIJ petitions, according to U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), the agency that oversees the program. In a recently published report [ confirms that 198,414 SIJ petitions were approved in the last ten years and more than half were over the age of 18. The overwhelming majority—72%—came to the U.S. illegally from Guatemala, El Salvador and Honduras, a region known as the northern triangle that received billions of American taxpayer dollars under former Vice President Kamala Harris’s failed Root Causes Strategy [ curb illegal immigration. Unbelievably, over 500 known or suspected members of the notoriously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) were authorized by the government for SIJ classification during the period examined. SIJ petitions were also approved for members of other deadly gangs, including Tren de Aragua (TdA), 18th Street gang and members of the Sureño and Norteño gangs. “The gang statistics were compiled by manual identification and, consequently, are likely an underrepresentation of the total number of gang members within this population,” USCIS found. The agency discloses that dozens of gang members have been charged with federal racketeering offenses for murder and attempted murder. Nearly 19,000 SIJ petitioners had criminal arrests and at least 120 were arrested for murder, the agency records show. At least 200 approved SIJ petitioners were convicted of sex crimes and were registered in the National Sex Offender Registry. As if this were not bad enough, federal immigration authorities observed a “significant increase in SIJ petitions in recent years filed by aliens from countries where designated foreign terrorist organizations (FTOs) are known to recruit or operate.” The countries include Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, Russia, Somalia, and Afghanistan. Many of the SIJ petitioners from the terrorist countries entered the U.S. “without inspection,” the report says, adding that “federal law enforcement authorities have determined some of these SIJ petitioners may pose a risk to national security.” As an example, USCIS offers the case of an 18-year-old man from Tajikistan who crossed into the U.S. illegally from Mexico through the San Ysidro port of entry in April 2023. He claimed both his parents physically abused him, his father by beating him while drunk and throwing vodka bottles at him and his mother by hitting, slapping, and throwing heavy objects at him. About a year later he was among a group of Tajik nationals arrested by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for ties to the Islamic State (IS or ISIS) terrorist group. Federal law enforcement officials said that after the Tajik nationals entered the U.S., they identified a terrorist plot in its early stages. Many criminals have also come to the U.S. under another special program that welcomes illegal immigrants under the age of 18 and provides them with a multitude of taxpayer benefits. The government refers to them as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) and hundreds of thousands have entered the country in the last few years. The overwhelming majority of UAC are not really children but rather young adults in their teens and some have criminal histories. Approximately 72% of UAC in custody are over 14 years of age and 66% are male. Nearly half (47%) of the underage migrants come from Guatemala, 32% from Honduras,13% from El Salvador and 8% from other countries. A few years ago, a 17-year-old MS-13 gang member who entered the U.S. as a UAC raped and murdered [] a 20-year-old woman just months after being released in the country. Years earlier two UAC were charged with raping a 14-year-old girl in the bathroom of a Maryland public high school. The illegal immigrants were both charged with first-degree rape and two counts of first-degree sexual offense. Both were in the ninth grade like their victim. One came from El Salvador and the other from Guatemala. A year earlier two UAC, both 17-year-old MS-13 members from Central America, executed a Massachusetts man by shooting him in the head shortly after being welcomed into the U.S. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

Friends,
This week, Joe Walsh and I kicked off our brand new weekly show _Welcome to the Party, Pal_ --and we're not holding anything back. Every Thursday at noon Eastern, a former Tea Party congressman (him) and a 20-year Democratic strategist (me) get together to take stock of this surreal political moment--and talk about what the hell we're going to do about it. Episode one is a must-watch.
👉 Click below to join us--and bring your people with you.
* **[00:01:16] Joe Walsh: "Eight weeks ago I became a Democrat."** How a former right-wing congressman made the leap--and how he's being received.
* **[00:03:10] Building a big tent.** Why I'm fine with a coalition that includes Joe Walsh _and_ Zohran Mamdani--and what it takes to earn trust.
* **[00:08:06] Democrats, debt, and missed opportunities.** We break down what it means to be _actually_ fiscally responsible--and what's getting in the way.
* **[00:14:03] Soft power, strong institutions.** We get into the dangers of dismantling the State Department, the strategic case for foreign aid, and how Democrats need to make the argument.
* **[00:23:36] Holding the fascists accountable.** Joe says it plainly: the modern Republican Party is fascist. We talk about how Democrats can meet the moment with urgency and force.

**If you're feeling like the stakes are sky-high, it 's because they are. And if you're sick of the same old voices punting on hard conversations, this is the show for you. Become a paid subscriber to get every episode and support the work--it's the only way we win.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..bW1O3P-ZDqGDTPfY90TTo9DqkP5n6CsJhH4LnRroXMo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169855511)
With urgency,
_-- Mike_

What I tell you next should enrage you.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206qxrykdzun9h6ptrparubv7gp3074xcad5sz8mdpdfx9nf3tsn1xy8ztejejms2ho08r8ucgpom72m99c&__stmp=t0c43f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Friend, what I tell you next should enrage you.

A recently declassified report details irrefutable evidence that **President Obama, former Director of the CIA John Brennan, and others fabricated the Russia hoax** , promoting the LIE that Vladimir Putin helped President Trump win the 2016 election.

You read that right, Friend. The Democrats manufactured a complete, alternative reality just to undermine the legitimacy of President Trump.

_**Take a moment and think about all the effects downstream of this betrayal...**_

Now, Tulsi Gabbard is referring former President Obama to the Department of Justice for criminal implications.

THIS is why it is CRITICAL that radical, conniving Democrats, like Obama, do NOT take back any ground we won in 2024.

Turning Point PAC has a plan to build the RED WALL to secure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This is why I need your help to raise $75,000 before the end of the month.

**As part of that plan, we're giving away my book and exclusive President Trump lithographs when you donate before the end of the month.**

[Donate $25 = Get _Right Wing Revolution_](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c43f&__onlt=h)

The last election was an America First mandate, but we cannot afford to rest on our laurels.

You and I must [ACT NOW to build the RED WALL](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c43f&__onlt=h) by focusing our energy on MUST-WIN battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

Otherwise, these bad actors will come back into power and resume their subversion of our American way of life.

They will destroy everything that this country stands for, namely the Constitution and the Bill of Rights.

Friend, we now have proof they tried to undermine President Trump's victory before.

** _What else have the Democrats done to stop us from achieving victory that we don't even know about yet?_**

This is why we are fighting door-by-door, ballot-by-ballot, to win in critical battleground states.

[It's also why I'm asking you to pitch in and help us build the RED WALL by donating today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c43f&__onlt=h)

Charlie Kirk

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206qxrzoofxtzk2jkc4vrbpjvbequ4sds7rhj19o9ad0n4ph0nf1jvajslolg8hglx9y6ds1wuyjqtvkb94&__stmp=t0c563&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h)** Friend, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**Friend, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h)
---
P.S. Friend, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. [**Please rush back your emergency gift in just 24 hours.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0c563&__onlt=h) When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk
---
