clean_body: | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY just got huge. Friend, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity. Hosting SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person. The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good. And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom. For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like: | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. And because it’s so critical that you get your crucial gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us. Thank you! Kirk Cameron P.S. Friend, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk | | | Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

**Riverbend Ranch**
Riverbend Ranch has been around for 35 years, selecting cattle that have higher marbling and tenderness than any other beef. You cannot get this beef in your grocery store. Riverbend Ranch ages their beef for 21 days and you'll find it more tender and flavorful than even the finest restaurants. So, if you're ready to have the best steak of your life, head to https://www.riverbendranch.com. Use promo code: SEAN to get $20 of your first order.
It was an epic week for President Trump and his cabinet. Jim McLaughlin of McLaughlin and Associates is here to break down their latest polling from July. With the EU trade deal, a June surplus and a booming economy, President Trump is really fighting for the American people. His approval rating as of right now is 52 percent, and that is with an absolutely demented Democratic party and a propaganda media system poised against him. Americans have gotten smart to the noise and they respect and appreciate everything President Trump is doing to propel us into another golden age. Republicans as whole are up plus 5 on the generic ballot and are looking good as we head into midterms. Democrats on the other hand have lost their minds. Radical Socialist like Zohran Mamdani and AOC are where Democrats are at and each day the line gets pushed further and further towards Socialism. The Texas redistricting will give the GOP 5 more seats in Texas but it all hinges on the Latino vote. Do Republicans have a 45-50 percent hold on the Latino vote in Texas? What other Republican states will look to redistrict like Texas? Democrats have fewer tools to redistrict like Republicans do, but that doesn't seem to be stopping Gavin Newsom. Ryan Girdusky is here to unpack it all!

clean_body: Help us celebrate. | = | Today is Josh’s 39th birthday — the start of his final year in his 30s! As one of the youngest members of Congress, we’re constantly impressed with his courageousness. He’s not scared to stand up for what’s right, even as he represents a swing district. It makes us really proud to work for him. We’re putting together a birthday card to show Josh just how many of us are grateful for his leadership and ready to fight alongside him. Thanks for being a part of this team and for standing with Josh as he fights for our values. We need more representatives like him. — Team Harder *

**_THE STATE_**
Virginia is the ONLY state in the nation where Democrats can flip a Governor's seat blue in 2025.
Just four years ago, Republicans were elected to all three statewide offices: Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General. Now, Trump's allies are dumping money into Virginia to keep hold of power.
They know a Democratic win here would send _shockwaves_ across the country heading into 2026.

**_THE CANDIDATES_**
**_Abigail Spanberger (D)_** is our Democratic nominee for Governor. She's a former CIA officer and three-term Congresswoman who flipped a ruby red seat in 2018 and has fought to lower families' costs, secure our freedoms, and deliver on a commonsense agenda.
_Voters can trust that she'll put Virginians first and stand up to extremism._
**_Winsome Earle-Sears (R)_** is the far-right Republican nominee for Governor. She's in lockstep with Trump's extreme agenda and is trying to distract voters from her record of opposing reproductive rights, voting to defund public schools, and downplaying the DOGE layoffs of Virginia workers.

**_Experts consider our race a toss-up._**
Back in 2021, Glenn Youngkin was elected by just two points. Now, polls show Sears has a path to rebuild his winning coalition. National Republicans know our opponent has serious baggage, but they're prepared to pummel our ticket with attacks in order to eke out the victory this November.

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Keep the momentum rolling! Return your ballot today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Keep the momentum rolling! Return your ballot today!

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | Please remember to return your ballot and VOTE!The time I’ve spent in Washington, D.C. has been amazing, exciting and – for the good of the whole country – very productive. But, I live here in Spokane, and while the work we are doing in Congress is undeniably important, it isn’t the only battleground. **You should already have your ballot for the August primary election, and ballots must be returned by Tuesday, August 5.** Here in Eastern Washington there are council and school races as well as tax and fee increase measures on the ballot. Your vote counts.There are important elections in just about every county. It is vitally important that you return your ballot.A free republic is only as strong as its foundation, and that foundation is built one elected office at a time. Every single position on the ballot holds the power to shape the future.This election, we have a chance to elect strong conservatives who share our values and are committed to principles of limited government, fiscal responsibility, and individual liberty. By supporting them, you ensure that our voices are heard and our principles are represented at every level of government.Don't let this critical election pass you by. Take a moment today to put your ballot in the mail or put it in a [drop box in your community](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=7ec05f11a3&e=5a45b9550e).Then, spread the word. Remind your friends, family and neighbors that every vote counts.Sincerely,
---
|
---
| P.S. There’s no time like the present to return your ballot. It needs to be in the mail by August 5, but why not return it today?P.P.S. If you care about conservative values, your contribution would be appreciated.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: This is outrageous — Trump has no cause to fire the Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we can’t trust the economic data coming out of the federal government, it isn’t just the United States that’s in danger.
#

Team,
When I first ran for Senate, my motto was simple: Science. Data. Facts.
Trump? Not so much.
He just fired the Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics because he didn’t like the unemployment data they released today that shows his tariffs hurting American workers. That’s like trying to get the teacher fired because you got a bad grade. He says she “manipulated” the data — and he’s put out absolutely no evidence to back up that claim.
This is what happens in authoritarian countries.
If we can’t trust the economic data coming out of the federal government, it isn’t just the United States that’s in danger — it’s the entire world. We are the largest economy on the planet, and the U.S. dollar is the global reserve currency.
And if Congress doesn’t immediately push back on the White House over this, I will.
I’m personally demanding Trump show his cards. If the White House has evidence, the public deserves to see it. In a democracy, which this country STILL IS, the public is entitled to transparency.
If the evidence is too sensitive, they need to come before Congress and deliver it.
This is serious, team. Trump’s already done a ton of damage to the agencies responsible for gathering this data. We have to stop him from doing more.
**Please, join me and sign this petition so we can tell Trump:[Put up or shut up. Release the data and justify this. If he does not, there must be accountability.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/bls_signup_aug25/?source=em250801-1-700k&akid=6141%2E6688874%2EuAw5kO)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/bls_signup_aug25/?source=em250801-1-700k&akid=6141%2E6688874%2EuAw5kO)**
Thank you,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6141%2E6688874%2EuAw5kO).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Greg Casar
subject: Our community is being targeted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The proposed Republican gerrymandered Texas congressional map is out — and
it's exactly what we feared.

Donald Trump and Greg Abbott are targeting my community.

If this map goes through, my district, TX-35, would be merged with TX-37
into one combined seat.

I’ll be clear: the merging of these districts is illegal voter suppression
of Black and Latino Central Texans. It's an attack on voting rights and a
blatant violation of Martin Luther King’s Voting Rights Act of 1965.

Trump and his allies want to rip the Voting Rights Act to shreds, and
they’re starting right here in Central Texas. If they succeed, their ploy
will spread like wildfire across the country.

If we stay silent, they’ll get away with it. But if we organize, raise our
voices, and demand action — we can stop them.

I refuse to stay silent while they try to disenfranchise us, and I hope
you’ll join me in fighting back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250801-gc?refcode=em20250801-36896&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36896_1203867_LDBTIb&akid=36896%2E1203867%2ELDBTIb ]If you’re with me and care about the future of our democracy, please
split $5 between Justice Democrats and my campaign to help
us fight back against this racist and illegal map.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250801-gc?refcode=em20250801-36896&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36896_1203867_LDBTIb&akid=36896%2E1203867%2ELDBTIb ]Contribute $5

When we fight together, we win.

Thanks for standing with me,

– Greg Casar

name: Cliff Schecter with Blue Amp
subject: Kamala Told Colbert the System’s "Broken;" Trump Proved it by Ending PBS/NPR
body:
There's something wrong with the world today. I don't know what it is. Something's wrong with our eyes. We're seeing things in a different way - Aerosmith, "Livin on the Edge"

### **Blue Letter**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d416ee61-c3cb-46b0-9a2f-15585f320528?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
`Folks, The Number of New Paid Subscribers has Dramatically Slowed this Past Week. Without Them, We Can't Continue to Expand The Soundcheck Fund--Just as Trump Kills the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support the Growth of Independent Media `
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.iDbIYwFgbbUqgtAErRCRG_AdL1WP3wXyJXyrqi0Abek?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169873855)
### **Cliff 's Note: Yes, Our System is Most Definitely "Broken"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e0e4106-3579-4552-9059-c31996fd3aa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Kamala Harris sat across from Stephen Colbert --**[himself recently fired ](https://substack.com/redirect/d9afebb8-1592-4c5c-8db1-88f5ed6a8ef1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to make the [slovenly golf-cheat](https://substack.com/redirect/13668233-62c6-4b0e-9d7a-9ad3e85687c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) happy so he'd "allow" Skydance Media to take over Paramount Global (doesn't this even sound Orwellian?)**-- and admitted [our political culture, our system, is broken](https://substack.com/redirect/3160ecbf-74dd-4abd-ba36-4dcc419865eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** She wasn't talking hypotheticals.
**She was talking about what the American republic looks like** _**right**_****_**now**_**, July, 2025.**
This is why, former Vice President Kamala Harris explained, she had chosen _not to run for Governor of California_. Because our entire system's been hijacked. By James-Bond-villain-billionaires and mid-talent hangers-on, who'd throw momma from the train for that multimillion dollar penthouse.
Assisted by dweeby, cocksure incels who concocted Project 2025 in their Spongebob PJs, and gyrating, tongue-talking religious cultists so frightened of reality, they became beguiled by funhouse mirrors. All [tied together sloppily by Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/739f8fe6-c3f0-4681-8345-c76fd32e686b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--the gaudy-Biff-Tannen inspiration with piss-cotton-candy hair and the greed of Genghis Khan running through his circulatory system.
The corruption by these forces combined, so thorough, that it's become the beating heart of our federal government. So Kamala Harris feels she can do more outside the system to help democracy than by existing in it.
**That 's a helluva statement about that system, isn't it?**
I keep hearing a whisper of those famous words in my ear as I contemplate all of this, Benjamin Franklin's statement about what kind of government the Constitutional Convention had produced in their secret meetings in Philadelphia in the summer of 1787. "A republic...if you can keep it."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b506e63-164c-4c4f-8a9e-d7efd8643f70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Well, we're sure working on the not keeping it part. As you may have seen, The **Corporation for Public Broadcasting** --home to PBS, NPR, some of the only independent journalism still funded by our government and not in indentured servitude to quarterly profit statements and shareholder value--announced it will **shut down operations in the face of Trump 's devastating funding cuts**.
_" A republic, if we can keep it."_
This, of course, is what authoritarians do. [They gut the referees](https://substack.com/redirect/a00e37a3-72cc-4cce-8812-4ca9075ca3c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They [destroy any free and independent reporting](https://substack.com/redirect/d9afebb8-1592-4c5c-8db1-88f5ed6a8ef1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They leave you with nothing but mooks and Morlocks taking in Murdoch propaganda and a Musk algorithm.
And we're watching it happen in real time. **Today.**
You think this is just about PBS? Well, it wasn't just about USAID, Paul Weiss, Paramount or Columbia University. No. [It's about every remaining institution not bowing to Trump or filling his pockets](https://substack.com/redirect/07f1c62c-6e44-4340-9832-49c49751dde3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), not enriching the oligarchs who support him or willing to be a megaphone for his fascism.
Here are some kinds of stories NPR and PBS won't be around to report on in the near future. All of which would've shocked the conscious a year ago.
**Now? It 's called "Friday":**
**🚨 Ghislaine Maxwell [is being quietly moved to a Texas prison camp](https://substack.com/redirect/af4b45cc-8218-4b5e-a719-f0675bf1158c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--despite Bureau of Prisons rules that are very much _supposed_ to prevent sex traffickers from being able to be moved to low-security resorts. And, why, one close to the Mexico border too, in case states want to prosecute her after she gets her federal pardon. Quelle suprise! Well, who pulled strings on this? Why? **And what is this administration hiding?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d521e00-fcd7-4301-8996-d35160c5d4a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**🚨 Attorney General Pam Bondi, through human side-eye Kash Patel, had [1,000 FBI personnel in Trump's Justice Department remove Trump's name](https://substack.com/redirect/af4b45cc-8218-4b5e-a719-f0675bf1158c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from Epstein files by blackening it out, we found out from a FOIA request via Bloomberg today. One thousand FBI agents working 24 hour shifts for two weeks in March.
I'm totally sure no crime, cartel activity or terrorism was missed [to protect the President from showing up in the files of a pedophile](https://substack.com/redirect/6f24d65e-046b-4bf9-8b01-561af04a70e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--even though we all already knew he was in there. Wonder if anyone in an independent-media capacity could look up what went on while all these agents were busy protecting Trump's FBI-headquarters-sized rear during those two weeks?
Or under what legal authority Bondi or Patel acted? [Why did they lie about it?](https://substack.com/redirect/6f24d65e-046b-4bf9-8b01-561af04a70e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81fe95b4-b70a-475d-b02f-ae8f667e4933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**🚨 Today Trump's job numbers were revised, and they absolutely sucked--**and when I say sucked, I mean like Josh Hawley stick-figure flaccidity as he dashed away from a January 6th coup he helped encourage kinda sucked--**wiping away nearly all our job gains --258,000--in May and June. And July?? Only 73,000 f*king job. 73. Total. **
**How pathetic.**
And how did Trump fix it? He fired the statistician at The Bureau of Labor Statistics, of course, saying it was fake. Oh, but it's real, you see. [Because when some stink-bomb ignoramus keeps threatening tariffs, then pulling back on them](https://substack.com/redirect/4e391591-6147-40ff-aa06-6f904387cecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--TACO Trump, it's called--there's no stability in our markets to companies don't hire.
John Maynard Keynes could've figured this out--and I mean he could do that today--but not the burnt-okra-colored birdbrain we call "President." Again, can Trump just fire the BLS statistician? Well, that's a question NPR and PBS won't be around to ask, soon.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/220686d7-658c-4b50-be10-4018b64a6998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
This, again, [is why we created ](https://substack.com/redirect/a00e37a3-72cc-4cce-8812-4ca9075ca3c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Blue Amp's Soundcheck Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/a00e37a3-72cc-4cce-8812-4ca9075ca3c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--to build a people-powered, independent media army that answers to you, not monopolies or Trump donors.
**[This is why we need YOU to step up.](https://substack.com/redirect/a00e37a3-72cc-4cce-8812-4ca9075ca3c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I'm asking in the strongest language I've ever used:
👉🏽 If you believe in democracy...
👉🏽 If you believe the truth still matters...
👉🏽 If you don't want every news source to be bought by billionaires...
**Become a paid subscriber to Blue Amp today. And support the Soundcheck Fund.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.iDbIYwFgbbUqgtAErRCRG_AdL1WP3wXyJXyrqi0Abek?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169873855)
Because I can't promise you that independent media alone will save our democracy.
But I can promise you this:
**Without it, we will absolutely lose it.**
Let's fight back. Let's _build_ back. Let's _amplify_ _good_.
--Cliff

**Billionaire Stephen Cloobeck, running for California Governor as a Democrat.** You can certainly say he did not lack confidence! Cloobeck Said things bound to piss Democrats off, attacking everyone unions to "Bernie Bros.
He harshly criticized Kamala Harris. He's suing a former girlfriend who was an OnlyFans model, and former Los Angeles Mayor, Antonio Villaraigosa, who he mocked for "not being able to get a job" after being Mayor (Villaraigosa is also running for governor).
He had a big personality, so this was entertaining, but as you can see above, he also had a lot of criticism to offer. He talked about fixing housing issues using empty office buildings and cutting regulations to make it easier to start businesses. Yes, we were fair to him, but we also pushed back when questions weren't answered, and even found time for jokes. Because, ya know, life.
He's been called the "Democratic Donald Trump." Watch and judge for yourself, and let us know your thoughts in the comments!

* * *
**One last time, my friends, with PBS and NPR gone, independent media is going in the opposite direction it needs to be headed. If you want us to keep doing what we do. And if you want us to continue to be able to support the Soundcheck Fund to build independent media,**_**please consider a paid subscription**_**.**
**Thank you, again. And thank you for all you do for our democracy.**

But I can promise you this: Without it, we will absolutely lose it. Let's fight back. Let's build back. Let's amplify good. --Cliff Billionaire Stephen Cloobeck, running for California Governor as a Democrat. You can certainly say he did not lack confidence! Cloobeck Said things bound to piss Democrats off, attacking everyone unions to "Bernie Bros. He harshly criticized Kamala Harris. He's suing a former girlfriend who was an OnlyFans model, and former Los Angeles Mayor, Antonio Villaraigosa, who he mocked for "not being able to get a job" after being Mayor (Villaraigosa is also running for governor). He had a big personality, so this was entertaining, but as you can see above, he also had a lot of criticism to offer. He talked about fixing housing issues using empty office buildings and cutting regulations to make it easier to start businesses. Yes, we were fair to him, but we also pushed back when questions weren't answered, and even found time for jokes. Because, ya know, life. He's been called the "Democratic Donald Trump." Watch and judge for yourself, and let us know your thoughts in the comments! VIDEO ON DEMAND! One last time, my friends, with PBS and NPR gone, independent media is going in the opposite direction it needs to be headed. If you want us to keep doing what we do. And if you want us to continue to be able to support the Soundcheck Fund to build independent media,please consider a paid subscription. Thank you, again. And thank you for all you do for our democracy. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

subject: Text us your questions for Deb at 32403 📱

body:
This campaign is at its strongest when we’re connecting with grassroots supporters.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3543%2E400544%2Ee4Ltqi)
Hey,
Do you have a burning question you’ve _really_ been wanting to ask Deb?
**📱Send us a text message at 32403, and Deb will respond to some of your questions soon!**
Whether you’re wondering about her plans for New Mexico, her years serving in Congress and as Interior Secretary, or which classic rock anthem she blasts on the road, Deb wants to hear from you.
Deb’s running for Governor to change the game for New Mexico, and this campaign is at its strongest when we’re connecting with grassroots supporters across the state.
**So if there’s something you’ve always wanted to ask — big or small, serious or lighthearted — send it our way at 32403 today!**

body:
David wants to thank you for your support at this critical moment.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250801-1&t=1&akid=2466%2E587540%2EtVxpvL)
Peter, **David let us know that he wants to call grassroots donors** to thank them for supporting us during this critical moment for Leaders We Deserve.
**[Want a chance to get a call? Donate $5 now and you might be on the list.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250801_1_calls?refcode=em20250801-2466&amount=5&refcode2=2466_587540_tVxpvL&akid=2466%2E587540%2EtVxpvL)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250801_1_calls?refcode=em20250801-2466&amount=5&refcode2=2466_587540_tVxpvL&akid=2466%2E587540%2EtVxpvL)
Right now, we’re laser-focused on launching our **$20 million investment** in a new generation of progressive leaders. We have some big plans for this election cycle:
🔴 Defeating vulnerable Republicans and flipping their competitive districts blue.
🔵 Challenging ineffective Democrats in safe-seats with young, bold candidates.
🟣 Running progressive champions for open seats and building a bigger bench.
But we also know that **this work is only possible with your support, Peter.** We aren’t funded by right-wing billionaires and corporate PACs. We rely on people just like you chipping in whatever amount makes sense for them, whenever they can.
If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, we risk needing to scale back on our plans for this election. _We can’t let that happen._
**[Peter, will you make a $5 contribution today? If you donate now, you might get a thank you call from David.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250801_1_calls?refcode=em20250801-2466&amount=5&refcode2=2466_587540_tVxpvL&akid=2466%2E587540%2EtVxpvL)**

Leaders We Deserve

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. # [#]
Peter, George here with a quick summer update!

Before the House reconvenes in a few weeks, I wanted to personally thank you for your support this past month. Thanks to folks like you, our campaign exceeded our July fundraising goal!

Even though the House is on summer recess, my work doesn’t stop. I’ve enjoyed meeting with residents across New York’s 16th Congressional District, and spending time with my family — and I hope you are doing the same.

Thank you, Peter, for everything. None of my work I am doing would be possible without your support and generosity.

Thank you again for your continued support,

— George

**Today, he 's bringing that same roll-up-the-sleeves mentality to Washington:**

clean_body: ** THE DEMOCRAT LIES AND SMEARS ARE FLYING IN! Peter, this is Rep. Mike Collins. I'm trying to write you as calmly as I can. Democrat Jon Ossoff just blasted out an email to thousands of his leftist supporters, including YOUR neighbors, straight up lying about my record and disparaging my name. . .**** But here's the God-honest truth: I don't care about the name-calling. I don't care about being called a "MAGA extremist". And I certainly don't care if Jon Ossoff hates the fact that I want illegal aliens kicked off medicaid and DEPORTED from our country. But what I do care about is the MILLIONS of dollars he 's raking in by firing out defamatory texts, emails, and campaign letters just like this.**** . . It's a hard pill to swallow, Peter, but Republicans like you and me are being outraised and outspent right now. And it 's not hard to see why. The Democrats are swelling their campaign coffers off Trump Derangement Syndrome, and they're counting on you to be ASLEEP at the beach while they build a war chest big enough to buy this election. Frankly, they 're saying Ossoff has "unstoppable" momentum. And they know that if you WAIT until next summer to fight back, they'll have a lead so big that even Kirby Smart and the Georgia Bulldogs couldn't mount a comeback. A LOSS in this race could very well mean the Senate falls back to Democrat hands. I don't need to explain to you what comes next: . -> Wide open borders and b**lanket amnesty for illegal aliens ** . -> Massive t**ax hikes on small buseiness and working-class Americans ** . -> **ICE agents and police officers defunded, demonized, and punished ** . ->**Insane transgender ideologies forced on our kids and grandkids ** . -> **Big Tech Censors controlling our elections and silencing your voice . And that 's just scratching the surface, Peter. So I'm giving it my all to defeat Jon Ossoff, and I'm asking you to give your all too. But you can 't wait. I need to know if I can count on your support right now. . .** **.** The future of America is on the line and the America First promise LIVES or DIES on the outcome of this election. . My campaign can 't run on fumes when we get down to the final stretch. And as you can see, this race is already proving to be one of the most expensive and highest-stakes in the country. Without your support today, Peter, Republicans like you and me are asking for a repeat of 2020 and 2022. . This is battleground Georgia we 're talking about! It's time to fuel up and hammer down. Will you rush over $10 or more to my campaign? Yes, $10. That 's all I'm asking. . . . I don't need a million-dollar check to win this thing. And I definitely don't need celebrity endorsements from Hollywood or the big wigs in D.C. To kick my campaign into overdrive and steamroll Democrat Jon Ossoff, all I need is the support of red-blooded Americans like you. Now 's not the time to sit back and act like we've won it all. It's time to press on the gas and CEMENT the MAGA promise for YEARS to come. Will you chip in $10 or more to help me fight against the MILLIONS Jon Ossoff is using to attack my character and destroy my campaign? . . . You can bet he knows what's at stake. And you can bet every Democrat in America is standing behind him. But the real question is: Will you stand behind me? Thank you for any and all support. I owe you big time. . Godspeed, Rep. Mike Collins Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-GA) . . MEET MIKE COLLINS Mike Collins is an America First conservative running for U.S. Senate. He currently represents Georgia's 10th Congressional District in the House of Representatives, but he's no career politician. He spent decades building a trucking empire from the ground up -- hauling freight across the country, creating good-paying jobs, and putting food on the table for over 100 Georgia families. Today, he 's bringing that same roll-up-the-sleeves mentality to Washington: Cutting government waste Torching reckless spending Shredding job-killing regulations Firing tyrannical, do-nothing bureaucrats Revving up the illegal alien deportation machine; and Defending America from those who seek to destroy her Mike lives in Jackson, Georgia with his wife, Leigh Ann. They've got three grown kids, six grandkids, and afire in their belly to help President Trump get our country back on track. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588991/560976165/-1499003177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)**[Share/RSVP From Mobilize](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588992/560976166/-1499003177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) We’re incredibly excited to announce that former Congressman Beto O’Rourke will be holding a town hall for Hoosiers in Indianapolis on August 3! [Follow this link for more information and to RSVP for the event!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588993/560976167/-1499003177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) **It will be on Sunday at 3 PM ET at the VisionLoft Stutz.** All across the country, Democrats are holding Town Hall meetings in red states to listen to Americans and show up even when their own elected Republicans won’t. Democrats have held over 150 events throughout America, and over a dozen have been here in Indiana. We know the Trump administration and Congressional Republicans are scared to talk to Hoosiers about the chaos they’ve caused to healthcare, childcare, and more. That’s why we’re showing up, listening, and preparing for a comeback in 2026. ****_Trump’s Treasury Secretary Says Quiet Part Out Loud – Big Ugly Bill is First Step to Privatizing Social Security_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588994/560976168/-900181608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588995/560976169/-900181608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) Trump’s Treasury Secretary took to TV news on Wednesday to announce that the new “Trump accounts” in the Big Ugly Bill were a backdoor mechanism to privatize Social Security. Republicans promised throughout the 2024 campaign that they would not touch Social Security. This is proof that they lied, and set up these accounts as an excuse to privatize and eliminate Social Security. Every Indiana Republican in Congress voted for this. Reps. Yakym, Stutzman, Baird, Spartz, Shreve, Messmer, and Houchin all supported the Big Ugly Bill. Large majorities of Americans are against privatizing Social Security in any manner. The potential privatization of Social Security is just one major part of the bill. Every IN Republican also voted to kick 200,000 Hoosiers off their health coverage and hundreds of thousands stand to lose SNAP benefits. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588996/560976170/746316607?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)**
[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588997/560976171/746316607?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) A new national report released this week shows that Indiana is once again in the bottom 10 states for early childhood education. This is not the first year in which the Hoosier State has ranked at or near the bottom of the list for pre-K, childcare, and early childhood education. Hoosier Democrats know we must do better for our children, families, and future generations. Indiana’s higher education attainment rate is also falling, and lack of investment in early childhood education is one of several reasons. Statehouse Democrats will once again push for universal pre-K access for all Hoosier kids. **[Click here to see other opportunities and party events near you on Mobilize!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588998/560976172/1316591425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112588999/560976173/626575025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)** Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our [Mobilize!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112589000/560976174/1316591425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA3NmMyMi0zMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JO8EbBPslfj-pjk8Xklxw908j0h49soqO32XrDMCWgY=&emci=11605bfe-2e6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a076c22-316f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) _**Make Your Voice Heard! clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Beto O’Rourke Coming to Indianapolis August 3 For Town Hall We’re incredibly excited to announce that former Congressman Beto O’Rourke will be holding a town hall for Hoosiers in Indianapolis on August 3! It will be on Sunday at 3 PM ET at the VisionLoft Stutz. All across the country, Democrats are holding Town Hall meetings in red states to listen to Americans and show up even when their own elected Republicans won’t. Democrats have held over 150 events throughout America, and over a dozen have been here in Indiana. We know the Trump administration and Congressional Republicans are scared to talk to Hoosiers about the chaos they’ve caused to healthcare, childcare, and more. That’s why we’re showing up, listening, and preparing for a comeback in 2026. Trump’s Treasury Secretary Says Quiet Part Out Loud – Big Ugly Bill is First Step to Privatizing Social Security Trump’s Treasury Secretary took to TV news on Wednesday to announce that the new “Trump accounts” in the Big Ugly Bill were a backdoor mechanism to privatize Social Security. Republicans promised throughout the 2024 campaign that they would not touch Social Security. This is proof that they lied, and set up these accounts as an excuse to privatize and eliminate Social Security. Every Indiana Republican in Congress voted for this. Reps. Yakym, Stutzman, Baird, Spartz, Shreve, Messmer, and Houchin all supported the Big Ugly Bill. Large majorities of Americans are against privatizing Social Security in any manner. The potential privatization of Social Security is just one major part of the bill. Every IN Republican also voted to kick 200,000 Hoosiers off their health coverage and hundreds of thousands stand to lose SNAP benefits. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. A new national report released this week shows that Indiana is once again in the bottom 10 states for early childhood education. This is not the first year in which the Hoosier State has ranked at or near the bottom of the list for pre-K, childcare, and early childhood education. Hoosier Democrats know we must do better for our children, families, and future generations. Indiana’s higher education attainment rate is also falling, and lack of investment in early childhood education is one of several reasons. Statehouse Democrats will once again push for universal pre-K access for all Hoosier kids. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDOT – INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. IDOE – The Indiana Department of Education is taking its first round of feedback on a plan to reassign A-F ratings to all Indiana schools. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, August 11th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Fundamentals of Organizing. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: THANK YOU ALL! 🎒💕
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Because of your support, **we have been able to purchase and assemble 3,000 backpacks with supplies, ready to go to thousands of kids** in need across The Bronx and Queens:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250801-backpacks.RjirR3&refcode=em20250801-9458-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9458%2E2526796%2Ef4WuSI)
I want to stress that it wasn’t just donations, but also your _time_ , _effort_ , and _presence_ that made this happen too.
Our office was FILLED with supporters on Tuesday night, creating community and hand-packing thousands of backpacks with supplies so that we are ready to go _a month ahead of time_ for thousands of kids to go back to school.
Every year these get bigger and bigger. **It’s a true testament to what this is all about**.
From now until school starts, we’ll be helping public housing developments, community organizations, houses of worship, and food pantries have the best family events they can possibly have, giving out backpacks and other back-to-school resources to families who may need a little extra help.
[If you’re able, help us start this school year off strong with this essential community work by making a grassroots contribution.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250801-backpacks.RjirR3&refcode=em20250801-9458-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9458%2E2526796%2Ef4WuSI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250801-backpacks.RjirR3&refcode=em20250801-9458-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9458%2E2526796%2Ef4WuSI)**
**So many kids in The Bronx and Queens this year are going to have their back to school be a little bit brighter because YOUR care and support!**
Thank you. 🙏🏽
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250801-backpacks?refcode=em20250801-9458-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=22&refcode2=9458_2526796_f4WuSI&akid=9458%2E2526796%2Ef4WuSI)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250801-9458-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=23&akid=9458%2E2526796%2Ef4WuSI)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: Because of your support, we have been able to purchase and assemble 3,000 backpacks with supplies, ready to go to thousands of kids in need across The Bronx and Queens: I want to stress that it wasn’t just donations, but also your time , effort , and presence that made this happen too. Our office was FILLED with supporters on Tuesday night, creating community and hand-packing thousands of backpacks with supplies so that we are ready to go a month ahead of time for thousands of kids to go back to school. Every year these get bigger and bigger. It’s a true testament to what this is all about. From now until school starts, we’ll be helping public housing developments, community organizations, houses of worship, and food pantries have the best family events they can possibly have, giving out backpacks and other back-to-school resources to families who may need a little extra help. So many kids in The Bronx and Queens this year are going to have their back to school be a little bit brighter because YOUR care and support! Thank you. 🙏🏽 Alexandria | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: America First War Room
subject: Banned sniper gear finally available to the public…
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e32534614/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU0pOamJibXQzVw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsejFCdFdNUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbHFCdU1EbHhscw/gaI1UBQ/sfvac772c23)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see {FIRSTNAME}:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Codename: DarkForce](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e32534614/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsejFCdFdNUQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmFmZl9zdWI9V2Fycm9vbSZhZmZfc3ViMj1NRyZmaWxlX2lkPTEzNw/gaI1UBQ/s9rb28b7a85)**

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e32534614/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsejFCdFdNUQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmFmZl9zdWI9V2Fycm9vbSZhZmZfc3ViMj1NRyZmaWxlX2lkPTEzNw/gaI1UBQ/s9rb28b7a85)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 90% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your DarkForce Binoculars before I run out](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e32534614/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsejFCdFdNUQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmFmZl9zdWI9V2Fycm9vbSZhZmZfc3ViMj1NRyZmaWxlX2lkPTEzNw/gaI1UBQ/s9rb28b7a85)
**
P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e32534614/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDE/LbmNsejFCdFdNUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbHFCdU1EbHhscw/gaI1UBQ/sdtedccce7a)
